    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer
        Return VarPtr(x)
    End Function
    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function
    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Supply1.Close()
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            End If
            Serial_Supply1.WriteLine("*ADR 1")
            RequestStep1 = 0
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Supply1  Fail " & PortNumberAmp1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialScanner1.PortName = PortNumberScanner1
            If SerialScanner1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialScanner1.Close()
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            Else
                SerialScanner1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner1 Fail " & PortNumberScanner1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter1.PortName = PortNumberPrinter1
            If SerialPrinter1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter1.Close()
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer1 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter2.PortName = PortNumberPrinter2
            If SerialPrinter2.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter2.Close()
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter2.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer2 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter2)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialCAN.PortName = PortNumberCAN
            If SerialCAN.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialCAN.Close()
                SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
                SerialCAN.Open()
            Else
                SerialCAN.BaudRate = 115200
                SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
                SerialCAN.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open CAN Fail " & PortNumberCAN)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    SerialLinRH.PortName = PortNumberLinRH
        '    If SerialLinRH.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        SerialLinRH.Close()
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    Else
        '        SerialLinRH.BaudRate = 38400
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    End If
        'Catch ex As Exception
        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Lin RH Fail " & PortNumberLinRH)
        'End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString1 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString2 As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen = True Then
                    If Serial_Supply1.BytesToRead > 0 Then
                        Incoming1 = Serial_Supply1.ReadChar
                        If Incoming1 = 13 Then
                            If RequestStep1 = 1 Then
                                ValueVolt1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 2
                            ElseIf RequestStep1 = 3 Then
                                ValueAmp1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 4
                            End If
                            RecvString1 = ""
                            Serial_Supply1.DiscardInBuffer()
                        Else
                            RecvString1 = RecvString1 & Chr(Incoming1)
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                RecvString1 = ""
                RequestStep1 = 0
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanWrite(str As String)

        SerialCAN.Write(str)
        tmpLogCount = tmpLogCount + 1
        'T 535 8 1D 02 00 00 00 00 FF FF
        tmpLog(tmpLogCount) = "->" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & " " &
                                Mid(str, 2, 3) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 6, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 8, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 10, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 12, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 14, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 16, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 18, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 20, 2)

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Do

            If SerialCAN.IsOpen = True Then

                If CanSTep = 2000 Then 'RL CCS CLEAR LH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 712 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2001 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2020 Then 'RR CCS CLEAR RH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 707 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2021 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 10 Then ' LH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 08 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 20 Then 'LH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 02 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 30 Then 'LH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 40 Then 'LH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 41 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 42
                ElseIf CanSTep = 42 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 43
                ElseIf CanSTep = 110 Then ' RH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 80 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 120 Then 'RH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 20 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 130 Then 'RH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 140 Then 'RH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 0 Then
                ElseIf CanSTep = 200 Then 'LH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 201
                ElseIf CanSTep = 201 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 202
                ElseIf CanSTep = 202 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 203
                ElseIf CanSTep = 203 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 50 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 204 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 205
                ElseIf CanSTep = 205 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 300 Then 'RH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 301
                ElseIf CanSTep = 301 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 302
                ElseIf CanSTep = 302 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 303
                ElseIf CanSTep = 303 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 304 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 305
                ElseIf CanSTep = 305 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 500 Then  'LH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 501
                ElseIf CanSTep = 501 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 500
                ElseIf CanSTep = 600 Then 'RH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 601
                ElseIf CanSTep = 601 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 600
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1000 Then 'LH RH 동시 학습
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1001
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1001 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1000
                End If

            End If

            Thread.Sleep(Thread3Delay)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Dec2Bin(ByVal Port_0 As Integer, ByVal Port_1 As Integer)

        Dim iten As Integer
        Dim sbin As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim i As Integer

        iten = CInt(Port_0)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2
        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        iten = CInt(Port_1)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2

        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        For i = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                D_Value(i) = 0
            Else
                D_Value(i) = 1
            End If
        Next

    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)

        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub TmrIO_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrIO.Tick

        Dim err1 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim err2 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim tmp1 As Byte
        Dim tmp2 As Byte

        err1 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(0, tmp1)
        err2 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(1, tmp2)

        Dec2Bin(CInt(tmp1), CInt(tmp2))

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            Else
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next i

        lbRequestStep1.Text = RequestStep1
        lbRequestCount1.Text = RequestCount1
        RequestCount1 = RequestCount1 + 0.1
        If RequestCount1 >= 2 Then
            RequestStep1 = 0
            RequestCount1 = 0
        End If
        If RequestStep1 = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            RequestStep1 = 1
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 1 Then
            'if data Recv VOLT
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
            RequestStep1 = 3
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            RequestStep1 = 0
        End If


        LbSupply1Volt.Text = ValueVolt1
        LbSupply1Amp.Text = ValueAmp1

    End Sub
    Sub Do_On(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 1

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.Black

    End Sub
    Sub Do_Off(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 0

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.White

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        ' PLC ActiveX 컨트롤 코드에서 생성
        ActPlc = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        Me.Controls.Add(ActPlc)
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        ActPlc.Visible = False

        LhScanCompleted = False
        RhScanCompleted = False

        Thread3Delay = 500
        FlagLog = False
        wStep = 0

        ' SQLite 로컬 DB 초기화
        Try
            InitLocalDB()
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' SQLite DLL 없으면 무시 (로컬 저장 기능만 비활성화)
        End Try

        LoadPortData()
        LoadBarcodeData()
        LoadBasicData()
        EnsureBasic2Table()
        LoadBasic2()
        InitControl()
        InitControlLH()
        InitTest()
        InitTestLH()
        SerialOpen()

        TmrWork.Interval = 100
        TmrWork.Start()

        Control2Arry()

        Try
            InstantDoCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
            InstantDiCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        TmrIO.Interval = 100
        TmrIO.Start()

        DaqStart()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Do_Off(i)
        Next

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskTest)
        Trd2.IsBackground = True
        Trd2.Start()


        ActPlc.ActTimeOut = 500
        AddressOfPLc = PlcIpAddress
        FlagPlcConnection = False

        InitSrcDMap()

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Connect.Start()
        CanSTep = 0
        For i As Integer = 1 To 9
            WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
        Next
        wStep = 0

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialScanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialScanner1.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = SerialScanner1.ReadLine()
        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        SerialScanner1.DiscardInBuffer()
        srcScannerInput.Text = ScanData

        'If wStep = 1 Then
        If ScanData.Contains("21100-") = True Then 'LH
            'If ScanData.Contains("21100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("23000") = True Then 'LH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControlLH()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                InitTestLH()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartLH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100-") = True Then 'RH
            'ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("24000") = True Then 'RH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControl()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                InitTest()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartRH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        End If

        'End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub SearchLineSerial(ByVal str As String)

        TmpPartNo = ""
        TmpSerial = ""
        TmpLHRH = ""

        ConnectionOpen()
        Dim Rs1 As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs1.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs1.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs1.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs1.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_MainLH WHERE LineSerialCush = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialRecl = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialBack = '" & str & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs1.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpPartNo = Trim(Rs1.Fields("PartNO").Value)
            TmpSerial = Trim(Rs1.Fields("LineSerial").Value)
            TmpLHRH = "LH"
        End If
        Rs1.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs1.Close()
        ConnectionClose()
        ConnectionOpen()
        Dim Rs2 As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs2.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs2.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs2.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs2.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_MainRH WHERE LineSerialCush = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialRecl = '" & str & "' OR LineSerialBack = '" & str & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs2.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpPartNo = Trim(Rs2.Fields("PartNO").Value)
            TmpSerial = Trim(Rs2.Fields("LineSerial").Value)
            TmpLHRH = "RH"
        End If
        Rs2.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs2.Close()
        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Sub LoadPartLH(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Partassy WHERE PartNo = '" & strPart & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            LhScanCompleted = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Sub LoadPartRH(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Partassy WHERE PartNo = '" & strPart & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
            srcLbPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("PartName").Value)
            ' Type 필드로 모드 결정
            Try
                CommType = Trim(CStr(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)).ToUpper()
            Catch
                CommType = "HEV"
            End Try
            RhScanCompleted = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

    End Sub
    Private Function LoadToolData(ByVal strSErial As String) As String

        ConnectionOpen()

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE Serial_No = '" & strSErial & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Try
                tmp = Trim(Rs.Fields("OP20_2_TOOL_VALUE").Value)
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try
        Else
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionClose()

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Function ConvertStr(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        If str = "NA" Then
            tmp = ""
        Else
            tmp = str
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Sub BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()

        Dim StartCode As String
        Dim EndCode As String
        Dim aCode As String
        Dim vCode As String
        Dim pCode As String
        Dim sCode As String
        Dim eCode As String
        Dim tCode As String
        Dim mCode As String
        Dim cCode As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"

        Dim tmpSerial As String = FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text

        StartCode = "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS
        vCode = "V" & "SN1C" & GS
        pCode = "P" & Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5) & Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 5) & GS
        ' CommType별 sCode 분기
        Select Case CommType
            Case "ICE" : sCode = "S" & "GN01" & GS
            Case "HEV" : sCode = "S" & "GR01" & GS
            Case Else : sCode = "S" & "CN00" & GS
        End Select
        eCode = "E" & "" & GS
        tCode = "T" & Mid(tmpSerial, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1GN7PF" & Mid(tmpSerial, 9, 4) & GS
        aCode = "A" & GS
        mCode = "M" & GS
        cCode = "C" & GS
        EndCode = RS & EOT

        TmpEndSerial = StartCode & vCode & pCode & sCode & eCode & tCode & mCode & cCode & EndCode

        WriteErrorLog("BarcodePrintLH", $"시리얼={tmpSerial}, CommType={CommType}, sCode={sCode}")
        WriteErrorLog("BarcodePrintLH", $"TmpEndSerial={TmpEndSerial}")

        ' -----------------------------
        '  ZPL 문자열 구성
        ' -----------------------------
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()

        sb.Append("^XA")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeBX},{BarcodeBY}^BY5^BXN,{BarcodeBH},200,,,,^FH^FD{TmpEndSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS1X},{BarcodeS1Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS1H},{BarcodeS1W}^FD{Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5)}-{Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 8)}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS2X},{BarcodeS2Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS2H},{BarcodeS2W}^FD{tmpSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS3X},{BarcodeS3Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS3H},{BarcodeS3W}^FD{FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text}^FS")
        sb.Append("^XZ")

        Dim zpl As String = sb.ToString()

        WriteErrorLog("BarcodePrintLH", $"ZPL={zpl}")

        ' -----------------------------
        '  이더넷(ZT411)으로 전송
        ' -----------------------------
        SendToZebraEthernetLH(zpl)

    End Sub

    Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetRH(ByVal zpl As String)
        'ZT411 IP/포트 (프린터 설정에 맞게 변경)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.15"   ' ← ZT411 IP
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100          ' RAW 포트(기본 9100)

        Dim client As TcpClient = Nothing
        Dim ns As NetworkStream = Nothing

        WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", $"연결 시도 → {printerIp}:{printerPort}")

        Try
            client = New TcpClient()
            client.SendTimeout = 5000
            client.ReceiveTimeout = 5000
            Dim ar = client.BeginConnect(printerIp, printerPort, Nothing, Nothing)
            If Not ar.AsyncWaitHandle.WaitOne(5000) Then
                WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", "연결 타임아웃 (5초)")
                Return
            End If
            client.EndConnect(ar)

            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", "연결 성공")

            ns = client.GetStream()
            Dim data As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(zpl)

            ns.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
            ns.Flush()

            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", $"전송 완료 ({data.Length} bytes)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", $"오류: {ex.Message}")
            Debug.WriteLine("RH 바코드 프린터 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            If ns IsNot Nothing Then
                ns.Close()
            End If
            If client IsNot Nothing Then
                client.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function Laser2Angle(ByVal vLaser As Double) As Double

        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To UBound(LASER) - 1
                If vLaser >= LASER(i) And vLaser <= LASER(i + 1) Then
                    tmp = Calc(LASER(i), ANGLE(i), LASER(i + 1), ANGLE(i + 1), vLaser)
                End If
            Next i

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Function Laser2Angle_Frest(ByVal vLaser As Double) As Double

        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To UBound(LASER_FREST) - 1
                If vLaser >= LASER_FREST(i) And vLaser <= LASER_FREST(i + 1) Then
                    tmp = Calc(LASER_FREST(i), ANGLE_FREST(i), LASER_FREST(i + 1), ANGLE_FREST(i + 1), vLaser)
                End If
            Next i

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Public Function Calc(ByVal aLaser As Double, ByVal aAngle As Double, ByVal bLaser As Double, ByVal bAngle As Double, ByVal val As Double) As Double

        Dim t As Double
        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            If aLaser = 0 And aAngle = 0 And bLaser = 0 And bAngle = 0 Then
                tmp = 0
            Else
                t = (aAngle - bAngle) / (aLaser - bLaser)
                tmp = (t * val) - (t * bLaser) + bAngle
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Sub LoadAngleData(ByVal strOption As String)

        ConnectionOpenMdb()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Angle_" & strOption & " ORDER BY LEN(LASER_LENGTH),LASER_LENGTH", MdbConnect)

        ReDim ANGLE(Rs.RecordCount)
        ReDim LASER(Rs.RecordCount)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            ANGLE(0) = Rs.Fields("CONVERT_ANGLE").Value
            LASER(0) = Rs.Fields("LASER_LENGTH").Value

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then

            i = 0
            Rs.MoveFirst()

            Do Until Rs.EOF
                ANGLE(i) = Rs.Fields("CONVERT_ANGLE").Value
                LASER(i) = Rs.Fields("LASER_LENGTH").Value
                i = i + 1
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMdb()

    End Sub

    Private Sub WritePlc(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        If srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = "OK" Then

            ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

            For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
                szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
                If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
                If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
                sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
            Next
            Try
                iReturnCode = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))
            Catch exception As Exception
                ' COM 에러 로그만 남기고 계속 진행 (MessageBox 제거 - UI 블록 방지)
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[PLC Write] " & exception.Message)
                FlagPlcConnection = False
                Exit Sub
            End Try

        End If

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub
    Private Sub ReadPLc()

        Dim tmpPlcValue(200) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 20 + 1

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        'szDeviceName = "D4000" & vbLf & "D4001" & vbLf & "D4002" & vbLf & "D4003" & vbLf & "D4004" & vbLf & "D4005" & vbLf & "D4006" & vbLf & "D4007" & vbLf & "D4008" & vbLf & "D4009" & vbLf &
        '               "D4050" & vbLf & "D4051" & vbLf & "D4052" & vbLf & "D4053" & vbLf & "D4054" & vbLf & "D4055" & vbLf & "D4056" & vbLf & "D4057" & vbLf & "D4058" & vbLf & "D4059" & vbLf & "D4060"

        szDeviceName = "D4100" & vbLf & "D4101" & vbLf & "D4102" & vbLf & "D4103" & vbLf & "D4104" & vbLf & "D4105" & vbLf & "D4106" & vbLf & "D4107" & vbLf & "D4108" & vbLf & "D4109" & vbLf &
                       "D4150" & vbLf & "D4151" & vbLf & "D4152" & vbLf & "D4153" & vbLf & "D4154" & vbLf & "D4155" & vbLf & "D4156" & vbLf & "D4157" & vbLf & "D4158" & vbLf & "D4159" & vbLf & "D4160"

        Try
            iReturnCode = ActPlc.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            ' COM 에러 로그만 남기고 계속 진행 (MessageBox 제거 - UI 블록 방지)
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[PLC Read] " & exException.Message)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                tmpPlcValue(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For i = 0 To 9
                PlcValue(i + 4100) = tmpPlcValue(i)
            Next
            For i = 10 To 20
                PlcValue(i + 4140) = tmpPlcValue(i)
            Next

            srcD4000.Text = PlcValue(4100).ToString
            srcD4001.Text = PlcValue(4101).ToString
            srcD4002.Text = PlcValue(4102).ToString
            srcD4003.Text = PlcValue(4103).ToString
            srcD4004.Text = PlcValue(4104).ToString
            srcD4005.Text = PlcValue(4105).ToString
            srcD4006.Text = PlcValue(4106).ToString
            srcD4007.Text = PlcValue(4107).ToString
            srcD4008.Text = PlcValue(4108).ToString
            srcD4009.Text = PlcValue(4109).ToString

            srcD4050.Text = PlcValue(4150).ToString
            srcD4051.Text = PlcValue(4151).ToString
            srcD4052.Text = PlcValue(4152).ToString
            srcD4053.Text = PlcValue(4153).ToString
            srcD4054.Text = PlcValue(4154).ToString
            srcD4055.Text = PlcValue(4155).ToString
            srcD4056.Text = PlcValue(4156).ToString
            srcD4057.Text = PlcValue(4157).ToString
            srcD4058.Text = PlcValue(4158).ToString
            srcD4059.Text = PlcValue(4159).ToString
            srcD4060.Text = PlcValue(4160).ToString

            UpdatePlcLabelsFast()
            PlcConnectionError = "OK"

        Else

            PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private ReadOnly _srcDMap As New Dictionary(Of Integer, Control)
    Private Sub InitSrcDMap()
        CacheRange(4000, 10)
        CacheRange(4050, 11)
    End Sub
    Private Sub CacheRange(ByVal ctrlStart As Integer, ByVal count As Integer)
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To count - 1
            Dim name As String = "srcD" & (ctrlStart + i).ToString()
            Dim found() As Control = Me.Controls.Find(name, True)
            If found IsNot Nothing AndAlso found.Length > 0 Then
                _srcDMap(ctrlStart + i) = found(0)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub
    Private Sub UpdatePlcLabelsFast()
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To 9
            Dim c As Control
            If _srcDMap.TryGetValue(4000 + i, c) Then
                c.Text = PlcValue(4100 + i)
                Showlabel(c)
            End If
        Next
        For i = 0 To 10
            Dim c As Control
            If _srcDMap.TryGetValue(4050 + i, c) Then
                c.Text = PlcValue(4150 + i)
                Showlabel(c)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub
    Private Sub Showlabel(tmplabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label)

        If tmplabel.Text = "0" Then
            tmplabel.BackColor = Color.Black
            tmplabel.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            tmplabel.BackColor = Color.White
            tmplabel.ForeColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub ConnectPLc()

        ActPlc.ActCpuType = 209

        ActPlc.ActHostAddress = AddressOfPLc
        If ActPlc.Open <> 0 Then
            FlagPlcConnection = False
        Else
            FlagPlcConnection = True
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If FrmMainLH.FrmLH.WindowState = FormWindowState.Normal Then
            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized
        End If
        If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = PlcConnectionError
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.BackColor = Color.Blue
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = PlcConnectionError
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.BackColor = Color.Red
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If PlcConnectionStep = 0 Then
            ConnectPLc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 2
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 2 Then
            If FlagPlcConnection = True Then
                PlcConnectionStep = 3
            Else
                PlcConnectionStep = 0
            End If
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 3 Then
            PlcConnectionError = ""
            ReadPLc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 4 Then
            If PlcConnectionError <> "" Then
                If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
                    PlcConnectionStep = 2
                Else
                    ActPlc.Close()
                    PlcConnectionStep = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function DelSpace(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
            Else
                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
            End If
        Next

        tmp = tmp & Chr(13)
        Return tmp

    End Function

    ' 값 표시 + 판정 공통 함수
    Private Sub DecideControl(
    ByVal valueLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal decisionLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal minValue As Double,
    ByVal maxValue As Double,
    ByVal measuredValue As Double,
    Optional ByVal formatString As String = "0.0"
)

        valueLabel.Text = measuredValue.ToString(formatString)

        If measuredValue >= minValue AndAlso measuredValue <= maxValue Then
            decisionLabel.Text = "OK"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            decisionLabel.Text = "NG"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    ' 시간 범위 내에서 Max Amp / Noise 공통 계산
    Private Sub CalcMaxInRange(
    ByVal timeArr() As Double,
    ByVal ampArr() As Double,
    ByVal noiseArr() As Double,
    ByVal count As Integer,
    ByVal rangeStart As Double,
    ByVal rangeEnd As Double,
    ByRef maxAmp As Double,
    ByRef maxNoise As Double)

        maxAmp = 0.0
        maxNoise = 0.0

        For idx As Integer = 0 To count - 1
            Dim t As Double = timeArr(idx)
            If t >= rangeStart AndAlso t <= rangeEnd Then
                If maxAmp < ampArr(idx) Then maxAmp = ampArr(idx)
                If maxNoise < noiseArr(idx) Then maxNoise = noiseArr(idx)
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskTest()

        Dim i As Int64
        Dim testSw As New Stopwatch
        Dim stats As New TestStats()

        Do

            If wStep = 60 Then

                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, "통풍 전류 그래프", "Current (A)", 0, 2)
                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, "통풍 소음 그래프", "Noise (dB)", 20, 80)

                ErrCount1 = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                IGN_ON()
                RL_VENT_ON()
                wStep = 61

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                If TotalTime1 >= BasicVentTestTime Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("RR_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("RL_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
                    VENT_OFF()
                    wStep = 62
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 62 Then

                ' Vent 구간 Max 계산
                stats.GetMaxInRange(VentDecSecStart,
                                TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd,
                                TmpAmpMAx1,
                                TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ' 판정
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentAmp,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentAmp,
                          BAsicVentAmpMin, BasicVentAMpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentNoise,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentNoise,
                          BasicVentNoiseMin, BasicVentNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 63

            ElseIf wStep = 63 Then

    Private Sub TmrWork_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrWork.Tick

        srcStep1.Text = wStep

        PcAliveCount = PcAliveCount + 1
        If PcAliveCount = 10 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4150", "1")
        ElseIf PcAliveCount = 20 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4150", "0")
            PcAliveCount = 0
        End If

        If PlcValue(4100) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            InitControl()
            InitControlLH()
            For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
            Next
            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                Do_Off(i)
            Next
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If RstStep = 0 Then

            If wStep = 0 Then
                'wStep = 1
            ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

            ElseIf wStep = 21 Then
                srcAlarm.Visible = True
                wStep = 0

            ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '스캔완료

                If LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                    ' 자동시퀀스 변수 초기화
                    nStep = 0
                    FlagNmlDone = False
                    If tmrNormalTest.Enabled Then tmrNormalTest.Stop()

                    WritePlc("D", "4151", "1") 'LH COMPPLETED
                    WritePlc("D", "4152", "1") 'RH COMPPLETED
                    FlagLog = True
                    ' CAN 로그 버퍼 초기화
                    SyncLock _canLogLock
                        _canLogBuffer.Clear()
                    End SyncLock
                    BufferCanLog("=== 검사 시작 RH=" & srcLbSerial.Text & " LH=" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text & " ===")
                    If FolderCheck(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")) = False Then
                        FolderMake(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd"))
                    End If

                    LogTmpFolder = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
                    LogTmpFIlename = "Log_" & "RH_" & srcLbSerial.Text & "_LH_" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text
                    If FileCheck(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt") = False Then FileMake(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt")
                    ' 웹캠 열기
                    _camRetry = 0
                    Try : _webcam.Open() : Catch : End Try
                    wStep = 41
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = False And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = False Then
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41 Then '사진 촬영

                _camRetry += 1

                If _webcam.HasFrame OrElse _camRetry > 10 Then
                    ' 사진 저장 경로 계산
                    Dim photoRoot As String = PhotoSavePath.Trim()
                    If photoRoot.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(photoRoot(0)) Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & ":\"
                    ElseIf photoRoot.Length = 2 AndAlso photoRoot(1) = ":"c Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & "\"
                    End If

                    Dim photoFile As String = ""
                    Dim doSave As Boolean = False
                    If photoRoot = "" OrElse Not Directory.Exists(photoRoot) Then
                        BufferCanLog("※ 사진 저장 경로 없음 - 저장 생략 (" & PhotoSavePath & ")")
                    Else
                        Dim photoDir As String = photoRoot & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd") & "\"
                        photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & ".jpg"
                        If File.Exists(photoFile) Then
                            Dim idx As Integer = 1
                            Do
                                photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & "_" & idx.ToString() & ".jpg"
                                idx += 1
                            Loop While File.Exists(photoFile)
                        End If
                        doSave = True
                    End If

                    srcPicSc.Visible = True
                    If _webcam.HasFrame Then
                        Try
                            If _webcam.Capture(srcPicSc, If(doSave, photoFile, "")) Then
                                If doSave Then
                                    BufferCanLog("사진 저장 완료: " & photoFile)
                                Else
                                    BufferCanLog("사진 촬영 완료 (저장 생략)")
                                End If
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception
                            BufferCanLog("사진 촬영 실패: " & ex.Message)
                        End Try
                    Else
                        BufferCanLog("※ 카메라 미연결 - 사진 촬영 스킵")
                    End If

                    Try : _webcam.Close() : Catch : End Try
                    wStep = 41.1
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41.1 Then 'PLC 대기

                If PlcValue(4105) = 1 Then
                    LhScanCompleted = False
                    RhScanCompleted = False
                    srcPicSc.Visible = False
                    wStep = 42
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 42 Then

                BufferStepLog("42", "타겟 표시")
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                srcSWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUSw
                srcHWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUHw
                boolSessionStart = False
                wStep = 43

            ElseIf wStep = 43 Then

                CanStart()
                wStep = 44

            ElseIf wStep = 44 Then

                If FlagCanStart = True Then wStep = 45

            ElseIf wStep = 45 Then

                Session_Start()
                wStep = 45.1

            ElseIf wStep = 45.1 Then

                If boolSessionStart = True Then
                    wStep = 45.2
                Else
                    wStep = 45
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 45.2 Then

                Tester_Present()
                wStep = 47

            ElseIf wStep = 47 Then

                strVersion = ""
                Request_SW_Version()
                wStep = 48

            ElseIf wStep = 48 Then

                If strVersion <> "" Then
                    srcSWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                    If strVersion.Contains(srcSWTargetRPSU.Text) Then
                        srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                        srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    Else
                        srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                        srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    End If
                    wStep = 49
                Else
                    wStep = 47
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 49 Then

                strVersion = ""
                Request_HW_Version()
                wStep = 50

            ElseIf wStep = 50 Then

                If strVersion <> "" Then
                    srcHWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                    If strVersion.Contains(srcHWTargetRPSU.Text) Then
                        srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                        srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    Else
                        srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                        srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    End If
                    wStep = 51
                Else
                    wStep = 49
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 51 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4153", "1") '블로워 검사 준비
                wStep = 52

            ElseIf wStep = 52 Then

                If PlcValue(4101) = 1 Then '블로워 검사 시작해라
                    BufferStepLog("60", "블로워 검사 시작")
                    wStep = 60
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 60 Then


            ElseIf wStep = 70 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4154", "1") '블로워 검사 완료
                wStep = 90

            ElseIf wStep = 90 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4155", "1") '슬라이드 검사 준비
                wStep = 91

            ElseIf wStep = 91 Then

                If PlcValue(4102) = 1 Then '슬라이드 검사 시작해라
                    BufferStepLog("91", "슬라이드 검사 시작")
                    BurnishingCount = 0
                    nStep = 10
                    FlagNmlDone = False
                    tmrNormalTest.Start()
                    AppendWorkLog("[HEV] 자동 시퀀스 시작 (nStep=10)")
                    wStep = 3000
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 3000 Then '자동 시퀀스 완료 대기
                If FlagNmlDone Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[HEV] 자동 시퀀스 완료")
                    wStep = 400
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 400 Then '슬라이드 검사 완료

                WritePlc("D", "4156", "1") '슬라이드 검사 완료
                wStep = 500
                TmrCOunt = 0

            ElseIf wStep = 500 Then

                wStep = 1000

            ElseIf wStep = 1000 Then '파워 검사 완료

                If DecideTestLH() = True Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Else
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If

                If DecideTestRH() = True Then
                    srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK"
                    srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Else
                    srclbTotalDecision.Text = "NG"
                    srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If

                wStep = 1001

            ElseIf wStep = 1001 Then
                _can.RemoveJob("RL_Tester")
                WritePlc("D", "4156", "1") '슬라이드 검사 완료
                TmrCOunt = 0
                '_can.close
                FlagLog = False
                wStep = 1002

            ElseIf wStep = 1002 Then '완료

                TmrCOunt = TmrCOunt + 0.1
                If TmrCOunt >= 1 Then
                    If srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK" Then
                        BarcodePrintRH_ethernet()
                        'BarcodePrintRH_rs232() ' HEV는 이더넷만 사용
                    End If
                    SaveDBRH(TmpEndSerial)
                    SaveDBRH_Local(TmpEndSerial)
                    If FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK" Then
                        BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()
                        'BarcodePrintLH_rs232() ' HEV는 이더넷만 사용
                    End If
                    SaveDBLH(TmpEndSerial)
                    SaveDBLH_Local(TmpEndSerial)
                    BufferStepLog("1002", "검사 완료 - 데이터 저장")
                    FlushCanLog()
                    For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                        WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
                    Next
                    wStep = 0
                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Public Function Bin2Dec(ByVal value As String) As Integer

        Dim bin(7) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As Integer
        Dim total As Integer

        ' 올바른 형식의 String인지 확인
        For i = 1 To value.Length
            total = total + (CInt(Mid(value, i, 1)) * (2 ^ (value.Length - i)))
        Next
        Bin2Dec = total
        Return Bin2Dec

    End Function

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            ' 버퍼 오버플로우(-200279) 등 에러 시 조용히 종료
            runningTask = Nothing
            Try
                If myTask IsNot Nothing Then
                    myTask.Stop()
                    myTask.Dispose()
                    myTask = Nothing
                End If
            Catch
            End Try
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueLaser1 As Double
    Private ValueLaser2 As Double

    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim maxSamples As Integer = 10

        ' 채널별 합/카운트 배열 (0: Ch1, 1: Ch2, 2: Ch3)
        Dim chSum(2) As Double
        Dim chCount(2) As Integer

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            If currentLineIndex > 2 Then
                Exit For ' 3채널까지만 사용
            End If

            Dim available As Integer = waveform.Samples.Count
            Dim dataCount As Integer = Math.Min(available, maxSamples)

            For sample As Integer = 0 To dataCount - 1
                ' DataTable 크기 체크는 호출부에서 맞춰놨다고 가정
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value

                chSum(currentLineIndex) += waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                chCount(currentLineIndex) += 1
            Next

            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next

        ' 0으로 나누기 방지
        Dim ch1Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch2Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch3Avg As Double = 0.0

        If chCount(0) > 0 Then ch1Avg = chSum(0) / chCount(0)
        If chCount(1) > 0 Then ch2Avg = chSum(1) / chCount(1)
        If chCount(2) > 0 Then ch3Avg = chSum(2) / chCount(2)

        ' 기존 로직 유지 + 포맷은 Math.Round로 대체
        ValueNoise = Math.Round(ch1Avg * 100.0, 1) + MicroPhone_Tol
        ValueLaser1 = Math.Round(ch2Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1)
        ValueLaser2 = Math.Round(ch3Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1) ' ★ 원래 Ch2로 되어 있던 부분 수정 제안

        srcNoise.Text = ValueNoise.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser1.Text = ValueLaser1.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser2.Text = ValueLaser2.ToString("0.00")

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai0", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai1", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai2", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)

                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)

                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
            Catch exception As DaqException
                Debug.WriteLine("[DAQ] DaqStart 에러: " & exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                Try : myTask.Dispose() : Catch : End Try
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        Try
            runningTask = Nothing
            If myTask IsNot Nothing Then
                myTask.Stop()
                myTask.Dispose()
                myTask = Nothing
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' DAQ 종료 시 에러 무시
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private boolSlideLimitCheck As Boolean
    Private RoutineResponse As String
    Private LimitCheckCount As Integer
    Private TryLimitCount As Integer
    Private Sub Appendlog(msg As String)

        ' 자동 시퀀스 중 raw CAN 로그 억제
        If tmrNormalTest.Enabled Then Return

        If msg.Contains("0x17FC009D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x17FC00AB ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x25D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30C ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x316 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x317 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3E9 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3EA ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51A ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x1 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30D ") Then Exit Sub

        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            ' ★ 비동기: UI가 바쁠 땐 큐에만 넣고 즉시 리턴 -> 수신 스레드가 안 막힘
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() Appendlog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        ' CAN 로그 버퍼에 TX/RX 기록
        If FlagLog AndAlso (msg.Contains("TX") OrElse msg.Contains("RX")) Then
            BufferCanLog(msg & " [A=" & ValueAmp1.ToString("0.00") & "]")
        End If

        ' 실제 UI 업데이트
        TextBox1.AppendText(msg & Environment.NewLine)
        '           TX ID = 0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00
        '[09:36:17] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=472156126477

        '[13:04:32] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=778999624569

        If msg.Contains("0x739") And msg.Contains("10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00") Then
            boolSlideLimitCheck = True
            RoutineResponse = "0x739 - 10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00"
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("****************************************** 학습 완료 ****************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub OnCanLog(ByVal line As String)
        ' CAN raw 로그는 Appendlog로 (TextBox1 출력)
        Appendlog(line)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>동작 로그 (TextBox1에 시간+메시지 출력, CAN 신호와 구분)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendWorkLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() AppendWorkLog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        Dim line As String = $"[{Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")}] {msg}"
        TextBox1.AppendText(line & Environment.NewLine)
        BufferCanLog("[WORK] " & line)
    End Sub

    Private FlagCanEnabled As Boolean = False
    Private FlagCanStart As Boolean = False

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private Sub CanStart()
        Try
            ' 기존 연결 끊기
            If FlagCanStart Then CanStop()

            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, True)

            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s)
                                     Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog(s))) : Catch : End Try
                                 End Sub
            AddHandler _can.[Error], Sub(st)
                                         Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog("[ERR] " & st))) : Catch : End Try
                                     End Sub
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, Sub(id, data)
                                              Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnFrameDecoded(id, data))) : Catch : End Try
                                          End Sub
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, Sub(respId, uds)
                                              Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnUdsCompleted(respId, uds))) : Catch : End Try
                                          End Sub

            If _can.Init() = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                FlagCanEnabled = True
                _can.StartPolling()
                FlagCanStart = True
            Else
                FlagCanEnabled = False
            End If

            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogVerboseInternalState = True
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("[CAN] CanStart 에러: " & ex.Message)
            FlagCanStart = False
            FlagCanEnabled = False
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanStop()
        Try
            If FlagCanStart Then
                _can.Dispose()
                FlagCanStart = False
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("[CAN] CanStop 에러: " & ex.Message)
            FlagCanStart = False
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        Select Case id
            Case &H3C3 ' 0x3C3
                'Parse_0x3C3(data)
            Case Else
                ' Do nothing
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private FlagGetUdsFrame As Boolean = False
    Private strVersion As String = ""

    Private boolSessionStart As Boolean = False
    Private boolUds As Boolean = False
    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
        If uds Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        ' VB.NET 14 (VS 2015) 이상에서 $ 문자열 보간 지원
        Appendlog($"[OnUds] RX ID=0x{respId:X3} DATA={hex}")
        boolUds = True
        If hex.Contains("50 03 00 32 01 F4") Then
            boolSessionStart = True
        End If

        ' Scheduler started.
        '[01:07:21] TX ID=0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=02 10 03 00 00 00 00 00
        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[01:07:21] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=131168785188
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[00:13:31] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=127938464591
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then ' 0x62
            Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2") ' C#의 +를 &로 변경
            Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E) ' 0x20, 0x7E

            ' C#의 ?: 삼항 연산자를 VB.NET의 If() 함수로 변경
            Dim val As String = If(ascii,
                             Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                             String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            strVersion = val
            FlagGetUdsFrame = True

        End If

        ' RDBI HW 버전 응답 (DID F193)
        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 AndAlso uds(1) = &HF1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H93 Then
            Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            strHwVersion = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                           String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
        End If

        ' RoutineControl 응답 (71 01/03) — 학습체크 결과
        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H71 Then
            Dim subFunc As Byte = uds(1)
            If subFunc = &H1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H12 AndAlso (uds(3) = &HA6 OrElse uds(3) = &HA7) Then
                If uds.Length >= 5 Then
                    If uds(4) = &H2 Then
                        _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK"
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 학습체크 OK (71 01 응답)")
                    ElseIf uds(4) = &H1 Then
                        _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG"
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 학습체크 NG (71 01 응답)")
                    Else
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] EDU 응답 수신 (결과={uds(4):X2})")
                    End If
                End If
            End If
            If subFunc = &H3 AndAlso uds.Length >= 4 Then
                Dim routineId = (CInt(uds(2)) << 8) Or CInt(uds(3))
                If uds.Length >= 5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = If(uds(4) = &H0, "OK", "NG")
                Else
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK"
                End If
            End If
        End If

        ' DTC Clear 응답 (54)
        If uds.Length >= 1 AndAlso uds(0) = &H54 Then
            AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear 긍정 응답")
            _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK"
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub StartTesterPresent()

    Private Sub StartExtendedSession()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731

        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=2

            &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

    End Sub
    Private Sub Request_Security_Seed()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=2
        ' SID = 0x27 (Security Access)
        ' Sub-function = 0x01 (Request Seed - Level 1)

            &H2, &H27, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

    Private Sub Request_SW_Version()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=3
        ' SID = 0x22 (RDBI)
        ' DID = 0xF1A6
        ' 나머지는 CAN 프레임 8바이트 패딩
        Appendlog("Request SW Version")
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request SW Version-{id}", id, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        '0x03, 0x22, 0xF1, 0x91, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00
        '0x03, 0x22, 0xF1, 0x91, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00
        '03 22 F1 B1 00 00 00 00
    End Sub
    Private Sub Request_HW_Version()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=3
        ' SID = 0x22 (RDBI)
        ' DID = 0xF1A2
        ' 나머지는 CAN 프레임 8바이트 패딩
        Appendlog("Request HW Version")
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request HW Version-{id}", id,
            &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

        'HW 버전:   03 22 F1 93 00 00 00 00

    End Sub

    Private Function BytesToHex(ByVal data() As Byte) As String
        Dim sb As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To data.Length - 1
            sb.AppendFormat("{0:X2}", data(i))
        Next
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function
