    ' 값 표시 + 판정 공통 함수
    Private Sub DecideControl(
    ByVal valueLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal decisionLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal minValue As Double,
    ByVal maxValue As Double,
    ByVal measuredValue As Double,
    Optional ByVal formatString As String = "0.0"
)

        valueLabel.Text = measuredValue.ToString(formatString)

        If measuredValue >= minValue AndAlso measuredValue <= maxValue Then
            decisionLabel.Text = "OK"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            decisionLabel.Text = "NG"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    ' 시간 범위 내에서 Max Amp / Noise 공통 계산
    Private Sub CalcMaxInRange(
    ByVal timeArr() As Double,
    ByVal ampArr() As Double,
    ByVal noiseArr() As Double,
    ByVal count As Integer,
    ByVal rangeStart As Double,
    ByVal rangeEnd As Double,
    ByRef maxAmp As Double,
    ByRef maxNoise As Double)

        maxAmp = 0.0
        maxNoise = 0.0

        For idx As Integer = 0 To count - 1
            Dim t As Double = timeArr(idx)
            If t >= rangeStart AndAlso t <= rangeEnd Then
                If maxAmp < ampArr(idx) Then maxAmp = ampArr(idx)
                If maxNoise < noiseArr(idx) Then maxNoise = noiseArr(idx)
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskTest()

        Dim i As Int64
        Dim testSw As New Stopwatch
        Dim stats As New TestStats()

        Do

            If wStep = 60 Then

                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, "통풍 전류 그래프", "Current (A)", 0, 2)
                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, "통풍 소음 그래프", "Noise (dB)", 20, 80)

                ErrCount1 = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                IGN_ON()
                RL_VENT_ON()
                wStep = 61

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                If TotalTime1 >= BasicVentTestTime Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("RR_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("RL_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
                    VENT_OFF()
                    wStep = 62
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 62 Then

                ' Vent 구간 Max 계산
                stats.GetMaxInRange(VentDecSecStart,
                                TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd,
                                TmpAmpMAx1,
                                TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ' 판정
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentAmp,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentAmp,
                          BAsicVentAmpMin, BasicVentAMpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentNoise,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentNoise,
                          BasicVentNoiseMin, BasicVentNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 63

            ElseIf wStep = 63 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 64

            ElseIf wStep = 64 Then

                If DecideNG() = False Then
                    wStep = 60 '재검
                Else
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 65
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 65 Then

                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(srcGraphVentAmp, "통풍 전류 그래프", "Current (A)", 0, 2)
                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(srcGraphVentNoise, "통풍 소음 그래프", "Noise (dB)", 20, 80)
                IGN_ON()
                RR_VENT_ON()
                ErrCount1 = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                wStep = 66

            ElseIf wStep = 66 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphVentAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphVentNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                If TotalTime1 >= BasicVentTestTime Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("RR_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("RL_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
                    VENT_OFF()
                    wStep = 67
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 67 Then

                stats.GetMaxInRange(VentDecSecStart,
                                TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd,
                                TmpAmpMAx1,
                                TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphVentAmp,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphVentNoise,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                DecideControl(srclbValVentAmp,
                          srclbDecVentAmp,
                          BAsicVentAmpMin, BasicVentAMpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(srclbValVentNoise,
                          srclbDecVentNoise,
                          BasicVentNoiseMin, BasicVentNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                ThreadCount = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 68

            ElseIf wStep = 68 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 69

            ElseIf wStep = 69 Then

                If DecideNG() = False Then
                    wStep = 65 ' RH blower 재검
                Else
                    wStep = 70
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

            ElseIf wStep = 100 Then 'Slide 버니싱

                Appendlog($"Burnishing:{NumBurnishing.ToString}")
                Appendlog($"RR FWD")
                RR_FWD()
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 101

            ElseIf wStep = 101 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    Appendlog($"RL FWD")
                    RL_FWD()
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 102
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 102 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 > 1 Then
                        RR_STOP()
                        testSw.Restart()
                        wStep = 103
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 103 Then
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    RL_STOP()
                    wStep = 104
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 104 Then

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 106

            ElseIf wStep = 106 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then wStep = 107

            ElseIf wStep = 107 Then 'Slide BWD

                Appendlog($"RR BWD")
                RR_BWD()
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 108

            ElseIf wStep = 108 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    Appendlog($"RL BWD")
                    RL_BWD()
                    wStep = 109
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 109 Then ' (old 93.1)

                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 110
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 110 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 > 1 Then
                        RR_STOP()
                        testSw.Restart()
                        wStep = 111
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 111 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    RL_STOP()
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 112
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 112 Then

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 113

            ElseIf wStep = 113 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    BurnishingCount = BurnishingCount + 1
                    Appendlog($"BurnishingCount:{BurnishingCount.ToString}")
                    wStep = 114
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 114 Then

                If NumBurnishing <= BurnishingCount Then
                    TryLimitCount = 0
                    wStep = 200
                Else
                    wStep = 100
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 200 Then '학습

                TryLimitCount = TryLimitCount + 1
                LimitCheckCount = 0
                SlideLimit()
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 201

            ElseIf wStep = 201 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 > 2 Then
                        wStep = 202
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 202 Then

                If ValueAmp1 < 0.3 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 203
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 203 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    wStep = 204
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 204 Then

                LimitCheckCount = LimitCheckCount + 1
                boolSlideLimitCheck = False
                SlideLimitCheck()
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 205

            ElseIf wStep = 205 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    wStep = 204
                    If LimitCheckCount > 5 Then '리미트 체크 메시지 5번 이상 했을 경우
                        wStep = 207
                    End If
                End If
                If boolSlideLimitCheck = True Then
                    wStep = 206
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 206 Then

                srclbMsgEcu.Text = RoutineResponse
                srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "OK"
                srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 300

            ElseIf wStep = 207 Then '리미트 체크 메시지 5번 이상 했을 경우

                srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "NG"
                srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Red

                If TryLimitCount > 3 Then
                    wStep = 208
                Else
                    wStep = 200
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 208 Then


            ElseIf wStep = 300 Then 'Slide Fwd LH

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                ErrCount1 = 0
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                boolUds = False
                RL_FWD()
                wStep = 300.1

            ElseIf wStep = 300.1 Then

                If boolUds = True Then
                    wStep = 301
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 301 Then

                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    testSw.Restart()
                    StopCount = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    wStep = 302
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 302 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        RL_STOP()
                        testSw.Restart()
                        wStep = 302.1
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 302.1 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 303

            ElseIf wStep = 303 Then

                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhFwdLen As Double = lhFwdEnd - lhFwdStart + LhFwdLenTol
                Dim lhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhFwdSpeed As Double = lhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhFwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = lhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhFwdLen, "#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                          BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                          BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                          BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                          lhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                wStep = 304

            ElseIf wStep = 304 Then

                wStep = 310

            ElseIf wStep = 310 Then 'Slide Bwd LH

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                RL_BWD()
                ErrCount1 = 0
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                wStep = 311

            ElseIf wStep = 311 Then

                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    StopCount = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    wStep = 312
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 312 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                    End If
                    StopStep = 0
                End If

                If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                    RL_STOP()
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 312.1
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 312.1 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 313

            ElseIf wStep = 313 Then

                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(lhBwdEnd - lhBwdStart) + LhBwdLenTol
                Dim lhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhBwdSpeed As Double = lhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhBwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = lhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhBwdLen, "#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              lhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                CanCount = 0
                wStep = 314

            ElseIf wStep = 314 Then

                wStep = 320

            ElseIf wStep = 320 Then 'Slide Fwd RH

                srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                RR_FWD()
                ErrCount1 = 0
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                wStep = 321

            ElseIf wStep = 321 Then

                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    testSw.Restart()
                    StopCount = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    wStep = 322
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 322 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        RR_STOP()
                        testSw.Restart()
                        wStep = 322.1
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 322.1 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 323

            ElseIf wStep = 323 Then

                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhFwdLen As Double = rhFwdEnd - rhFwdStart + RhFwdLenTol
                Dim rhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhFwdSpeed As Double = rhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhFwdTime)

                srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = rhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhFwdLen, "#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                              rhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                wStep = 324

            ElseIf wStep = 324 Then

                wStep = 330

            ElseIf wStep = 330 Then 'Slide Bwd RH

                srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                RR_BWD()
                ErrCount1 = 0
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                wStep = 331

            ElseIf wStep = 331 Then

                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    StopCount = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    wStep = 332
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 332 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds

                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then

                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If

                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        RR_STOP()
                        testSw.Restart()
                        wStep = 332.1
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 332.1 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 333

            ElseIf wStep = 333 Then

                stats.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(rhBwdEnd - rhBwdStart) + RhBwdLenTol
                Dim rhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhBwdSpeed As Double = rhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhBwdTime)

                srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = rhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhBwdLen, "#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              rhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                CanCount = 0
                wStep = 334

            ElseIf wStep = 334 Then

                wStep = 400

            End If

            ' 루프 주기: 50ms → 1초에 20회 이상
            Thread.Sleep(100)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub TmrWork_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrWork.Tick

        srcStep1.Text = wStep

        PcAliveCount = PcAliveCount + 1
        If PcAliveCount = 10 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4150", "1")
        ElseIf PcAliveCount = 20 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4150", "0")
            PcAliveCount = 0
        End If

        If PlcValue(4100) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            InitControl()
            InitControlLH()
            For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
            Next
            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                Do_Off(i)
            Next
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If RstStep = 0 Then

            If wStep = 0 Then
                'wStep = 1
            ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

            ElseIf wStep = 21 Then
                srcAlarm.Visible = True
                wStep = 0

            ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '스캔완료

                If LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                    ' 자동시퀀스 변수 초기화
                    nStep = 0
                    FlagNmlDone = False
                    If tmrNormalTest.Enabled Then tmrNormalTest.Stop()

                    WritePlc("D", "4151", "1") 'LH COMPPLETED
                    WritePlc("D", "4152", "1") 'RH COMPPLETED
                    FlagLog = True
                    ' CAN 로그 버퍼 초기화
                    SyncLock _canLogLock
                        _canLogBuffer.Clear()
                    End SyncLock
                    BufferCanLog("=== 검사 시작 RH=" & srcLbSerial.Text & " LH=" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text & " ===")
                    If FolderCheck(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")) = False Then
                        FolderMake(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd"))
                    End If

                    LogTmpFolder = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
                    LogTmpFIlename = "Log_" & "RH_" & srcLbSerial.Text & "_LH_" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text
                    If FileCheck(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt") = False Then FileMake(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt")
                    ' 웹캠 열기
                    _camRetry = 0
                    Try : _webcam.Open() : Catch : End Try
                    wStep = 41
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = False And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = False Then
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41 Then '사진 촬영

                _camRetry += 1

                If _webcam.HasFrame OrElse _camRetry > 10 Then
                    ' 사진 저장 경로 계산
                    Dim photoRoot As String = PhotoSavePath.Trim()
                    If photoRoot.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(photoRoot(0)) Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & ":\"
                    ElseIf photoRoot.Length = 2 AndAlso photoRoot(1) = ":"c Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & "\"
                    End If

                    Dim photoFile As String = ""
                    Dim doSave As Boolean = False
                    If photoRoot = "" OrElse Not Directory.Exists(photoRoot) Then
                        BufferCanLog("※ 사진 저장 경로 없음 - 저장 생략 (" & PhotoSavePath & ")")
                    Else
                        Dim photoDir As String = photoRoot & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd") & "\"
                        photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & ".jpg"
                        If File.Exists(photoFile) Then
                            Dim idx As Integer = 1
                            Do
                                photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & "_" & idx.ToString() & ".jpg"
                                idx += 1
                            Loop While File.Exists(photoFile)
                        End If
                        doSave = True
                    End If

                    srcPicSc.Visible = True
                    If _webcam.HasFrame Then
                        Try
                            If _webcam.Capture(srcPicSc, If(doSave, photoFile, "")) Then
                                If doSave Then
                                    BufferCanLog("사진 저장 완료: " & photoFile)
                                Else
                                    BufferCanLog("사진 촬영 완료 (저장 생략)")
                                End If
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception
                            BufferCanLog("사진 촬영 실패: " & ex.Message)
                        End Try
                    Else
                        BufferCanLog("※ 카메라 미연결 - 사진 촬영 스킵")
                    End If

                    Try : _webcam.Close() : Catch : End Try
                    wStep = 41.1
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41.1 Then 'PLC 대기

                If PlcValue(4105) = 1 Then
                    LhScanCompleted = False
                    RhScanCompleted = False
                    srcPicSc.Visible = False
                    wStep = 42
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 42 Then

                BufferStepLog("42", "타겟 표시")
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                srcSWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUSw
                srcHWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUHw
                boolSessionStart = False
                wStep = 43

            ElseIf wStep = 43 Then

                CanStart()
                wStep = 44

            ElseIf wStep = 44 Then

                If FlagCanStart = True Then wStep = 45

            ElseIf wStep = 45 Then

                Session_Start()
                wStep = 45.1

            ElseIf wStep = 45.1 Then

                If boolSessionStart = True Then
                    wStep = 45.2
                Else
                    wStep = 45
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 45.2 Then

                Tester_Present()
                wStep = 47

            ElseIf wStep = 47 Then

                strVersion = ""
                Request_SW_Version()
                wStep = 48

            ElseIf wStep = 48 Then

                If strVersion <> "" Then
                    srcSWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                    If strVersion.Contains(srcSWTargetRPSU.Text) Then
                        srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                        srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    Else
                        srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                        srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    End If
                    wStep = 49
                Else
                    wStep = 47
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 49 Then

                strVersion = ""
                Request_HW_Version()
                wStep = 50

            ElseIf wStep = 50 Then

                If strVersion <> "" Then
                    srcHWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                    If strVersion.Contains(srcHWTargetRPSU.Text) Then
                        srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                        srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    Else
                        srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                        srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    End If
                    wStep = 51
                Else
                    wStep = 49
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 51 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4153", "1") '블로워 검사 준비
                wStep = 52

            ElseIf wStep = 52 Then

                If PlcValue(4101) = 1 Then '블로워 검사 시작해라
                    BufferStepLog("60", "블로워 검사 시작")
                    wStep = 60
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 60 Then


            ElseIf wStep = 70 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4154", "1") '블로워 검사 완료
                wStep = 90

            ElseIf wStep = 90 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4155", "1") '슬라이드 검사 준비
                wStep = 91

            ElseIf wStep = 91 Then

                If PlcValue(4102) = 1 Then '슬라이드 검사 시작해라
                    BufferStepLog("91", "슬라이드 검사 시작")
                    BurnishingCount = 0
                    nStep = 10
                    FlagNmlDone = False
                    tmrNormalTest.Start()
                    AppendWorkLog("[HEV] 자동 시퀀스 시작 (nStep=10)")
                    wStep = 3000
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 3000 Then '자동 시퀀스 완료 대기
                If FlagNmlDone Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[HEV] 자동 시퀀스 완료")
                    wStep = 400
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 400 Then '슬라이드 검사 완료

                WritePlc("D", "4156", "1") '슬라이드 검사 완료
                wStep = 500
                TmrCOunt = 0

            ElseIf wStep = 500 Then

                wStep = 1000

            ElseIf wStep = 1000 Then '파워 검사 완료

                If DecideTestLH() = True Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Else
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If

                If DecideTestRH() = True Then
                    srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK"
                    srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Else
                    srclbTotalDecision.Text = "NG"
                    srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If

                wStep = 1001

            ElseIf wStep = 1001 Then
                _can.RemoveJob("RL_Tester")
                WritePlc("D", "4156", "1") '슬라이드 검사 완료
                TmrCOunt = 0
                '_can.close
                FlagLog = False
                wStep = 1002

            ElseIf wStep = 1002 Then '완료

                TmrCOunt = TmrCOunt + 0.1
                If TmrCOunt >= 1 Then
                    WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", $"RH판정={srclbTotalDecision.Text}, LH판정={FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text}")
                    If srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK" Then
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "RH 바코드 출력 시작")
                        BarcodePrintRH_ethernet()
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "RH 바코드 출력 완료")
                    Else
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "RH NG → 바코드 스킵")
                    End If
                    SaveDBRH(TmpEndSerial)
                    SaveDBRH_Local(TmpEndSerial)
                    If FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK" Then
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "LH 바코드 출력 시작")
                        BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "LH 바코드 출력 완료")
                    Else
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "LH NG → 바코드 스킵")
                    End If
                    SaveDBLH(TmpEndSerial)
                    SaveDBLH_Local(TmpEndSerial)
                    BufferStepLog("1002", "검사 완료 - 데이터 저장")
                    FlushCanLog()
                    For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                        WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
                    Next
                    wStep = 0
                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Public Function Bin2Dec(ByVal value As String) As Integer

        Dim bin(7) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As Integer
        Dim total As Integer

        ' 올바른 형식의 String인지 확인
        For i = 1 To value.Length
            total = total + (CInt(Mid(value, i, 1)) * (2 ^ (value.Length - i)))
        Next
        Bin2Dec = total
        Return Bin2Dec

    End Function

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            ' 버퍼 오버플로우(-200279) 등 에러 시 조용히 종료
            runningTask = Nothing
            Try
                If myTask IsNot Nothing Then
                    myTask.Stop()
                    myTask.Dispose()
                    myTask = Nothing
                End If
            Catch
            End Try
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueLaser1 As Double
    Private ValueLaser2 As Double

    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim maxSamples As Integer = 10

        ' 채널별 합/카운트 배열 (0: Ch1, 1: Ch2, 2: Ch3)
        Dim chSum(2) As Double
        Dim chCount(2) As Integer

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            If currentLineIndex > 2 Then
                Exit For ' 3채널까지만 사용
            End If

            Dim available As Integer = waveform.Samples.Count
            Dim dataCount As Integer = Math.Min(available, maxSamples)

            For sample As Integer = 0 To dataCount - 1
                ' DataTable 크기 체크는 호출부에서 맞춰놨다고 가정
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value

                chSum(currentLineIndex) += waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                chCount(currentLineIndex) += 1
            Next

            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next

        ' 0으로 나누기 방지
        Dim ch1Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch2Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch3Avg As Double = 0.0

        If chCount(0) > 0 Then ch1Avg = chSum(0) / chCount(0)
        If chCount(1) > 0 Then ch2Avg = chSum(1) / chCount(1)
        If chCount(2) > 0 Then ch3Avg = chSum(2) / chCount(2)

        ' 기존 로직 유지 + 포맷은 Math.Round로 대체
        ValueNoise = Math.Round(ch1Avg * 100.0, 1) + MicroPhone_Tol
        ValueLaser1 = Math.Round(ch2Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1)
        ValueLaser2 = Math.Round(ch3Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1) ' ★ 원래 Ch2로 되어 있던 부분 수정 제안

        srcNoise.Text = ValueNoise.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser1.Text = ValueLaser1.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser2.Text = ValueLaser2.ToString("0.00")

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai0", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai1", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai2", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)

                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)

                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
            Catch exception As DaqException
                Debug.WriteLine("[DAQ] DaqStart 에러: " & exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                Try : myTask.Dispose() : Catch : End Try
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        Try
            runningTask = Nothing
            If myTask IsNot Nothing Then
                myTask.Stop()
                myTask.Dispose()
                myTask = Nothing
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' DAQ 종료 시 에러 무시
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private boolSlideLimitCheck As Boolean
    Private RoutineResponse As String
    Private LimitCheckCount As Integer
    Private TryLimitCount As Integer
    Private Sub Appendlog(msg As String)

        ' 자동 시퀀스 중 raw CAN 로그 억제
        If tmrNormalTest.Enabled Then Return

        If msg.Contains("0x17FC009D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x17FC00AB ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x25D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30C ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x316 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x317 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3E9 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3EA ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51A ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x1 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30D ") Then Exit Sub

        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            ' ★ 비동기: UI가 바쁠 땐 큐에만 넣고 즉시 리턴 -> 수신 스레드가 안 막힘
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() Appendlog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        ' CAN 로그 버퍼에 TX/RX 기록
        If FlagLog AndAlso (msg.Contains("TX") OrElse msg.Contains("RX")) Then
            BufferCanLog(msg & " [A=" & ValueAmp1.ToString("0.00") & "]")
        End If

        ' 실제 UI 업데이트
        TextBox1.AppendText(msg & Environment.NewLine)
        '           TX ID = 0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00
        '[09:36:17] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=472156126477

        '[13:04:32] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=778999624569

        If msg.Contains("0x739") And msg.Contains("10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00") Then
            boolSlideLimitCheck = True
            RoutineResponse = "0x739 - 10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00"
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("****************************************** 학습 완료 ****************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub OnCanLog(ByVal line As String)
        ' CAN raw 로그는 Appendlog로 (TextBox1 출력)
        Appendlog(line)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>동작 로그 (TextBox1에 시간+메시지 출력, CAN 신호와 구분)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendWorkLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() AppendWorkLog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        Dim line As String = $"[{Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")}] {msg}"
        TextBox1.AppendText(line & Environment.NewLine)
        BufferCanLog("[WORK] " & line)
    End Sub

    Private FlagCanEnabled As Boolean = False
    Private FlagCanStart As Boolean = False

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private Sub CanStart()
        Try
            ' 기존 연결 끊기
            If FlagCanStart Then CanStop()

            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, True)

            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s)
                                     Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog(s))) : Catch : End Try
                                 End Sub
            AddHandler _can.[Error], Sub(st)
                                         Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog("[ERR] " & st))) : Catch : End Try
                                     End Sub
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, Sub(id, data)
                                              Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnFrameDecoded(id, data))) : Catch : End Try
                                          End Sub
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, Sub(respId, uds)
                                              Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnUdsCompleted(respId, uds))) : Catch : End Try
                                          End Sub

            If _can.Init() = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                FlagCanEnabled = True
                _can.StartPolling()
                FlagCanStart = True
            Else
                FlagCanEnabled = False
            End If

            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogVerboseInternalState = True
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("[CAN] CanStart 에러: " & ex.Message)
            FlagCanStart = False
            FlagCanEnabled = False
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanStop()
        Try
            If FlagCanStart Then
                _can.Dispose()
                FlagCanStart = False
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("[CAN] CanStop 에러: " & ex.Message)
            FlagCanStart = False
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        Select Case id
            Case &H3C3 ' 0x3C3
                'Parse_0x3C3(data)
            Case Else
                ' Do nothing
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private FlagGetUdsFrame As Boolean = False
    Private strVersion As String = ""

    Private boolSessionStart As Boolean = False
    Private boolUds As Boolean = False
    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
        If uds Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        ' VB.NET 14 (VS 2015) 이상에서 $ 문자열 보간 지원
        Appendlog($"[OnUds] RX ID=0x{respId:X3} DATA={hex}")
        boolUds = True
        If hex.Contains("50 03 00 32 01 F4") Then
            boolSessionStart = True
        End If

        ' Scheduler started.
        '[01:07:21] TX ID=0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=02 10 03 00 00 00 00 00
        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[01:07:21] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=131168785188
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[00:13:31] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=127938464591
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then ' 0x62
            Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2") ' C#의 +를 &로 변경
            Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E) ' 0x20, 0x7E

            ' C#의 ?: 삼항 연산자를 VB.NET의 If() 함수로 변경
            Dim val As String = If(ascii,
                             Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                             String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            strVersion = val
            FlagGetUdsFrame = True

        End If

        ' RDBI HW 버전 응답 (DID F193)
        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 AndAlso uds(1) = &HF1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H93 Then
            Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            strHwVersion = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                           String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
        End If

        ' RoutineControl 응답 (71 01/03) — 학습체크 결과
        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H71 Then
            Dim subFunc As Byte = uds(1)
            If subFunc = &H1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H12 AndAlso (uds(3) = &HA6 OrElse uds(3) = &HA7) Then
                If uds.Length >= 5 Then
                    If uds(4) = &H2 Then
                        _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK"
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 학습체크 OK (71 01 응답)")
                    ElseIf uds(4) = &H1 Then
                        _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG"
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 학습체크 NG (71 01 응답)")
                    Else
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] EDU 응답 수신 (결과={uds(4):X2})")
                    End If
                End If
            End If
            If subFunc = &H3 AndAlso uds.Length >= 4 Then
                Dim routineId = (CInt(uds(2)) << 8) Or CInt(uds(3))
                If uds.Length >= 5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = If(uds(4) = &H0, "OK", "NG")
                Else
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK"
                End If
            End If
        End If

        ' DTC Clear 응답 (54)
        If uds.Length >= 1 AndAlso uds(0) = &H54 Then
            AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear 긍정 응답")
            _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK"
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Function BytesToHex(ByVal data() As Byte) As String
        Dim sb As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To data.Length - 1
            sb.AppendFormat("{0:X2}", data(i))
        Next
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function
