#Region "CAN 로그 버퍼링"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' CAN 로그 버퍼에 한 줄 추가 (스레드 안전)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub BufferCanLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If Not FlagLog Then Return
        Dim line As String = "[" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & "] " & msg
        SyncLock _canLogLock
            _canLogBuffer.Add(line)
        End SyncLock
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 스텝 전환 로그 (전류/소음 포함)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub BufferStepLog(ByVal stepName As String, ByVal comment As String)
        BufferCanLog("--- STEP " & stepName & ": " & comment & " (전류=" & ValueAmp1.ToString("0.00") & "A, 소음=" & ValueNoise.ToString("0.0") & "dB) ---")
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 버퍼 내용을 파일로 저장
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub FlushCanLog()
        Dim lines() As String
        SyncLock _canLogLock
            If _canLogBuffer.Count = 0 Then Return
            lines = _canLogBuffer.ToArray()
            _canLogBuffer.Clear()
        End SyncLock

        Try
            Dim baseDir As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory
            Dim dateDir As String = baseDir & "CAN_RAW\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
            If Not Directory.Exists(dateDir) Then Directory.CreateDirectory(dateDir)

            Dim serial As String = srcLbSerial.Text
            If serial = "" Then serial = "UNKNOWN"
            Dim timeStr As String = Format(Now, "HHmmss")
            Dim filePath As String = dateDir & "\" & serial & "_" & timeStr & ".txt"

            File.WriteAllLines(filePath, lines, Encoding.UTF8)
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' 로그 저장 실패 시 무시
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

    ' =========================================================
    '  ICE/HEV 전용 함수: 레스트 모드 / IGN 제어
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>ICE 0x3DB 레스트 모드 32byte 데이터 생성</summary>
    Private Function BuildRestData(ByVal rlValue As Byte, ByVal rrValue As Byte) As Byte()
        Dim data(31) As Byte
        ' RL (bit 144-149): byte[18] bits 0-5
        ' RR (bit 150-155): byte[18] bits 6-7 + byte[19] bits 0-3
        data(18) = CByte((rlValue And &H3F) Or ((rrValue And &H3) << 6))
        data(19) = CByte((rrValue >> 2) And &HF)
        Return data
    End Function

    ''' <summary>ICE 레스트 모드 송신 (0x3DB, 200ms 주기)</summary>
    Private Sub IceRestMode(ByVal rlVal As Byte, ByVal rrVal As Byte)
        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
        Dim d = BuildRestData(rlVal, rrVal)
        _can.AddJob32("REST_MODE", &H3DB, 200,
                      d(0), d(1), d(2), d(3), d(4), d(5), d(6), d(7),
                      d(8), d(9), d(10), d(11), d(12), d(13), d(14), d(15),
                      d(16), d(17), d(18), d(19), d(20), d(21), d(22), d(23),
                      d(24), d(25), d(26), d(27), d(28), d(29), d(30), d(31))
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>ICE 레스트 모드 OFF (0x3DB 주기 송신 중지 + 0 전송)</summary>
    Private Sub IceRestOff()
        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
        _can.AddJobOnce32("REST_OFF", &H3DB,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>ICE IGN OFF (0x3D1, BCM_Ign1InSta=0, BCM_Ign2InSta=0)</summary>
    Private Sub IceIgnOff()
        _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
        _can.AddJob32("IGN", &H3D1, 200, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                                         &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                                         &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                                         &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  HEV 자동검사 시퀀스 (tmrNormalTest)
    '  ICE 프로젝트에서 이식, STD 분기 제거
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub tmrNormalTest_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrNormalTest.Tick

        Try

            ' ─── nStep 10-19: 버니싱 ───
            If nStep = 10 Then
                If NumBurnishing = 0 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 버니싱 건너뜀 (NumBurnishing=0)")
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 19
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 버니싱 FWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    RL_FWD() ' LH 먼저 전송
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 11
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 11 Then
                ' FWD LH 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH FWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A) → 0.3초 후 RH 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 111 ' RH 딜레이 대기
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' 0.5초 내 전류 없으면 LH 재전송
                    RL_FWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH FWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH FWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 13
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 111 Then
                ' 0.3초 딜레이 후 RH FWD 전송
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.3 Then
                    RR_FWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH FWD 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 112
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 112 Then
                ' RH FWD 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 2 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH FWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 12
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    RR_FWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH FWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH FWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 12
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 12 Then
                ' FWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        RL_STOP() : RR_STOP()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 13
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 13 Then
                ' 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then nStep = 14

            ElseIf nStep = 14 Then
                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 버니싱 BWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                RL_BWD() ' LH 먼저 전송
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 15

            ElseIf nStep = 15 Then
                ' BWD LH 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH BWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A) → 0.3초 후 RH 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 151
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    RL_BWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH BWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH BWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 17
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 151 Then
                ' 0.3초 딜레이 후 RH BWD 전송
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.3 Then
                    RR_BWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH BWD 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 152
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 152 Then
                ' RH BWD 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 2 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH BWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 16
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    RR_BWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH BWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH BWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 16
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 16 Then
                ' BWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        RL_STOP() : RR_STOP()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 17
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 17 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 카운트 증가
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    BurnishingCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 버니싱 완료 ({BurnishingCount}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    If BurnishingCount < NumBurnishing Then
                        nStep = 10
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 19
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 19 Then
                ' 리미트 세팅 전 대기 + 세션 시작
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    ' Extended Session + Tester Present 시작 (RoutineControl에 필수)
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] Extended Session 시작 (0x10 03)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 191
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 191 Then
                ' 세션 응답 대기 (1초)
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 세션 준비 완료 → 리미트 세팅 시작")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 20
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 20-24: 리미트 세팅 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 20 Then
                nStepTime.Restart()
                ' ICE: 리미트 세팅 1회 전송 (12A7, 0x40)
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 1차 리미트 세팅 시작 (12A7 전송)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LimitSet", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H40, &H0, &H0)
                nStep = 21

            ElseIf nStep = 21 Then
                ' 전류 변화 감지 — 0.5초 내 전류 > 1A 없으면 재전송
                If ValueAmp1 > 1.0 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 전류 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 23 ' 완료 대기
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    CalcCount1 += 1
                    If CalcCount1 Mod 5 = 0 Then
                        ' 5회 재전송마다 전원 차단 + CAN 재접속
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 {CalcCount1}회 무응답 → 전원차단+재접속")
                        CanStop()
                        _savedTargetVolt = TargetVolt
                        TargetVolt = 0
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 211 ' 전원 복원 대기
                    Else
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 재전송 ({CalcCount1}회, Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitSet", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H40, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                End If
                If CalcCount1 > 60 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, 재전송={CalcCount1}회)")
                    TargetVolt = _savedTargetVolt
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 211 Then
                ' 전원 차단 1초 → 복원 → CAN 재접속 → 세션 → 리미트 재전송
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    TargetVolt = _savedTargetVolt
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 전원 복원 → CAN 재접속")
                    Thread.Sleep(500)
                    CanStart()
                    _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 191 ' 세션 대기 → nStep 20 → 리미트 재전송
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 23 Then
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = 완료)
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.3 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 1차 리미트 세팅 완료 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 25
                    End If
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 25-33: 학습체크 (12A7) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 25 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    ' CAN 재접속 → 세션 → 학습체크
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 1차 학습체크 전 CAN 재접속")
                    CanStop()
                    Thread.Sleep(500)
                    CanStart()
                    _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 251
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 251 Then
                ' 세션 응답 대기 (1초) → 12A7로 학습체크
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    nStep = 31
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 31 Then
                ' 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RPSU 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/3)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 33 ' 71 01 응답에 결과 포함 → 바로 결과 체크

            ElseIf nStep = 33 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RPSU 학습체크 OK")
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    nStep = 40
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULH.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RPSU 학습체크 NG (ECU 응답 NG)")
                    nStep = 40
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/3)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount >= 3 Then
                        ' CAN 재접속 → 세션 → 재시도
                        AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 학습체크 응답 없음 → CAN 재접속")
                        CanStop()
                        Thread.Sleep(500)
                        CanStart()
                        _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 세션 재시작 → 학습체크 재시도")
                        _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 251 ' 세션 대기 후 nStep 31로
                    Else
                        nStep = 31  ' 재시도
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 40-49: ECU 전원차단 5초 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 40 Then
                _savedTargetVolt = TargetVolt
                TargetVolt = 0
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] ECU 전원 차단")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 41

            ElseIf nStep = 41 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 5 Then
                    TargetVolt = _savedTargetVolt
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] ECU 전원 복원")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 42
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 42 Then
                ' 전압 안정 대기
                If ValueVolt1 > _savedTargetVolt * 0.9 Then
                    If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                        nStep = 50
                    End If
                Else
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 50: CAN 끊고 재연결 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 50 Then
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] CAN 재연결")
                CanStop()
                Thread.Sleep(500)
                CanStart()
                ' 재연결 후 세션 + TP 재시작
                _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] Extended Session + TP 재시작")
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 51

                ' ─── nStep 51-69: 레스트모드 슬라이드 검사 (소음/전류/거리/속도 측정) ───

                ' ── LH Relax (FWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 51 Then
                If FlagCanStart = False Then
                    If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 5 Then
                        AppendWorkLog("[ICE] CAN 재연결 실패")
                        nStep = 99
                    End If
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH Relax (FWD) 시작")
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                    IceRestMode(&H1, &H0) ' RL=Relax(0x01)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    statsNml.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 52
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 52 Then
                ' LH Relax 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSwNml.Restart()
                    nStep = 53
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH Relax 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 55
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 53 Then
                ' LH FWD 데이터 수집 (소음/전류/레이저)
                TotalTime1 = testSwNml.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                statsNml.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 54
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 54 Then
                ' LH FWD 판정
                statsNml.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhFwdLen As Double = lhFwdEnd - lhFwdStart + LhFwdLenTol
                Dim lhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhFwdSpeed As Double = lhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhFwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = lhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhFwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                              lhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH Relax 완료 (Len={lhFwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={lhFwdSpeed:F2})")
                IceRestOff()
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 55

                ' ── LH Return (BWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 55 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH Return (BWD) 시작")
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser2.Text
                    IceRestMode(&H2, &H0) ' RL=Return(0x02)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    statsNml.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 56
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 56 Then
                ' LH Return 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSwNml.Restart()
                    nStep = 57
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH Return 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 59
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 57 Then
                ' LH BWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSwNml.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                statsNml.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 58
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 58 Then
                ' LH BWD 판정
                statsNml.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim lhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim lhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser2.Text)
                Dim lhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(lhBwdEnd - lhBwdStart) + LhBwdLenTol
                Dim lhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim lhBwdSpeed As Double = lhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, lhBwdTime)

                FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = lhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              lhBwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              lhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH Return 완료 (Len={lhBwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={lhBwdSpeed:F2})")
                IceRestOff()
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 59

                ' ── RH Relax (FWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 59 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH Relax (FWD) 시작")
                    srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                    IceRestMode(&H0, &H1) ' RR=Relax(0x01)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    statsNml.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 60
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 60 Then
                ' RH Relax 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSwNml.Restart()
                    nStep = 61
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH Relax 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 63
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 61 Then
                ' RH FWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSwNml.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                statsNml.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 62
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 62 Then
                ' RH FWD 판정
                statsNml.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhFwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhFwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhFwdLen As Double = rhFwdEnd - rhFwdStart + RhFwdLenTol
                Dim rhFwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhFwdSpeed As Double = rhFwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhFwdTime)

                srclbValSlideFwdEndPos.Text = rhFwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdLength,
                              BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideFwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhFwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideFwdAmpMin, BasicSlideFwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideFwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideFwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideFwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideFwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideFwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideFwdSpeedMax,
                              rhFwdSpeed, "#0.0#")

                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH Relax 완료 (Len={rhFwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={rhFwdSpeed:F2})")
                IceRestOff()
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 63

                ' ── RH Return (BWD) ──
            ElseIf nStep = 63 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH Return (BWD) 시작")
                    srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                    IceRestMode(&H0, &H2) ' RR=Return(0x02)
                    ErrCount1 = 0
                    TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                    TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                    statsNml.Reset()
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    StopStep = 0
                    LaserBefore = 0
                    LaserNow = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 64
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 64 Then
                ' RH Return 모터 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSwNml.Restart()
                    nStep = 65
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH Return 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 70
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 65 Then
                ' RH BWD 데이터 수집
                TotalTime1 = testSwNml.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                statsNml.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)
                srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If StopStep = 0 Then
                        LaserBefore = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 1
                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then
                        LaserNow = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                        StopStep = 0
                    End If
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 3 Then
                        nStep = 66
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 66 Then
                ' RH BWD 판정
                statsNml.GetMaxInRange(1.0, TotalTime1 - 1.0, TmpAmpMAx1, TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideAmp,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)
                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphSlideNoise,
                      yLines:=New Double() {},
                      xLines:=New Double() {1, TotalTime1 - 2},
                      yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                      lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                Dim rhBwdStart As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text)
                Dim rhBwdEnd As Double = CDbl(srcLaser1.Text)
                Dim rhBwdLen As Double = Math.Abs(rhBwdEnd - rhBwdStart) + RhBwdLenTol
                Dim rhBwdTime As Double = CDbl(srclbValSlideBwdTicTime.Text)
                Dim rhBwdSpeed As Double = rhBwdLen / Math.Max(0.001, rhBwdTime)

                srclbValSlideBwdEndPos.Text = rhBwdEnd.ToString("#0.0#")

                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdLength,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdLength,
                              BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMin, BasicSlideBwdMovingLengthMax,
                              rhBwdLen, "#0.0#")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdAmp,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdAmp,
                              BasicSlideBwdAmpMin, BasicSlideBwdAmpMax,
                              TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdNoise,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdNoise,
                              BasicSlideBwdNoiseMin, BasicSlideBwdNoiseMax,
                              TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")
                DecideControl(srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,
                              srclbDecSlideBwdSpeed,
                              BasicSlideBwdSpeedMin, BasicSlideBwdSpeedMax,
                              rhBwdSpeed, "0.0")

                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH Return 완료 (Len={rhBwdLen:F1} Amp={TmpAmpMAx1:F2} Noise={TmpNoiseMax1:F1} Spd={rhBwdSpeed:F2})")
                IceRestOff()
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 70

                ' ─── nStep 70-77: 2차 학습체크 (리미트 세팅 없이 체크만) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 70 Then
                ' 2차 학습체크 전 CAN 재접속
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 학습체크 전 CAN 재접속")
                    CanStop()
                    Thread.Sleep(500)
                    CanStart()
                    _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 701
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 701 Then
                ' 세션 응답 대기 (1초) → 12A7로 학습체크
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    nStep = 74
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 74 Then
                ' 학습체크 (12A7)
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 RPSU 학습체크 요청")
                _can.AddJobOnce("EDU2_CHK_RH_A", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &HF0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 76 ' 71 01 응답에 결과 포함 → 바로 결과 체크

            ElseIf nStep = 76 Then
                If _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDUFINAL.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDecEcuEDUFINAL.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 RPSU 학습체크 OK")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDUFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDUFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 학습체크 NG")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 2차 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/3)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount >= 3 Then
                        ' CAN 재접속 → 세션 → 재시도
                        AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 학습체크 응답 없음 → CAN 재접속")
                        CanStop()
                        Thread.Sleep(500)
                        CanStart()
                        _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 세션 재시작 → 2차 학습체크 재시도")
                        _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 701 ' 세션 대기 후 nStep 74로
                    Else
                        nStep = 74
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 90-91: DTC 클리어 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 90 Then
                ' DTC 클리어 전 CAN 재접속
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC 클리어 전 CAN 재접속")
                CanStop()
                Thread.Sleep(500)
                CanStart()
                _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 901

            ElseIf nStep = 901 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    _nmlDtcClearResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear ALL (0x7DF)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("DTC_ALL", &H7DF, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 91
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 91 Then
                If _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDtcClear.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDtcClear.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear OK")
                    nStep = 99
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                    srclbDtcClear.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDtcClear.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear NG (타임아웃)")
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 99: 완료 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 99 Then
                _can.RemoveJob("TP")
                CanStop()
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 전체 시퀀스 완료")
                FlagNmlDone = True
                nStep = 0
                tmrNormalTest.Stop()

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendWorkLog("[ICE 예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Label103_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Label103.Click
        BarcodePrintRH_ethernet()
        BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()

    End Sub
End Class

Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetLH(ByVal zpl As String)
        ' ZT411 IP/포트 (프린터 설정에 맞게 변경)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.3"   ' ← ZT411 IP
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100          ' RAW 포트(기본 9100)

        Dim client As TcpClient = Nothing
        Dim ns As NetworkStream = Nothing

        WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"연결 시도 → {printerIp}:{printerPort}")

        Try
            client = New TcpClient()
            client.SendTimeout = 5000
            client.ReceiveTimeout = 5000
            Dim ar = client.BeginConnect(printerIp, printerPort, Nothing, Nothing)
            If Not ar.AsyncWaitHandle.WaitOne(5000) Then
                WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", "연결 타임아웃 (5초)")
                Return
            End If
            client.EndConnect(ar)

            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", "연결 성공")

            ns = client.GetStream()
            Dim data As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(zpl)

            ns.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
            ns.Flush()

            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"전송 완료 ({data.Length} bytes)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"오류: {ex.Message}")
            Debug.WriteLine("LH 바코드 프린터 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            If ns IsNot Nothing Then
                ns.Close()
            End If
            If client IsNot Nothing Then
                client.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub
input.new_string:
Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetLH(ByVal zpl As String)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.3"
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100

        ' 핑 체크
        Try
            Dim ping As New System.Net.NetworkInformation.Ping()
            Dim reply = ping.Send(printerIp, 1000)
            If reply.Status <> System.Net.NetworkInformation.IPStatus.Success Then
                WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"핑 실패 ({printerIp}) → {reply.Status}")
                Return
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"핑 오류 ({printerIp}) → {ex.Message}")
            Return
        End Try

        ' TCP 전송
        Dim client As TcpClient = Nothing
        Dim ns As NetworkStream = Nothing
        Try
            client = New TcpClient()
            client.SendTimeout = 3000
            Dim ar = client.BeginConnect(printerIp, printerPort, Nothing, Nothing)
            If Not ar.AsyncWaitHandle.WaitOne(3000) Then
                WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", "TCP 연결 타임아웃")
                Return
            End If
            client.EndConnect(ar)

            ns = client.GetStream()
            Dim data As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(zpl)
            ns.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
            ns.Flush()
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"전송 완료 ({data.Length} bytes)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"전송 오류: {ex.Message}")
        Finally
            If ns IsNot Nothing Then ns.Close()
            If client IsNot Nothing Then client.Close()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer
        Return VarPtr(x)
    End Function
    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function
    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Supply1.Close()
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            End If
            Serial_Supply1.WriteLine("*ADR 1")
            RequestStep1 = 0
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Supply1  Fail " & PortNumberAmp1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialScanner1.PortName = PortNumberScanner1
            If SerialScanner1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialScanner1.Close()
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            Else
                SerialScanner1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner1 Fail " & PortNumberScanner1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter1.PortName = PortNumberPrinter1
            If SerialPrinter1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter1.Close()
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer1 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter2.PortName = PortNumberPrinter2
            If SerialPrinter2.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter2.Close()
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter2.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer2 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter2)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialCAN.PortName = PortNumberCAN
            If SerialCAN.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialCAN.Close()
                SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
                SerialCAN.Open()
            Else
                SerialCAN.BaudRate = 115200
                SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
                SerialCAN.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open CAN Fail " & PortNumberCAN)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    SerialLinRH.PortName = PortNumberLinRH
        '    If SerialLinRH.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        SerialLinRH.Close()
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    Else
        '        SerialLinRH.BaudRate = 38400
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    End If
        'Catch ex As Exception
        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Lin RH Fail " & PortNumberLinRH)
        'End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString1 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString2 As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen = True Then
                    If Serial_Supply1.BytesToRead > 0 Then
                        Incoming1 = Serial_Supply1.ReadChar
                        If Incoming1 = 13 Then
                            If RequestStep1 = 1 Then
                                ValueVolt1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 2
                            ElseIf RequestStep1 = 3 Then
                                ValueAmp1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 4
                            End If
                            RecvString1 = ""
                            Serial_Supply1.DiscardInBuffer()
                        Else
                            RecvString1 = RecvString1 & Chr(Incoming1)
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                RecvString1 = ""
                RequestStep1 = 0
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanWrite(str As String)

        SerialCAN.Write(str)
        tmpLogCount = tmpLogCount + 1
        'T 535 8 1D 02 00 00 00 00 FF FF
        tmpLog(tmpLogCount) = "->" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & " " &
                                Mid(str, 2, 3) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 6, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 8, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 10, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 12, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 14, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 16, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 18, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 20, 2)

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Do

            If SerialCAN.IsOpen = True Then

                If CanSTep = 2000 Then 'RL CCS CLEAR LH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 712 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2001 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2020 Then 'RR CCS CLEAR RH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 707 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2021 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 10 Then ' LH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 08 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 20 Then 'LH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 02 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 30 Then 'LH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 40 Then 'LH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 41 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 42
                ElseIf CanSTep = 42 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 43
                ElseIf CanSTep = 110 Then ' RH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 80 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 120 Then 'RH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 20 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 130 Then 'RH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 140 Then 'RH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 0 Then
                ElseIf CanSTep = 200 Then 'LH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 201
                ElseIf CanSTep = 201 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 202
                ElseIf CanSTep = 202 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 203
                ElseIf CanSTep = 203 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 50 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 204 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 205
                ElseIf CanSTep = 205 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 300 Then 'RH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 301
                ElseIf CanSTep = 301 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 302
                ElseIf CanSTep = 302 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 303
                ElseIf CanSTep = 303 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 304 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 305
                ElseIf CanSTep = 305 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 500 Then  'LH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 501
                ElseIf CanSTep = 501 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 500
                ElseIf CanSTep = 600 Then 'RH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 601
                ElseIf CanSTep = 601 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 600
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1000 Then 'LH RH 동시 학습
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1001
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1001 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1000
                End If

            End If

            Thread.Sleep(Thread3Delay)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Dec2Bin(ByVal Port_0 As Integer, ByVal Port_1 As Integer)

        Dim iten As Integer
        Dim sbin As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim i As Integer

        iten = CInt(Port_0)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2
        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        iten = CInt(Port_1)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2

        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        For i = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                D_Value(i) = 0
            Else
                D_Value(i) = 1
            End If
        Next

    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)

        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub TmrIO_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrIO.Tick

        Dim err1 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim err2 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim tmp1 As Byte
        Dim tmp2 As Byte

        err1 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(0, tmp1)
        err2 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(1, tmp2)

        Dec2Bin(CInt(tmp1), CInt(tmp2))

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            Else
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next i

        lbRequestStep1.Text = RequestStep1
        lbRequestCount1.Text = RequestCount1
        RequestCount1 = RequestCount1 + 0.1
        If RequestCount1 >= 2 Then
            RequestStep1 = 0
            RequestCount1 = 0
        End If
        If RequestStep1 = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            RequestStep1 = 1
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 1 Then
            'if data Recv VOLT
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
            RequestStep1 = 3
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            RequestStep1 = 0
        End If


        LbSupply1Volt.Text = ValueVolt1
        LbSupply1Amp.Text = ValueAmp1

    End Sub
    Sub Do_On(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 1

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.Black

    End Sub
    Sub Do_Off(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 0

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.White

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        ' PLC ActiveX 컨트롤 코드에서 생성
        ActPlc = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        Me.Controls.Add(ActPlc)
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        ActPlc.Visible = False

        LhScanCompleted = False
        RhScanCompleted = False

        Thread3Delay = 500
        FlagLog = False
        wStep = 0

        ' SQLite 로컬 DB 초기화
        Try
            InitLocalDB()
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' SQLite DLL 없으면 무시 (로컬 저장 기능만 비활성화)
        End Try

        LoadPortData()
        LoadBarcodeData()
        LoadBasicData()
        EnsureBasic2Table()
        LoadBasic2()
        InitControl()
        InitControlLH()
        InitTest()
        InitTestLH()
        SerialOpen()

        TmrWork.Interval = 100
        TmrWork.Start()

        Control2Arry()

        Try
            InstantDoCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
            InstantDiCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        TmrIO.Interval = 100
        TmrIO.Start()

        DaqStart()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Do_Off(i)
        Next

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskTest)
        Trd2.IsBackground = True
        Trd2.Start()


        ActPlc.ActTimeOut = 500
        AddressOfPLc = PlcIpAddress
        FlagPlcConnection = False

        InitSrcDMap()

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Connect.Start()
        CanSTep = 0
        For i As Integer = 1 To 9
            WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
        Next
        wStep = 0

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialScanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialScanner1.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = SerialScanner1.ReadLine()
        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        SerialScanner1.DiscardInBuffer()
        srcScannerInput.Text = ScanData

        'If wStep = 1 Then
        If ScanData.Contains("21100-") = True Then 'LH
            'If ScanData.Contains("21100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("23000") = True Then 'LH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControlLH()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                InitTestLH()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartLH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100-") = True Then 'RH
            'ElseIf ScanData.Contains("22100") = True Or ScanData.Contains("24000") = True Then 'RH
            If Len(ScanData) >= 23 Then
                CanSTep = 0
                InitControl()
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                    WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
                Next
                LoadBasicData()
                InitTest()
                SearchLineSerial(ScanData)
                tmpLogCount = 0
                If TmpSerial <> "" And TmpPartNo <> "" Then
                    srcLbPartNo.Text = TmpPartNo
                    srcLbSerial.Text = TmpSerial
                    LoadPartRH(TmpPartNo)
                    wStep = 4
                Else
                    wStep = 2.1
                End If
            End If

        End If

        'End If

    End Sub

    Sub BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()

        Dim StartCode As String
        Dim EndCode As String
        Dim aCode As String
        Dim vCode As String
        Dim pCode As String
        Dim sCode As String
        Dim eCode As String
        Dim tCode As String
        Dim mCode As String
        Dim cCode As String

        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"

        Dim tmpSerial As String = FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text

        StartCode = "[)>" & RS & "06" & GS
        vCode = "V" & "SN1C" & GS
        pCode = "P" & Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5) & Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 5) & GS
        ' CommType별 sCode 분기
        Select Case CommType
            Case "ICE" : sCode = "S" & "GN01" & GS
            Case "HEV" : sCode = "S" & "GR01" & GS
            Case Else : sCode = "S" & "CN00" & GS
        End Select
        eCode = "E" & "" & GS
        tCode = "T" & Mid(tmpSerial, 3, 6) & "DA1SAS1GN7PF" & Mid(tmpSerial, 9, 4) & GS
        aCode = "A" & GS
        mCode = "M" & GS
        cCode = "C" & GS
        EndCode = RS & EOT

        TmpEndSerial = StartCode & vCode & pCode & sCode & eCode & tCode & mCode & cCode & EndCode

        WriteErrorLog("BarcodePrintLH", $"시리얼={tmpSerial}, CommType={CommType}, sCode={sCode}")
        WriteErrorLog("BarcodePrintLH", $"TmpEndSerial={TmpEndSerial}")

        ' -----------------------------
        '  ZPL 문자열 구성
        ' -----------------------------
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()

        sb.Append("^XA")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeBX},{BarcodeBY}^BY5^BXN,{BarcodeBH},200,,,,^FH^FD{TmpEndSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS1X},{BarcodeS1Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS1H},{BarcodeS1W}^FD{Mid(tmpSerial, 13, 5)}-{Mid(tmpSerial, 19, 8)}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS2X},{BarcodeS2Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS2H},{BarcodeS2W}^FD{tmpSerial}^FS")
        sb.Append($"^FO{BarcodeS3X},{BarcodeS3Y}^A0N,{BarcodeS3H},{BarcodeS3W}^FD{FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbPartName.Text}^FS")
        sb.Append("^XZ")

        Dim zpl As String = sb.ToString()

        WriteErrorLog("BarcodePrintLH", $"ZPL={zpl}")

        ' -----------------------------
        '  이더넷(ZT411)으로 전송
        ' -----------------------------
        SendToZebraEthernetLH(zpl)

    End Sub

    Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetRH(ByVal zpl As String)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.15"
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100

        ' 핑 체크
        Try
            Dim ping As New System.Net.NetworkInformation.Ping()
            Dim reply = ping.Send(printerIp, 1000)
            If reply.Status <> System.Net.NetworkInformation.IPStatus.Success Then
                WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", $"핑 실패 ({printerIp}) → {reply.Status}")
                Return
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", $"핑 오류 ({printerIp}) → {ex.Message}")
            Return
        End Try

        ' TCP 전송
        Dim client As TcpClient = Nothing
        Dim ns As NetworkStream = Nothing
        Try
            client = New TcpClient()
            client.SendTimeout = 3000
            Dim ar = client.BeginConnect(printerIp, printerPort, Nothing, Nothing)
            If Not ar.AsyncWaitHandle.WaitOne(3000) Then
                WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", "TCP 연결 타임아웃")
                Return
            End If
            client.EndConnect(ar)

            ns = client.GetStream()
            Dim data As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(zpl)
            ns.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
            ns.Flush()
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", $"전송 완료 ({data.Length} bytes)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetRH", $"전송 오류: {ex.Message}")
        Finally
            If ns IsNot Nothing Then ns.Close()
            If client IsNot Nothing Then client.Close()
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetLH(ByVal zpl As String)
        ' ZT411 IP/포트 (프린터 설정에 맞게 변경)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.3"   ' ← ZT411 IP
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100          ' RAW 포트(기본 9100)

        Dim client As TcpClient = Nothing
        Dim ns As NetworkStream = Nothing

        WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"연결 시도 → {printerIp}:{printerPort}")

        Try
            client = New TcpClient()
            client.SendTimeout = 5000
            client.ReceiveTimeout = 5000
            Dim ar = client.BeginConnect(printerIp, printerPort, Nothing, Nothing)
            If Not ar.AsyncWaitHandle.WaitOne(5000) Then
                WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", "연결 타임아웃 (5초)")
                Return
            End If
            client.EndConnect(ar)

            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", "연결 성공")

            ns = client.GetStream()
            Dim data As Byte() = Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(zpl)

            ns.Write(data, 0, data.Length)
            ns.Flush()

            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"전송 완료 ({data.Length} bytes)")
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SendToZebraEthernetLH", $"오류: {ex.Message}")
            Debug.WriteLine("LH 바코드 프린터 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            If ns IsNot Nothing Then
                ns.Close()
            End If
            If client IsNot Nothing Then
                client.Close()
            End If
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function Laser2Angle(ByVal vLaser As Double) As Double

        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To UBound(LASER) - 1
                If vLaser >= LASER(i) And vLaser <= LASER(i + 1) Then
                    tmp = Calc(LASER(i), ANGLE(i), LASER(i + 1), ANGLE(i + 1), vLaser)
                End If
            Next i

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Private Function Laser2Angle_Frest(ByVal vLaser As Double) As Double

        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To UBound(LASER_FREST) - 1
                If vLaser >= LASER_FREST(i) And vLaser <= LASER_FREST(i + 1) Then
                    tmp = Calc(LASER_FREST(i), ANGLE_FREST(i), LASER_FREST(i + 1), ANGLE_FREST(i + 1), vLaser)
                End If
            Next i

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try

        Return tmp

    End Function
    Public Function Calc(ByVal aLaser As Double, ByVal aAngle As Double, ByVal bLaser As Double, ByVal bAngle As Double, ByVal val As Double) As Double

        Dim t As Double
        Dim tmp As Double = 0
        Try
            If aLaser = 0 And aAngle = 0 And bLaser = 0 And bAngle = 0 Then
                tmp = 0
            Else
                t = (aAngle - bAngle) / (aLaser - bLaser)
                tmp = (t * val) - (t * bLaser) + bAngle
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub WritePlc(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        If srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = "OK" Then

            ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

            For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
                szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
                If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
                If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
                sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
            Next
            Try
                iReturnCode = ActPlc.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))
            Catch exception As Exception
                ' COM 에러 로그만 남기고 계속 진행 (MessageBox 제거 - UI 블록 방지)
                System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[PLC Write] " & exception.Message)
                FlagPlcConnection = False
                Exit Sub
            End Try

        End If

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub
