                       "D4150" & vbLf & "D4151" & vbLf & "D4152" & vbLf & "D4153" & vbLf & "D4154" & vbLf & "D4155" & vbLf & "D4156" & vbLf & "D4157" & vbLf & "D4158" & vbLf & "D4159" & vbLf & "D4160"

        Try
            iReturnCode = ActPlc.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            ' COM 에러 로그만 남기고 계속 진행 (MessageBox 제거 - UI 블록 방지)
            System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("[PLC Read] " & exException.Message)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                tmpPlcValue(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For i = 0 To 9
                PlcValue(i + 4100) = tmpPlcValue(i)
            Next
            For i = 10 To 20
                PlcValue(i + 4140) = tmpPlcValue(i)
            Next

            srcD4000.Text = PlcValue(4100).ToString
            srcD4001.Text = PlcValue(4101).ToString
            srcD4002.Text = PlcValue(4102).ToString
            srcD4003.Text = PlcValue(4103).ToString
            srcD4004.Text = PlcValue(4104).ToString
            srcD4005.Text = PlcValue(4105).ToString
            srcD4006.Text = PlcValue(4106).ToString
            srcD4007.Text = PlcValue(4107).ToString
            srcD4008.Text = PlcValue(4108).ToString
            srcD4009.Text = PlcValue(4109).ToString

            srcD4050.Text = PlcValue(4150).ToString
            srcD4051.Text = PlcValue(4151).ToString
            srcD4052.Text = PlcValue(4152).ToString
            srcD4053.Text = PlcValue(4153).ToString
            srcD4054.Text = PlcValue(4154).ToString
            srcD4055.Text = PlcValue(4155).ToString
            srcD4056.Text = PlcValue(4156).ToString
            srcD4057.Text = PlcValue(4157).ToString
            srcD4058.Text = PlcValue(4158).ToString
            srcD4059.Text = PlcValue(4159).ToString
            srcD4060.Text = PlcValue(4160).ToString

            UpdatePlcLabelsFast()
            PlcConnectionError = "OK"

        Else

            PlcConnectionError = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private ReadOnly _srcDMap As New Dictionary(Of Integer, Control)
    Private Sub InitSrcDMap()
        CacheRange(4000, 10)
        CacheRange(4050, 11)
    End Sub
    Private Sub CacheRange(ByVal ctrlStart As Integer, ByVal count As Integer)
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To count - 1
            Dim name As String = "srcD" & (ctrlStart + i).ToString()
            Dim found() As Control = Me.Controls.Find(name, True)
            If found IsNot Nothing AndAlso found.Length > 0 Then
                _srcDMap(ctrlStart + i) = found(0)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub
    Private Sub UpdatePlcLabelsFast()
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To 9
            Dim c As Control
            If _srcDMap.TryGetValue(4000 + i, c) Then
                c.Text = PlcValue(4100 + i)
                Showlabel(c)
            End If
        Next
        For i = 0 To 10
            Dim c As Control
            If _srcDMap.TryGetValue(4050 + i, c) Then
                c.Text = PlcValue(4150 + i)
                Showlabel(c)
            End If
        Next
    End Sub
    Private Sub Showlabel(tmplabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label)

        If tmplabel.Text = "0" Then
            tmplabel.BackColor = Color.Black
            tmplabel.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            tmplabel.BackColor = Color.White
            tmplabel.ForeColor = Color.Black
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub ConnectPLc()

        ActPlc.ActCpuType = 209

        ActPlc.ActHostAddress = AddressOfPLc
        If ActPlc.Open <> 0 Then
            FlagPlcConnection = False
        Else
            FlagPlcConnection = True
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If FrmMainLH.FrmLH.WindowState = FormWindowState.Normal Then
            FrmMainLH.FrmLH.WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized
        End If
        If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = PlcConnectionError
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.BackColor = Color.Blue
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.Text = PlcConnectionError
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.BackColor = Color.Red
            srcLbPlcConnectionState.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If PlcConnectionStep = 0 Then
            ConnectPLc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 2
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 2 Then
            If FlagPlcConnection = True Then
                PlcConnectionStep = 3
            Else
                PlcConnectionStep = 0
            End If
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 3 Then
            PlcConnectionError = ""
            ReadPLc()
            PlcConnectionStep = 4
        ElseIf PlcConnectionStep = 4 Then
            If PlcConnectionError <> "" Then
                If PlcConnectionError = "OK" Then
                    PlcConnectionStep = 2
                Else
                    ActPlc.Close()
                    PlcConnectionStep = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub VitualKeyboardToolStripMenuItem_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles VitualKeyboardToolStripMenuItem.Click

        Dim old As Long
        If Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem Then
            If Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(old) Then
                Process.Start(osk)
                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)
            End If
        Else
            Process.Start(osk)
        End If

    End Sub
    Private Function DelSpace(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
            Else
                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
            End If
        Next

        tmp = tmp & Chr(13)
        Return tmp

    End Function

    ' 값 표시 + 판정 공통 함수
    Private Sub DecideControl(
    ByVal valueLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal decisionLabel As System.Windows.Forms.Label,
    ByVal minValue As Double,
    ByVal maxValue As Double,
    ByVal measuredValue As Double,
    Optional ByVal formatString As String = "0.0"
)

        valueLabel.Text = measuredValue.ToString(formatString)

        If measuredValue >= minValue AndAlso measuredValue <= maxValue Then
            decisionLabel.Text = "OK"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            decisionLabel.Text = "NG"
            decisionLabel.BackColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    ' 시간 범위 내에서 Max Amp / Noise 공통 계산
    Private Sub CalcMaxInRange(
    ByVal timeArr() As Double,
    ByVal ampArr() As Double,
    ByVal noiseArr() As Double,
    ByVal count As Integer,
    ByVal rangeStart As Double,
    ByVal rangeEnd As Double,
    ByRef maxAmp As Double,
    ByRef maxNoise As Double)

        maxAmp = 0.0
        maxNoise = 0.0

        For idx As Integer = 0 To count - 1
            Dim t As Double = timeArr(idx)
            If t >= rangeStart AndAlso t <= rangeEnd Then
                If maxAmp < ampArr(idx) Then maxAmp = ampArr(idx)
                If maxNoise < noiseArr(idx) Then maxNoise = noiseArr(idx)
            End If
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskTest()

        Dim i As Int64
        Dim testSw As New Stopwatch
        Dim stats As New TestStats()

        Do

            If wStep = 60 Then

                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, "통풍 전류 그래프", "Current (A)", 0, 2)
                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, "통풍 소음 그래프", "Noise (dB)", 20, 80)

                ErrCount1 = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                IGN_ON()
                RL_VENT_ON()
                wStep = 61

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                If TotalTime1 >= BasicVentTestTime Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("RR_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("RL_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
                    VENT_OFF()
                    wStep = 62
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 62 Then

                ' Vent 구간 Max 계산
                stats.GetMaxInRange(VentDecSecStart,
                                TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd,
                                TmpAmpMAx1,
                                TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentAmp,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcGraphVentNoise,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ' 판정
                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentAmp,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentAmp,
                          BAsicVentAmpMin, BasicVentAMpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValVentNoise,
                          FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecVentNoise,
                          BasicVentNoiseMin, BasicVentNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 63

            ElseIf wStep = 63 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 64

            ElseIf wStep = 64 Then

                If DecideNG() = False Then
                    wStep = 60 '재검
                Else
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 65
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 65 Then

                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(srcGraphVentAmp, "통풍 전류 그래프", "Current (A)", 0, 2)
                ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(srcGraphVentNoise, "통풍 소음 그래프", "Noise (dB)", 20, 80)
                IGN_ON()
                RR_VENT_ON()
                ErrCount1 = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                TmpAmpMAx1 = 0
                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()
                CalcCount1 = 0
                wStep = 66

            ElseIf wStep = 66 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                stats.Push(TotalTime1, ValueAmp1, ValueNoise)

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphVentAmp, 0, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphVentNoise, 0, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                If TotalTime1 >= BasicVentTestTime Then
                    _can.RemoveJob("RR_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("RL_VENT_ON")
                    _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
                    VENT_OFF()
                    wStep = 67
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 67 Then

                stats.GetMaxInRange(VentDecSecStart,
                                TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd,
                                TmpAmpMAx1,
                                TmpNoiseMax1)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphVentAmp,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                ClassZedGraph.AddGuideLines(srcGraphVentNoise,
                  yLines:=New Double() {},
                  xLines:=New Double() {VentDecSecStart, TotalTime1 - VentDecSecEnd},
                  yColor:=Color.DarkGray, xColor:=Color.DarkGray,
                  lineWidth:=2.0F, lineStyle:=Drawing2D.DashStyle.Dash)

                DecideControl(srclbValVentAmp,
                          srclbDecVentAmp,
                          BAsicVentAmpMin, BasicVentAMpMax,
                          TmpAmpMAx1, "0.0")

                DecideControl(srclbValVentNoise,
                          srclbDecVentNoise,
                          BasicVentNoiseMin, BasicVentNoiseMax,
                          TmpNoiseMax1, "0.0")

                ThreadCount = 0
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 68

            ElseIf wStep = 68 Then

                If testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then wStep = 69

            ElseIf wStep = 69 Then

                If DecideNG() = False Then
                    wStep = 65 ' RH blower 재검
                Else
                    wStep = 70
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

            ElseIf wStep = 61 Then

            ElseIf wStep = 100 Then 'Slide 버니싱

                Appendlog($"Burnishing:{NumBurnishing.ToString}")
                Appendlog($"RR FWD")
                RR_FWD()
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 101

            ElseIf wStep = 101 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    Appendlog($"RL FWD")
                    RL_FWD()
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 102
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 102 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 > 1 Then
                        RR_STOP()
                        testSw.Restart()
                        wStep = 103
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 103 Then
                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    RL_STOP()
                    wStep = 104
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 104 Then

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 106

            ElseIf wStep = 106 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then wStep = 107

            ElseIf wStep = 107 Then 'Slide BWD

                Appendlog($"RR BWD")
                RR_BWD()
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 108

            ElseIf wStep = 108 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    Appendlog($"RL BWD")
                    RL_BWD()
                    wStep = 109
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 109 Then ' (old 93.1)

                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 110
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 110 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 > 1 Then
                        RR_STOP()
                        testSw.Restart()
                        wStep = 111
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 111 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    RL_STOP()
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 112
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 112 Then

                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 113

            ElseIf wStep = 113 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    BurnishingCount = BurnishingCount + 1
                    Appendlog($"BurnishingCount:{BurnishingCount.ToString}")
                    wStep = 114
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 114 Then

                If NumBurnishing <= BurnishingCount Then
                    TryLimitCount = 0
                    wStep = 200
                Else
                    wStep = 100
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 200 Then '학습

                TryLimitCount = TryLimitCount + 1
                LimitCheckCount = 0
                SlideLimit()
                testSw.Restart()
                wStep = 201

            ElseIf wStep = 201 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 > 2 Then
                        wStep = 202
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 202 Then

                If ValueAmp1 < 0.3 Then
                    testSw.Restart()
                    wStep = 203
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 203 Then

                TotalTime1 = testSw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 1 Then
                    wStep = 204
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 204 Then

                LimitCheckCount = LimitCheckCount + 1
                boolSlideLimitCheck = False

                        wStep = 207
                    End If

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdNoise,

                DecideControl(FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbValSlideBwdSpeed,

                CanCount = 0
                wStep = 314

            ElseIf wStep = 314 Then

                wStep = 320

                srclbValSlideFwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                RR_FWD()
                ErrCount1 = 0

                wStep = 321

                srclbValSlideFwdTicTime.Text = TotalTime1.ToString("0.0#")

                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then

                srclbValSlideBwdStartPos.Text = srcLaser1.Text
                RR_BWD()

                TmpNoiseMax1 = 0
                stats.Reset()

                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideAmp, 1, TotalTime1, ValueAmp1)
                ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraphSlideNoise, 1, TotalTime1, ValueNoise)

                    ElseIf StopStep = 1 Then

    Private Sub TmrWork_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrWork.Tick

        srcStep1.Text = wStep

        PcAliveCount = PcAliveCount + 1
        If PcAliveCount = 10 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4150", "1")
        ElseIf PcAliveCount = 20 Then
            WritePlc("D", "4150", "0")
            PcAliveCount = 0
        End If

        If PlcValue(4100) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            InitControl()
            InitControlLH()
            For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
            Next
            For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                Do_Off(i)
            Next
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If RstStep = 0 Then

            If wStep = 0 Then
                'wStep = 1
            ElseIf wStep = 1 Then '스캔대기

            ElseIf wStep = 21 Then
                srcAlarm.Visible = True
                wStep = 0

            ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '스캔완료

                If LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                    ' 자동시퀀스 변수 초기화
                    nStep = 0
                    FlagNmlDone = False
                    If tmrNormalTest.Enabled Then tmrNormalTest.Stop()

                    WritePlc("D", "4151", "1") 'LH COMPPLETED
                    WritePlc("D", "4152", "1") 'RH COMPPLETED
                    FlagLog = True
                    ' CAN 로그 버퍼 초기화
                    SyncLock _canLogLock
                        _canLogBuffer.Clear()
                    End SyncLock
                    BufferCanLog("=== 검사 시작 RH=" & srcLbSerial.Text & " LH=" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text & " ===")
                    If FolderCheck(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")) = False Then
                        FolderMake(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" &
                                    Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd"))
                    End If

                    LogTmpFolder = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
                    LogTmpFIlename = "Log_" & "RH_" & srcLbSerial.Text & "_LH_" & FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srcLbSerial.Text
                    If FileCheck(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt") = False Then FileMake(LogTmpFolder, "\" & LogTmpFIlename & ".txt")
                    ' 웹캠 열기
                    _camRetry = 0
                    Try : _webcam.Open() : Catch : End Try
                    wStep = 41
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = False And RhScanCompleted = True Then
                ElseIf LhScanCompleted = True And RhScanCompleted = False Then
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41 Then '사진 촬영

                _camRetry += 1

                If _webcam.HasFrame OrElse _camRetry > 10 Then
                    ' 사진 저장 경로 계산
                    Dim photoRoot As String = PhotoSavePath.Trim()
                    If photoRoot.Length = 1 AndAlso Char.IsLetter(photoRoot(0)) Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & ":\"
                    ElseIf photoRoot.Length = 2 AndAlso photoRoot(1) = ":"c Then
                        photoRoot = photoRoot & "\"
                    End If

                    Dim photoFile As String = ""
                    Dim doSave As Boolean = False
                    If photoRoot = "" OrElse Not Directory.Exists(photoRoot) Then
                        BufferCanLog("※ 사진 저장 경로 없음 - 저장 생략 (" & PhotoSavePath & ")")
                    Else
                        Dim photoDir As String = photoRoot & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd") & "\"
                        photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & ".jpg"
                        If File.Exists(photoFile) Then
                            Dim idx As Integer = 1
                            Do
                                photoFile = photoDir & srcLbSerial.Text & "_" & idx.ToString() & ".jpg"
                                idx += 1
                            Loop While File.Exists(photoFile)
                        End If
                        doSave = True
                    End If

                    srcPicSc.Visible = True
                    If _webcam.HasFrame Then
                        Try
                            If _webcam.Capture(srcPicSc, If(doSave, photoFile, "")) Then
                                If doSave Then
                                    BufferCanLog("사진 저장 완료: " & photoFile)
                                Else
                                    BufferCanLog("사진 촬영 완료 (저장 생략)")
                                End If
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception
                            BufferCanLog("사진 촬영 실패: " & ex.Message)
                        End Try
                    Else
                        BufferCanLog("※ 카메라 미연결 - 사진 촬영 스킵")
                    End If

                    Try : _webcam.Close() : Catch : End Try
                    wStep = 41.1
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 41.1 Then 'PLC 대기

                If PlcValue(4105) = 1 Then
                    LhScanCompleted = False
                    RhScanCompleted = False
                    srcPicSc.Visible = False
                    wStep = 42
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 42 Then

                BufferStepLog("42", "타겟 표시")
                For i As Integer = 0 To 15
                    Do_Off(i)
                Next
                srcSWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUSw
                srcHWTargetRPSU.Text = TargetRPSUHw
                boolSessionStart = False
                wStep = 43

            ElseIf wStep = 43 Then

                CanStart()
                wStep = 44

            ElseIf wStep = 44 Then

                If FlagCanStart = True Then wStep = 45

            ElseIf wStep = 45 Then

                Session_Start()
                wStep = 45.1

            ElseIf wStep = 45.1 Then

                If boolSessionStart = True Then
                    wStep = 45.2
                Else
                    wStep = 45
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 45.2 Then

                Tester_Present()
                wStep = 47

            ElseIf wStep = 47 Then

                strVersion = ""
                Request_SW_Version()
                wStep = 48

            ElseIf wStep = 48 Then

                If strVersion <> "" Then
                    srcSWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                    If strVersion.Contains(srcSWTargetRPSU.Text) Then
                        srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                        srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    Else
                        srcSWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                        srcSWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    End If
                    wStep = 49
                Else
                    wStep = 47
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 49 Then

                strVersion = ""
                Request_HW_Version()
                wStep = 50

            ElseIf wStep = 50 Then

                If strVersion <> "" Then
                    srcHWValRPSU2.Text = strVersion
                    If strVersion.Contains(srcHWTargetRPSU.Text) Then
                        srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "OK"
                        srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    Else
                        srcHWDecRPSU.Text = "NG"
                        srcHWDecRPSU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    End If
                    wStep = 51
                Else
                    wStep = 49
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 51 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4153", "1") '블로워 검사 준비
                wStep = 52

            ElseIf wStep = 52 Then

                If PlcValue(4101) = 1 Then '블로워 검사 시작해라
                    BufferStepLog("60", "블로워 검사 시작")
                    wStep = 60
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 60 Then


            ElseIf wStep = 70 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4154", "1") '블로워 검사 완료
                wStep = 90

            ElseIf wStep = 90 Then

                WritePlc("D", "4155", "1") '슬라이드 검사 준비
                wStep = 91

            ElseIf wStep = 91 Then

                If PlcValue(4102) = 1 Then '슬라이드 검사 시작해라
                    BufferStepLog("91", "슬라이드 검사 시작")
                    BurnishingCount = 0
                    nStep = 10
                    FlagNmlDone = False
                    tmrNormalTest.Start()
                    AppendWorkLog("[HEV] 자동 시퀀스 시작 (nStep=10)")
                    wStep = 3000
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 3000 Then '자동 시퀀스 완료 대기
                If FlagNmlDone Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[HEV] 자동 시퀀스 완료")
                    wStep = 400
                End If

            ElseIf wStep = 400 Then '슬라이드 검사 완료

                WritePlc("D", "4156", "1") '슬라이드 검사 완료
                wStep = 500
                TmrCOunt = 0

            ElseIf wStep = 500 Then

                wStep = 1000

            ElseIf wStep = 1000 Then '파워 검사 완료

                If DecideTestLH() = True Then
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Else
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If

                If DecideTestRH() = True Then
                    srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK"
                    srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Else
                    srclbTotalDecision.Text = "NG"
                    srclbTotalDecision.BackColor = Color.Red
                End If

                wStep = 1001

            ElseIf wStep = 1001 Then
                _can.RemoveJob("RL_Tester")
                WritePlc("D", "4156", "1") '슬라이드 검사 완료
                TmrCOunt = 0
                '_can.close
                FlagLog = False
                wStep = 1002

            ElseIf wStep = 1002 Then '완료

                TmrCOunt = TmrCOunt + 0.1
                If TmrCOunt >= 1 Then
                    WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", $"RH판정={srclbTotalDecision.Text}, LH판정={FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text}")
                    If srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK" Then
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "RH 바코드 출력 시작")
                        BarcodePrintRH_ethernet()
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "RH 바코드 출력 완료")
                    Else
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "RH NG → 바코드 스킵")
                    End If
                    SaveDBRH(TmpEndSerial)
                    SaveDBRH_Local(TmpEndSerial)
                    If FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbTotalDecision.Text = "OK" Then
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "LH 바코드 출력 시작")
                        BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "LH 바코드 출력 완료")
                    Else
                        WriteErrorLog("wStep1002", "LH NG → 바코드 스킵")
                    End If
                    SaveDBLH(TmpEndSerial)
                    SaveDBLH_Local(TmpEndSerial)
                    BufferStepLog("1002", "검사 완료 - 데이터 저장")
                    FlushCanLog()
                    For i As Integer = 1 To 9
                        WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
                    Next
                    wStep = 0
                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Public Function Bin2Dec(ByVal value As String) As Integer

        Dim bin(7) As Integer
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As Integer
        Dim total As Integer

        ' 올바른 형식의 String인지 확인
        For i = 1 To value.Length
            total = total + (CInt(Mid(value, i, 1)) * (2 ^ (value.Length - i)))
        Next
        Bin2Dec = total
        Return Bin2Dec

    End Function

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            ' 버퍼 오버플로우(-200279) 등 에러 시 조용히 종료
            runningTask = Nothing
            Try
                If myTask IsNot Nothing Then
                    myTask.Stop()
                    myTask.Dispose()
                    myTask = Nothing
                End If
            Catch
            End Try
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueLaser1 As Double
    Private ValueLaser2 As Double

    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim maxSamples As Integer = 10

        ' 채널별 합/카운트 배열 (0: Ch1, 1: Ch2, 2: Ch3)
        Dim chSum(2) As Double
        Dim chCount(2) As Integer

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            If currentLineIndex > 2 Then
                Exit For ' 3채널까지만 사용
            End If

            Dim available As Integer = waveform.Samples.Count
            Dim dataCount As Integer = Math.Min(available, maxSamples)

            For sample As Integer = 0 To dataCount - 1
                ' DataTable 크기 체크는 호출부에서 맞춰놨다고 가정
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value

                chSum(currentLineIndex) += waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                chCount(currentLineIndex) += 1
            Next

            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next

        ' 0으로 나누기 방지
        Dim ch1Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch2Avg As Double = 0.0
        Dim ch3Avg As Double = 0.0

        If chCount(0) > 0 Then ch1Avg = chSum(0) / chCount(0)
        If chCount(1) > 0 Then ch2Avg = chSum(1) / chCount(1)
        If chCount(2) > 0 Then ch3Avg = chSum(2) / chCount(2)

        ' 기존 로직 유지 + 포맷은 Math.Round로 대체
        ValueNoise = Math.Round(ch1Avg * 100.0, 1) + MicroPhone_Tol
        ValueLaser1 = Math.Round(ch2Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1)
        ValueLaser2 = Math.Round(ch3Avg * 50.0 + 50.0, 1) ' ★ 원래 Ch2로 되어 있던 부분 수정 제안

        srcNoise.Text = ValueNoise.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser1.Text = ValueLaser1.ToString("0.00")
        srcLaser2.Text = ValueLaser2.ToString("0.00")

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai0", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai1", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai2", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)

                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)

                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
            Catch exception As DaqException
                Debug.WriteLine("[DAQ] DaqStart 에러: " & exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                Try : myTask.Dispose() : Catch : End Try
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        Try
            runningTask = Nothing
            If myTask IsNot Nothing Then
                myTask.Stop()
                myTask.Dispose()
                myTask = Nothing
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' DAQ 종료 시 에러 무시
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private boolSlideLimitCheck As Boolean
    Private RoutineResponse As String
    Private LimitCheckCount As Integer
    Private TryLimitCount As Integer
    Private Sub Appendlog(msg As String)

        ' 자동 시퀀스 중 raw CAN 로그 억제
        If tmrNormalTest.Enabled Then Return

        If msg.Contains("0x17FC009D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x17FC00AB ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x25D ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30C ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x316 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x317 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3E9 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x3EA ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51A ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x51B ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x1 ") Then Exit Sub
        If msg.Contains("0x30D ") Then Exit Sub

        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            ' ★ 비동기: UI가 바쁠 땐 큐에만 넣고 즉시 리턴 -> 수신 스레드가 안 막힘
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() Appendlog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        ' CAN 로그 버퍼에 TX/RX 기록
        If FlagLog AndAlso (msg.Contains("TX") OrElse msg.Contains("RX")) Then
            BufferCanLog(msg & " [A=" & ValueAmp1.ToString("0.00") & "]")
        End If

        ' 실제 UI 업데이트
        TextBox1.AppendText(msg & Environment.NewLine)
        '           TX ID = 0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00
        '[09:36:17] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=472156126477

        '[13:04:32] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00 TS=778999624569

        If msg.Contains("0x739") And msg.Contains("10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00") Then
            boolSlideLimitCheck = True
            RoutineResponse = "0x739 - 10 19 71 01 12 A7 02 00"
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("****************************************** 학습 완료 ****************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
            TextBox1.AppendText("*********************************************************************************************" & Environment.NewLine)
        End If
    End Sub


    Private Sub OnCanLog(ByVal line As String)
        ' CAN raw 로그는 Appendlog로 (TextBox1 출력)
        Appendlog(line)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>동작 로그 (TextBox1에 시간+메시지 출력, CAN 신호와 구분)</summary>
    Private Sub AppendWorkLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If Me.IsDisposed Then Return
        If Me.InvokeRequired Then
            Me.BeginInvoke(CType(Sub() AppendWorkLog(msg), MethodInvoker))
            Return
        End If
        Dim line As String = $"[{Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")}] {msg}"
        TextBox1.AppendText(line & Environment.NewLine)
        BufferCanLog("[WORK] " & line)
    End Sub

    Private FlagCanEnabled As Boolean = False
    Private FlagCanStart As Boolean = False

    Private _can As CanBusService
    Private Sub CanStart()
        Try
            ' 기존 연결 끊기
            If FlagCanStart Then CanStop()

            _can = New CanBusService(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, True)

            AddHandler _can.Log, Sub(s)
                                     Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog(s))) : Catch : End Try
                                 End Sub
            AddHandler _can.[Error], Sub(st)
                                         Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() Appendlog("[ERR] " & st))) : Catch : End Try
                                     End Sub
            AddHandler _can.FrameDecoded, Sub(id, data)
                                              Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnFrameDecoded(id, data))) : Catch : End Try
                                          End Sub
            AddHandler _can.UdsCompleted, Sub(respId, uds)
                                              Try : BeginInvoke(New Action(Sub() OnUdsCompleted(respId, uds))) : Catch : End Try
                                          End Sub

            If _can.Init() = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                FlagCanEnabled = True
                _can.StartPolling()
                FlagCanStart = True
            Else
                FlagCanEnabled = False
            End If

            _can.LogAllRawRxFrames = True
            _can.LogAllRawTxFrames = True
            _can.LogVerboseInternalState = True
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("[CAN] CanStart 에러: " & ex.Message)
            FlagCanStart = False
            FlagCanEnabled = False
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanStop()
        Try
            If FlagCanStart Then
                _can.Dispose()
                FlagCanStart = False
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            Debug.WriteLine("[CAN] CanStop 에러: " & ex.Message)
            FlagCanStart = False
        End Try
    End Sub
    Private Sub OnFrameDecoded(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", data.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        Select Case id
            Case &H3C3 ' 0x3C3
                'Parse_0x3C3(data)
            Case Else
                ' Do nothing
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private FlagGetUdsFrame As Boolean = False
    Private strVersion As String = ""

    Private boolSessionStart As Boolean = False
    Private boolUds As Boolean = False
    Private Sub OnUdsCompleted(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
        If uds Is Nothing Then Return
        Dim hex As String = String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2")))

        ' VB.NET 14 (VS 2015) 이상에서 $ 문자열 보간 지원
        Appendlog($"[OnUds] RX ID=0x{respId:X3} DATA={hex}")
        boolUds = True
        If hex.Contains("50 03 00 32 01 F4") Then
            boolSessionStart = True
        End If

        ' Scheduler started.
        '[01:07:21] TX ID=0x731 DLC=8 BRS DATA=02 10 03 00 00 00 00 00
        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[01:07:21] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=131168785188
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        'Job removed: RL_Session
        '[00:13:31] RX ID=0x739 DLC=8 BRS DATA=06 50 03 00 32 01 F4 AA TS=127938464591
        '[OnUds] RX ID=0x739 DATA=50 03 00 32 01 F4
        '[uds] 50 03 00 32 01 F4

        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then ' 0x62
            Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2") ' C#의 +를 &로 변경
            Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E) ' 0x20, 0x7E

            ' C#의 ?: 삼항 연산자를 VB.NET의 If() 함수로 변경
            Dim val As String = If(ascii,
                             Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                             String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            strVersion = val
            FlagGetUdsFrame = True

        End If

        ' RDBI HW 버전 응답 (DID F193)
        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 AndAlso uds(1) = &HF1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H93 Then
            Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
            Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
            strHwVersion = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload),
                           String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
        End If

        ' RoutineControl 응답 (71 01/03) — 학습체크 결과
        If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H71 Then
            Dim subFunc As Byte = uds(1)
            If subFunc = &H1 AndAlso uds(2) = &H12 AndAlso (uds(3) = &HA6 OrElse uds(3) = &HA7) Then
                If uds.Length >= 5 Then
                    If uds(4) = &H2 Then
                        _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK"
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 학습체크 OK (71 01 응답)")
                    ElseIf uds(4) = &H1 Then
                        _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG"
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 학습체크 NG (71 01 응답)")
                    Else
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] EDU 응답 수신 (결과={uds(4):X2})")
                    End If
                End If
            End If
            If subFunc = &H3 AndAlso uds.Length >= 4 Then
                Dim routineId = (CInt(uds(2)) << 8) Or CInt(uds(3))
                If uds.Length >= 5 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = If(uds(4) = &H0, "OK", "NG")
                Else
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = "OK"
                End If
            End If
        End If

        ' DTC Clear 응답 (54)
        If uds.Length >= 1 AndAlso uds(0) = &H54 Then
            AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear 긍정 응답")
            _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK"
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub StartExtendedSession()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731

        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=2
        ' SID = 0x10 (Diagnostic Session Control)
        ' Sub-function = 0x03 (Extended Diagnostic Session)
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Start Extended Session-{id}", id,
            &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

    Private Sub Request_Security_Seed()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=2
        ' SID = 0x27 (Security Access)
        ' Sub-function = 0x01 (Request Seed - Level 1)
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request Security Seed-{id}", id,
            &H2, &H27, &H1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

    Private Sub Request_SW_Version()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=3
        ' SID = 0x22 (RDBI)
        ' DID = 0xF1A6
        ' 나머지는 CAN 프레임 8바이트 패딩
        Appendlog("Request SW Version")
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request SW Version-{id}", id, &H3, &H22, &HF1, &HB1, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
        '0x03, 0x22, 0xF1, 0x91, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00
        '0x03, 0x22, 0xF1, 0x91, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00
        '03 22 F1 B1 00 00 00 00
    End Sub
    Private Sub Request_HW_Version()
        Dim id As UInteger = &H731
        ' UDS SF (Single Frame), Length=3
        ' SID = 0x22 (RDBI)
        ' DID = 0xF1A2
        ' 나머지는 CAN 프레임 8바이트 패딩
        Appendlog("Request HW Version")
        _can.AddJobOnce($"Request HW Version-{id}", id,
            &H3, &H22, &HF1, &H93, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)

        'HW 버전:   03 22 F1 93 00 00 00 00

    End Sub

    Private Function BytesToHex(ByVal data() As Byte) As String
        Dim sb As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To data.Length - 1
            sb.AppendFormat("{0:X2}", data(i))
        Next
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function

    Private Sub IGN_ON()

#Region "CAN 로그 버퍼링"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' CAN 로그 버퍼에 한 줄 추가 (스레드 안전)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub BufferCanLog(ByVal msg As String)
        If Not FlagLog Then Return
        Dim line As String = "[" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss.fff") & "] " & msg
        SyncLock _canLogLock
            _canLogBuffer.Add(line)
        End SyncLock
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 스텝 전환 로그 (전류/소음 포함)
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub BufferStepLog(ByVal stepName As String, ByVal comment As String)
        BufferCanLog("--- STEP " & stepName & ": " & comment & " (전류=" & ValueAmp1.ToString("0.00") & "A, 소음=" & ValueNoise.ToString("0.0") & "dB) ---")
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 버퍼 내용을 파일로 저장
    ''' </summary>
    Private Sub FlushCanLog()
        Dim lines() As String
        SyncLock _canLogLock
            If _canLogBuffer.Count = 0 Then Return
            lines = _canLogBuffer.ToArray()
            _canLogBuffer.Clear()
        End SyncLock

        Try
            Dim baseDir As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory
            Dim dateDir As String = baseDir & "CAN_RAW\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
            If Not Directory.Exists(dateDir) Then Directory.CreateDirectory(dateDir)

            Dim serial As String = srcLbSerial.Text
            If serial = "" Then serial = "UNKNOWN"
            Dim timeStr As String = Format(Now, "HHmmss")
            Dim filePath As String = dateDir & "\" & serial & "_" & timeStr & ".txt"

            File.WriteAllLines(filePath, lines, Encoding.UTF8)
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' 로그 저장 실패 시 무시
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

    ' =========================================================
    '  ICE/HEV 전용 함수: 레스트 모드 / IGN 제어
    ' =========================================================

    ''' <summary>ICE 0x3DB 레스트 모드 32byte 데이터 생성</summary>
    Private Function BuildRestData(ByVal rlValue As Byte, ByVal rrValue As Byte) As Byte()
        Dim data(31) As Byte
        ' RL (bit 144-149): byte[18] bits 0-5
        ' RR (bit 150-155): byte[18] bits 6-7 + byte[19] bits 0-3
        data(18) = CByte((rlValue And &H3F) Or ((rrValue And &H3) << 6))
        data(19) = CByte((rrValue >> 2) And &HF)
        Return data
    End Function

    ''' <summary>ICE 레스트 모드 송신 (0x3DB, 200ms 주기)</summary>
    Private Sub IceRestMode(ByVal rlVal As Byte, ByVal rrVal As Byte)
        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
        Dim d = BuildRestData(rlVal, rrVal)
        _can.AddJob32("REST_MODE", &H3DB, 200,
                      d(0), d(1), d(2), d(3), d(4), d(5), d(6), d(7),
                      d(8), d(9), d(10), d(11), d(12), d(13), d(14), d(15),
                      d(16), d(17), d(18), d(19), d(20), d(21), d(22), d(23),
                      d(24), d(25), d(26), d(27), d(28), d(29), d(30), d(31))
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>ICE 레스트 모드 OFF (0x3DB 주기 송신 중지 + 0 전송)</summary>
    Private Sub IceRestOff()
        _can.RemoveJob("REST_MODE")
        _can.AddJobOnce32("REST_OFF", &H3DB,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                          &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>ICE IGN OFF (0x3D1, BCM_Ign1InSta=0, BCM_Ign2InSta=0)</summary>
    Private Sub IceIgnOff()
        _can.RemoveJob("IGN")
        _can.AddJob32("IGN", &H3D1, 200, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H5, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                                         &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                                         &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0,
                                         &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
    End Sub

    ' =========================================================
    '  HEV 자동검사 시퀀스 (tmrNormalTest)
    '  ICE 프로젝트에서 이식, STD 분기 제거
    ' =========================================================

    Private Sub tmrNormalTest_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles tmrNormalTest.Tick

        Try

            ' ─── nStep 10-19: 버니싱 ───
            If nStep = 10 Then
                If NumBurnishing = 0 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 버니싱 건너뜀 (NumBurnishing=0)")
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 19
                Else
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 버니싱 FWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    RL_FWD() ' LH 먼저 전송
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 11
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 11 Then
                ' FWD LH 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH FWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A) → 0.3초 후 RH 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 111 ' RH 딜레이 대기
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    ' 0.5초 내 전류 없으면 LH 재전송
                    RL_FWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH FWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH FWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 13
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 111 Then
                ' 0.3초 딜레이 후 RH FWD 전송
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.3 Then
                    RR_FWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH FWD 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 112
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 112 Then
                ' RH FWD 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 2 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH FWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 12
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    RR_FWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH FWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH FWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 12
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 12 Then
                ' FWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        RL_STOP() : RR_STOP()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 13
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 13 Then
                ' 1초 대기
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then nStep = 14

            ElseIf nStep = 14 Then
                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 버니싱 BWD ({BurnishingCount + 1}/{NumBurnishing})")
                RL_BWD() ' LH 먼저 전송
                CalcCount1 = 0
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 15

            ElseIf nStep = 15 Then
                ' BWD LH 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH BWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A) → 0.3초 후 RH 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 151
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    RL_BWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] LH BWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] LH BWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 17
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 151 Then
                ' 0.3초 딜레이 후 RH BWD 전송
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 0.3 Then
                    RR_BWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH BWD 전송")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 152
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 152 Then
                ' RH BWD 시작 대기
                If ValueAmp1 > 2 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH BWD 시작 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 16
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    RR_BWD()
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RH BWD 재전송 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 10 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] RH BWD 타임아웃")
                    nStep = 16
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 16 Then
                ' BWD 끝 정지 감지 (CalcCount>=5)
                TotalTime1 = nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds
                If TotalTime1 > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.32 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        RL_STOP() : RR_STOP()
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 17
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 17 Then
                ' 1초 대기 후 카운트 증가
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    BurnishingCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 버니싱 완료 ({BurnishingCount}/{NumBurnishing})")
                    If BurnishingCount < NumBurnishing Then
                        nStep = 10
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 19
                    End If
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 19 Then
                ' 리미트 세팅 전 대기 + 세션 시작
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    ' Extended Session + Tester Present 시작 (RoutineControl에 필수)
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] Extended Session 시작 (0x10 03)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 191
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 191 Then
                ' 세션 응답 대기 (1초)
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 세션 준비 완료 → 리미트 세팅 시작")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 20
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 20-24: 리미트 세팅 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 20 Then
                nStepTime.Restart()
                ' ICE: 리미트 세팅 1회 전송 (12A7, 0x40)
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 1차 리미트 세팅 시작 (12A7 전송)")
                _can.AddJobOnce("LimitSet", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H40, &H0, &H0)
                nStep = 21

            ElseIf nStep = 21 Then
                ' 전류 변화 감지 — 0.5초 내 전류 > 1A 없으면 재전송
                If ValueAmp1 > 1.0 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 전류 감지 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                    CalcCount1 = 0
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 23 ' 완료 대기
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 0.5 Then
                    CalcCount1 += 1
                    If CalcCount1 Mod 5 = 0 Then
                        ' 5회 재전송마다 전원 차단 + CAN 재접속
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 {CalcCount1}회 무응답 → 전원차단+재접속")
                        CanStop()
                        _savedTargetVolt = TargetVolt
                        TargetVolt = 0
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 211 ' 전원 복원 대기
                    Else
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 재전송 ({CalcCount1}회, Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                        _can.AddJobOnce("LimitSet", &H731, &H5, &H31, &H1, &H12, &HA7, &H40, &H0, &H0)
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                    End If
                End If
                If CalcCount1 > 60 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, 재전송={CalcCount1}회)")
                    TargetVolt = _savedTargetVolt
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 211 Then
                ' 전원 차단 1초 → 복원 → CAN 재접속 → 세션 → 리미트 재전송
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    TargetVolt = _savedTargetVolt
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 전원 복원 → CAN 재접속")
                    Thread.Sleep(500)
                    CanStart()
                    _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 191 ' 세션 대기 → nStep 20 → 리미트 재전송
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 23 Then
                ' 모터 정지 대기 (전류 < 0.3A = 완료)
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    If ValueAmp1 < 0.3 Then
                        CalcCount1 += 1
                    Else
                        CalcCount1 = 0
                    End If
                    If CalcCount1 >= 5 Then
                        AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 1차 리미트 세팅 완료 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A, {nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds:F1}초)")
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 25
                    End If
                End If
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 60 Then
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 리미트 세팅 타임아웃 (Amp={ValueAmp1:F2}A)")
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDU.BackColor = Color.Red
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 25-33: 학습체크 (12A7) ───
            ElseIf nStep = 25 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    ' CAN 재접속 → 세션 → 학습체크
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 1차 학습체크 전 CAN 재접속")
                    CanStop()
                    Thread.Sleep(500)
                    CanStart()
                    _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 251
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 251 Then
                ' 세션 응답 대기 (1초) → 12A7로 학습체크
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds >= 1 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                    _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                    nStep = 31
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 31 Then
                ' 학습체크 요청 (31 01 12 A7 F0)
                _nmlEduCheckResult = ""
                AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] RPSU 학습체크 요청 (시도 {_nmlEduCheckCount + 1}/3)")

                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 RPSU 학습체크 OK")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf _nmlEduCheckResult = "NG" Then
                    srclbDecEcuEDUFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDecEcuEDUFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.Text = "NG"
                    FrmMainLH.FrmLH.srclbDecEcuEDULHFINAL.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 학습체크 NG")
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 90
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 2 Then
                    _nmlEduCheckCount += 1
                    AppendWorkLog($"[ICE] 2차 학습체크 응답 없음 ({_nmlEduCheckCount}/3)")
                    If _nmlEduCheckCount >= 3 Then
                        ' CAN 재접속 → 세션 → 재시도
                        AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 2차 학습체크 응답 없음 → CAN 재접속")
                        CanStop()
                        Thread.Sleep(500)
                        CanStart()
                        _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                        AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 세션 재시작 → 2차 학습체크 재시도")
                        _nmlEduCheckCount = 0
                        nStepTime.Restart()
                        nStep = 701 ' 세션 대기 후 nStep 74로
                    Else
                        nStep = 74
                    End If
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 90-91: DTC 클리어 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 90 Then
                ' DTC 클리어 전 CAN 재접속
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC 클리어 전 CAN 재접속")
                CanStop()
                Thread.Sleep(500)
                CanStart()
                _can.AddJobOnce("SESSION", &H731, &H2, &H10, &H3, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                _can.AddJob("TP", &H731, 2000, &H2, &H3E, &H80, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                nStepTime.Restart()
                nStep = 901

            ElseIf nStep = 901 Then
                If nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 1 Then
                    _nmlDtcClearResult = ""
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear ALL (0x7DF)")
                    _can.AddJobOnce("DTC_ALL", &H7DF, &H4, &H14, &HFF, &HFF, &HFF, &H0, &H0, &H0)
                    nStepTime.Restart()
                    nStep = 91
                End If

            ElseIf nStep = 91 Then
                If _nmlDtcClearResult = "OK" Then
                    srclbDtcClear.Text = "OK"
                    srclbDtcClear.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear OK")
                    nStep = 99
                ElseIf nStepTime.Elapsed.TotalSeconds > 3 Then
                    srclbDtcClear.Text = "NG"
                    srclbDtcClear.BackColor = Color.Red
                    AppendWorkLog("[ICE] DTC Clear NG (타임아웃)")
                    nStep = 99
                End If

                ' ─── nStep 99: 완료 ───
            ElseIf nStep = 99 Then
                _can.RemoveJob("TP")
                CanStop()
                AppendWorkLog("[ICE] 전체 시퀀스 완료")
                FlagNmlDone = True
                nStep = 0
                tmrNormalTest.Stop()

            End If

        Catch ex As Exception
            AppendWorkLog("[ICE 예외] " & ex.Message)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Label103_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Label103.Click
        BarcodePrintRH_ethernet()
        BarcodePrintLH_ethernet()

    End Sub
End Class

#Region "Table_Basic2 (사진 경로)"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Table_Basic2 없으면 생성 + PhotoSavePath 컬럼 보장
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub EnsureBasic2Table()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute(
                    "CREATE TABLE Table_Basic2 (" &
                    "ID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, " &
                    "PhotoSavePath TEXT(255))")
            Catch
                ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            End Try
            ' PhotoSavePath 컬럼 없으면 추가
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PhotoSavePath TEXT(255)")
            Catch
            End Try
            ' 레코드 없으면 1건 INSERT
            Dim rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            Dim cnt As Integer = CInt(rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            rs.Close()
            If cnt = 0 Then
                MdbConnect.Execute("INSERT INTO Table_Basic2 (PhotoSavePath) VALUES ('')")
            End If
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("EnsureBasic2Table", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Dim v As Object
                v = Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value : PhotoSavePath = If(IsDBNull(v), "", CStr(v))
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("LoadBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub SaveBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value = CStr(PhotoSavePath)
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SaveBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
        Dim strReturn As String = ""
        Try
            Dim hexv As String, na As Long

            hexv = ""
            Do While DecNum > 0
                na = DecNum Mod 16
                Select Case na
                    Case 10
                        hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 11
                        hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 12
                        hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 13
                        hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 14
                        hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 15
                        hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case Else
                        hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
                End Select
                If DecNum >= 16 Then
                    DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
                Else
                    hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                    Exit Do
                End If
            Loop

            If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
                strReturn = Mid(hexv, 2)
            Else
                strReturn = hexv
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            'RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
        End Try
        Dec2Hex = strReturn

    End Function
