    Public Function Hex2Dec(ByVal HexNum As String) As Double

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim DecNum As Double
        Dim getHex As String

        getHex = "0123456789ABCDEF"

        For i = 1 To Len(HexNum)
            If InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) > 0 Then
                DecNum = (DecNum * 16) + InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) - 1
            Else
                'MsgBox("16진수 값이 아닙니다.")
            End If
        Next i

        Hex2Dec = DecNum

    End Function


    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Function FolderCheck(ByVal folder As String) As Boolean
        Try
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        End Try
    End Function

    Function FileCheck(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String) As Boolean
        Return System.IO.File.Exists(folder & "\" & file)
    End Function

    Sub FolderMake(ByVal folder As String)
        Try
            System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileWrite(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String, ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Using f As New StreamWriter(folder & "\" & file, True)
                f.WriteLine(str)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileMake(ByVal folder As String, ByVal File As String)
        Try
            System.IO.File.Create(folder & "\" & File)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Class TestStats
        Private ReadOnly _times As New List(Of Double)
        Private ReadOnly _amps As New List(Of Double)
        Private ReadOnly _noises As New List(Of Double)

        Public Sub Reset()
            _times.Clear()
            _amps.Clear()
            _noises.Clear()
        End Sub

        Public Sub Push(t As Double, amp As Double, noise As Double)
            ' 필요하면 여기서 개수 제한 걸고 싶을 때만 오래된 데이터 제거하면 됨
            ' 예) If _times.Count > 1000 Then ... 같은 식
            _times.Add(t)
            _amps.Add(amp)
            _noises.Add(noise)
        End Sub

        Public Sub GetMaxInRange(startTime As Double,
                             endTime As Double,
                             ByRef maxAmp As Double,
                             ByRef maxNoise As Double)

            maxAmp = 0.0
            maxNoise = 0.0

            For i As Integer = 0 To _times.Count - 1
                Dim t = _times(i)
                If t >= startTime AndAlso t <= endTime Then
                    If _amps(i) > maxAmp Then maxAmp = _amps(i)
                    If _noises(i) > maxNoise Then maxNoise = _noises(i)
                End If
            Next
        End Sub
    End Class

#Region "SQLite 로컬 DB"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite DB 초기화 - 프로그램 시작 시 호출
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InitLocalDB()
        Try
            ' db 폴더 생성
            Dim dbFolder As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(SqliteDbPath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(dbFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(dbFolder)
            End If

            ' DB 파일이 없으면 생성
            If Not File.Exists(SqliteDbPath) Then
                SQLiteConnection.CreateFile(SqliteDbPath)
            End If

            ' 연결 및 테이블 생성
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TestResult (" &
                "Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT," &
                "Side TEXT," &
                "LineSerial TEXT," &
                "EndSerial TEXT," &
                "TestDate TEXT," &
                "TestTime TEXT," &
                "TestFwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestFwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestFwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestFwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestBwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestBwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestBwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestBwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestDecision TEXT," &
                "TestFwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestBwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestVentAmp TEXT," &
                "TestVentNoise TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckLH TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckRH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgLH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgRH TEXT," &
                "CreatedAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime'))" &
                ")"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            ' 기존 DB에 PartNO 컬럼이 없으면 추가
            Try
                Using cmd2 As New SQLiteCommand("ALTER TABLE TestResult ADD COLUMN PartNO TEXT", SqliteConn)
                    cmd2.ExecuteNonQuery()
                End Using
            Catch
                ' 이미 컬럼이 있으면 무시
            End Try

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InitLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite에 INSERT (LH/RH 공통)
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InsertLocalDB(side As String, partNo As String, lineSerial As String, endSerial As String,
                             testDate As String, testTime As String,
                             fwdAmp As String, fwdNoise As String, fwdSpeed As String,
                             fwdStartPos As String, fwdEndPos As String, fwdTime As String,
                             bwdAmp As String, bwdNoise As String, bwdSpeed As String,
                             bwdStartPos As String, bwdEndPos As String, bwdTime As String,
                             decision As String, fwdLength As String, bwdLength As String,
                             ventAmp As String, ventNoise As String,
                             limitCheckLH As String, limitCheckRH As String,
                             limitMsgLH As String, limitMsgRH As String)
        Try
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "INSERT INTO TestResult " &
                "(Side, PartNO, LineSerial, EndSerial, TestDate, TestTime, " &
                "TestFwdAmp, TestFwdNoise, TestFwdSpeed, TestFwdStartPos, TestFwdEndPos, TestFwdTime, " &
                "TestBwdAmp, TestBwdNoise, TestBwdSpeed, TestBwdStartPos, TestBwdEndPos, TestBwdTime, " &
                "TestDecision, TestFwdLength, TestBwdLength, TestVentAmp, TestVentNoise, " &
                "TestLimitCheckLH, TestLimitCheckRH, LimitCheckMsgLH, LimitCheckMsgRH) " &
                "VALUES " &
                "(@Side, @PartNO, @LineSerial, @EndSerial, @TestDate, @TestTime, " &
                "@FwdAmp, @FwdNoise, @FwdSpeed, @FwdStartPos, @FwdEndPos, @FwdTime, " &
                "@BwdAmp, @BwdNoise, @BwdSpeed, @BwdStartPos, @BwdEndPos, @BwdTime, " &
                "@Decision, @FwdLength, @BwdLength, @VentAmp, @VentNoise, " &
                "@LimitCheckLH, @LimitCheckRH, @LimitMsgLH, @LimitMsgRH)"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Side", side)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@PartNO", partNo)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LineSerial", lineSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@EndSerial", endSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestDate", testDate)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestTime", testTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdAmp", fwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdNoise", fwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdSpeed", fwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdStartPos", fwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdEndPos", fwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdTime", fwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdAmp", bwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdNoise", bwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdSpeed", bwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdStartPos", bwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdEndPos", bwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdTime", bwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Decision", decision)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdLength", fwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdLength", bwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentAmp", ventAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentNoise", ventNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckLH", limitCheckLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckRH", limitCheckRH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgLH", limitMsgLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgRH", limitMsgRH)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InsertLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 에러 로그 작성
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub WriteErrorLog(funcName As String, errMsg As String)
        Try
            Dim logFolder As String = Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "Log", "Error")
            If Not Directory.Exists(logFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(logFolder)
            End If
            Dim logFile As String = Path.Combine(logFolder, Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & ".log")
            Using sw As New StreamWriter(logFile, True)
                sw.WriteLine($"[{Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")}] {funcName}: {errMsg}")
            End Using
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

#Region "Table_Basic2 (사진 경로)"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Table_Basic2 없으면 생성 + PhotoSavePath 컬럼 보장
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub EnsureBasic2Table()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute(
                    "CREATE TABLE Table_Basic2 (" &
                    "ID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, " &
                    "PhotoSavePath TEXT(255))")
            Catch
                ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            End Try
            ' PhotoSavePath 컬럼 없으면 추가
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PhotoSavePath TEXT(255)")
            Catch
            End Try
            ' 레코드 없으면 1건 INSERT
            Dim rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            Dim cnt As Integer = CInt(rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            rs.Close()
            If cnt = 0 Then
                MdbConnect.Execute("INSERT INTO Table_Basic2 (PhotoSavePath) VALUES ('')")
            End If
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("EnsureBasic2Table", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Dim v As Object
                v = Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value : PhotoSavePath = If(IsDBNull(v), "", CStr(v))
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("LoadBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub SaveBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value = CStr(PhotoSavePath)
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SaveBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
        Dim strReturn As String = ""
        Try
            Dim hexv As String, na As Long

            hexv = ""
            Do While DecNum > 0
                na = DecNum Mod 16
                Select Case na
                    Case 10
                        hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 11
                        hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 12
                        hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 13
                        hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 14
                        hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 15
                        hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case Else
                        hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
                End Select
                If DecNum >= 16 Then
                    DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
                Else
                    hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                    Exit Do
                End If
            Loop

            If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
                strReturn = Mid(hexv, 2)
            Else
                strReturn = hexv
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            'RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
        End Try
        Dec2Hex = strReturn

    End Function

    Public Function Hex2Dec(ByVal HexNum As String) As Double

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim DecNum As Double
        Dim getHex As String

        getHex = "0123456789ABCDEF"

        For i = 1 To Len(HexNum)
            If InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) > 0 Then
                DecNum = (DecNum * 16) + InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) - 1
            Else
                'MsgBox("16진수 값이 아닙니다.")
            End If
        Next i

        Hex2Dec = DecNum

    End Function


    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Function FolderCheck(ByVal folder As String) As Boolean
        Try
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        End Try
    End Function

    Function FileCheck(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String) As Boolean
        Return System.IO.File.Exists(folder & "\" & file)
    End Function

    Sub FolderMake(ByVal folder As String)
        Try
            System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileWrite(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String, ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Using f As New StreamWriter(folder & "\" & file, True)
                f.WriteLine(str)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileMake(ByVal folder As String, ByVal File As String)

            System.IO.File.Create(folder & "\" & File)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Class TestStats
        Private ReadOnly _times As New List(Of Double)
        Private ReadOnly _amps As New List(Of Double)
        Private ReadOnly _noises As New List(Of Double)

        Public Sub Reset()
            _times.Clear()
            _amps.Clear()
            _noises.Clear()
        End Sub

        Public Sub Push(t As Double, amp As Double, noise As Double)
            ' 필요하면 여기서 개수 제한 걸고 싶을 때만 오래된 데이터 제거하면 됨
            ' 예) If _times.Count > 1000 Then ... 같은 식
            _times.Add(t)
            _amps.Add(amp)
            _noises.Add(noise)
        End Sub

        Public Sub GetMaxInRange(startTime As Double,
                             endTime As Double,
                             ByRef maxAmp As Double,
                             ByRef maxNoise As Double)

            maxAmp = 0.0
            maxNoise = 0.0

            For i As Integer = 0 To _times.Count - 1
                Dim t = _times(i)
                If t >= startTime AndAlso t <= endTime Then
                    If _amps(i) > maxAmp Then maxAmp = _amps(i)
                    If _noises(i) > maxNoise Then maxNoise = _noises(i)
                End If
            Next
        End Sub
    End Class

#Region "SQLite 로컬 DB"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite DB 초기화 - 프로그램 시작 시 호출
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InitLocalDB()
        Try
            ' db 폴더 생성
            Dim dbFolder As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(SqliteDbPath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(dbFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(dbFolder)
            End If

            ' DB 파일이 없으면 생성
            If Not File.Exists(SqliteDbPath) Then
                SQLiteConnection.CreateFile(SqliteDbPath)
            End If

            ' 연결 및 테이블 생성
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TestResult (" &
                "Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT," &
                "Side TEXT," &
                "LineSerial TEXT," &
                "EndSerial TEXT," &
                "TestDate TEXT," &
                "TestTime TEXT," &
                "TestFwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestFwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestFwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestFwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestBwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestBwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestBwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestBwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestDecision TEXT," &
                "TestFwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestBwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestVentAmp TEXT," &
                "TestVentNoise TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckLH TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckRH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgLH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgRH TEXT," &
                "CreatedAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime'))" &
                ")"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            ' 기존 DB에 PartNO 컬럼이 없으면 추가
            Try
                Using cmd2 As New SQLiteCommand("ALTER TABLE TestResult ADD COLUMN PartNO TEXT", SqliteConn)
                    cmd2.ExecuteNonQuery()
                End Using
            Catch
                ' 이미 컬럼이 있으면 무시
            End Try

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InitLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite에 INSERT (LH/RH 공통)
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InsertLocalDB(side As String, partNo As String, lineSerial As String, endSerial As String,
                             testDate As String, testTime As String,
                             fwdAmp As String, fwdNoise As String, fwdSpeed As String,
                             fwdStartPos As String, fwdEndPos As String, fwdTime As String,
                             bwdAmp As String, bwdNoise As String, bwdSpeed As String,
                             bwdStartPos As String, bwdEndPos As String, bwdTime As String,
                             decision As String, fwdLength As String, bwdLength As String,
                             ventAmp As String, ventNoise As String,
                             limitCheckLH As String, limitCheckRH As String,
                             limitMsgLH As String, limitMsgRH As String)
        Try
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "INSERT INTO TestResult " &
                "(Side, PartNO, LineSerial, EndSerial, TestDate, TestTime, " &
                "TestFwdAmp, TestFwdNoise, TestFwdSpeed, TestFwdStartPos, TestFwdEndPos, TestFwdTime, " &
                "TestBwdAmp, TestBwdNoise, TestBwdSpeed, TestBwdStartPos, TestBwdEndPos, TestBwdTime, " &
                "TestDecision, TestFwdLength, TestBwdLength, TestVentAmp, TestVentNoise, " &
                "TestLimitCheckLH, TestLimitCheckRH, LimitCheckMsgLH, LimitCheckMsgRH) " &
                "VALUES " &
                "(@Side, @PartNO, @LineSerial, @EndSerial, @TestDate, @TestTime, " &
                "@FwdAmp, @FwdNoise, @FwdSpeed, @FwdStartPos, @FwdEndPos, @FwdTime, " &
                "@BwdAmp, @BwdNoise, @BwdSpeed, @BwdStartPos, @BwdEndPos, @BwdTime, " &
                "@Decision, @FwdLength, @BwdLength, @VentAmp, @VentNoise, " &
                "@LimitCheckLH, @LimitCheckRH, @LimitMsgLH, @LimitMsgRH)"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Side", side)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@PartNO", partNo)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LineSerial", lineSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@EndSerial", endSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestDate", testDate)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestTime", testTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdAmp", fwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdNoise", fwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdSpeed", fwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdStartPos", fwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdEndPos", fwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdTime", fwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdAmp", bwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdNoise", bwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdSpeed", bwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdStartPos", bwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdEndPos", bwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdTime", bwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Decision", decision)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdLength", fwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdLength", bwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentAmp", ventAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentNoise", ventNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckLH", limitCheckLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckRH", limitCheckRH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgLH", limitMsgLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgRH", limitMsgRH)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InsertLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 에러 로그 작성
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub WriteErrorLog(funcName As String, errMsg As String)
        Try
            Dim logFolder As String = Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "Log", "Error")
            If Not Directory.Exists(logFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(logFolder)
            End If
            Dim logFile As String = Path.Combine(logFolder, Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & ".log")
            Using sw As New StreamWriter(logFile, True)
                sw.WriteLine($"[{Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")}] {funcName}: {errMsg}")
            End Using
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

#Region "Table_Basic2 (사진 경로)"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Table_Basic2 없으면 생성 + PhotoSavePath 컬럼 보장
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub EnsureBasic2Table()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute(
                    "CREATE TABLE Table_Basic2 (" &
                    "ID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, " &
                    "PhotoSavePath TEXT(255))")
            Catch
                ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            End Try
            ' PhotoSavePath 컬럼 없으면 추가
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PhotoSavePath TEXT(255)")
            Catch
            End Try
            ' 레코드 없으면 1건 INSERT
            Dim rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            Dim cnt As Integer = CInt(rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            rs.Close()
            If cnt = 0 Then
                MdbConnect.Execute("INSERT INTO Table_Basic2 (PhotoSavePath) VALUES ('')")
            End If
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("EnsureBasic2Table", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Dim v As Object
                v = Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value : PhotoSavePath = If(IsDBNull(v), "", CStr(v))
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("LoadBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub SaveBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value = CStr(PhotoSavePath)
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SaveBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
        Dim strReturn As String = ""
        Try
            Dim hexv As String, na As Long

            hexv = ""
            Do While DecNum > 0
                na = DecNum Mod 16
                Select Case na
                    Case 10
                        hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 11
                        hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 12
                        hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 13
                        hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 14
                        hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 15
                        hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case Else
                        hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
                End Select
                If DecNum >= 16 Then
                    DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
                Else
                    hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                    Exit Do
                End If
            Loop

            If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
                strReturn = Mid(hexv, 2)
            Else
                strReturn = hexv
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            'RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
        End Try
        Dec2Hex = strReturn

    End Function

    Public Function Hex2Dec(ByVal HexNum As String) As Double

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim DecNum As Double
        Dim getHex As String

        getHex = "0123456789ABCDEF"

        For i = 1 To Len(HexNum)
            If InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) > 0 Then
                DecNum = (DecNum * 16) + InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) - 1
            Else
                'MsgBox("16진수 값이 아닙니다.")
            End If
        Next i

        Hex2Dec = DecNum

    End Function


    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Function FolderCheck(ByVal folder As String) As Boolean
        Try
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        End Try
    End Function

    Function FileCheck(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String) As Boolean
        Return System.IO.File.Exists(folder & "\" & file)
    End Function

    Sub FolderMake(ByVal folder As String)
        Try
            System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileWrite(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String, ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Using f As New StreamWriter(folder & "\" & file, True)
                f.WriteLine(str)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileMake(ByVal folder As String, ByVal File As String)
        Try
            System.IO.File.Create(folder & "\" & File)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Class TestStats
        Private ReadOnly _times As New List(Of Double)
        Private ReadOnly _amps As New List(Of Double)
        Private ReadOnly _noises As New List(Of Double)

        Public Sub Reset()
            _times.Clear()
            _amps.Clear()
            _noises.Clear()
        End Sub

        Public Sub Push(t As Double, amp As Double, noise As Double)
            ' 필요하면 여기서 개수 제한 걸고 싶을 때만 오래된 데이터 제거하면 됨
            ' 예) If _times.Count > 1000 Then ... 같은 식
            _times.Add(t)
            _amps.Add(amp)
            _noises.Add(noise)
        End Sub

        Public Sub GetMaxInRange(startTime As Double,
                             endTime As Double,
                             ByRef maxAmp As Double,
                             ByRef maxNoise As Double)

            maxAmp = 0.0
            maxNoise = 0.0

            For i As Integer = 0 To _times.Count - 1
                Dim t = _times(i)
                If t >= startTime AndAlso t <= endTime Then
                    If _amps(i) > maxAmp Then maxAmp = _amps(i)
                    If _noises(i) > maxNoise Then maxNoise = _noises(i)
                End If
            Next
        End Sub
    End Class

#Region "SQLite 로컬 DB"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite DB 초기화 - 프로그램 시작 시 호출
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InitLocalDB()
        Try
            ' db 폴더 생성
            Dim dbFolder As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(SqliteDbPath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(dbFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(dbFolder)
            End If

            ' DB 파일이 없으면 생성
            If Not File.Exists(SqliteDbPath) Then
                SQLiteConnection.CreateFile(SqliteDbPath)
            End If

            ' 연결 및 테이블 생성
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TestResult (" &
                "Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT," &
                "Side TEXT," &
                "LineSerial TEXT," &
                "EndSerial TEXT," &
                "TestDate TEXT," &
                "TestTime TEXT," &
                "TestFwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestFwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestFwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestFwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestBwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestBwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestBwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestBwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestDecision TEXT," &
                "TestFwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestBwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestVentAmp TEXT," &
                "TestVentNoise TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckLH TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckRH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgLH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgRH TEXT," &
                "CreatedAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime'))" &
                ")"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            ' 기존 DB에 PartNO 컬럼이 없으면 추가
            Try
                Using cmd2 As New SQLiteCommand("ALTER TABLE TestResult ADD COLUMN PartNO TEXT", SqliteConn)
                    cmd2.ExecuteNonQuery()
                End Using
            Catch
                ' 이미 컬럼이 있으면 무시
            End Try

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InitLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite에 INSERT (LH/RH 공통)
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InsertLocalDB(side As String, partNo As String, lineSerial As String, endSerial As String,
                             testDate As String, testTime As String,
                             fwdAmp As String, fwdNoise As String, fwdSpeed As String,
                             fwdStartPos As String, fwdEndPos As String, fwdTime As String,
                             bwdAmp As String, bwdNoise As String, bwdSpeed As String,
                             bwdStartPos As String, bwdEndPos As String, bwdTime As String,
                             decision As String, fwdLength As String, bwdLength As String,
                             ventAmp As String, ventNoise As String,
                             limitCheckLH As String, limitCheckRH As String,
                             limitMsgLH As String, limitMsgRH As String)
        Try
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "INSERT INTO TestResult " &
                "(Side, PartNO, LineSerial, EndSerial, TestDate, TestTime, " &
                "TestFwdAmp, TestFwdNoise, TestFwdSpeed, TestFwdStartPos, TestFwdEndPos, TestFwdTime, " &
                "TestBwdAmp, TestBwdNoise, TestBwdSpeed, TestBwdStartPos, TestBwdEndPos, TestBwdTime, " &
                "TestDecision, TestFwdLength, TestBwdLength, TestVentAmp, TestVentNoise, " &
                "TestLimitCheckLH, TestLimitCheckRH, LimitCheckMsgLH, LimitCheckMsgRH) " &
                "VALUES " &
                "(@Side, @PartNO, @LineSerial, @EndSerial, @TestDate, @TestTime, " &
                "@FwdAmp, @FwdNoise, @FwdSpeed, @FwdStartPos, @FwdEndPos, @FwdTime, " &
                "@BwdAmp, @BwdNoise, @BwdSpeed, @BwdStartPos, @BwdEndPos, @BwdTime, " &
                "@Decision, @FwdLength, @BwdLength, @VentAmp, @VentNoise, " &
                "@LimitCheckLH, @LimitCheckRH, @LimitMsgLH, @LimitMsgRH)"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Side", side)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@PartNO", partNo)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LineSerial", lineSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@EndSerial", endSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestDate", testDate)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestTime", testTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdAmp", fwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdNoise", fwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdSpeed", fwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdStartPos", fwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdEndPos", fwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdTime", fwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdAmp", bwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdNoise", bwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdSpeed", bwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdStartPos", bwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdEndPos", bwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdTime", bwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Decision", decision)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdLength", fwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdLength", bwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentAmp", ventAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentNoise", ventNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckLH", limitCheckLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckRH", limitCheckRH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgLH", limitMsgLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgRH", limitMsgRH)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InsertLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 에러 로그 작성
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub WriteErrorLog(funcName As String, errMsg As String)
        Try
            Dim logFolder As String = Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "Log", "Error")
            If Not Directory.Exists(logFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(logFolder)
            End If
            Dim logFile As String = Path.Combine(logFolder, Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & ".log")
            Using sw As New StreamWriter(logFile, True)
                sw.WriteLine($"[{Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")}] {funcName}: {errMsg}")
            End Using
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Table_Basic2 없으면 생성 + PhotoSavePath 컬럼 보장
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub EnsureBasic2Table()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute(
                    "CREATE TABLE Table_Basic2 (" &
                    "ID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, " &
                    "PhotoSavePath TEXT(255))")
            Catch
                ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            End Try
            ' 컬럼 없으면 추가
            Try : MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PhotoSavePath TEXT(255)") : Catch : End Try
            Try : MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PrinterIpRH TEXT(50)") : Catch : End Try
            Try : MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PrinterIpLH TEXT(50)") : Catch : End Try
            ' 레코드 없으면 1건 INSERT
            Dim rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            Dim cnt As Integer = CInt(rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            rs.Close()
            If cnt = 0 Then
                MdbConnect.Execute("INSERT INTO Table_Basic2 (PhotoSavePath) VALUES ('')")
            End If
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("EnsureBasic2Table", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Dim v As Object
                v = Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value : PhotoSavePath = If(IsDBNull(v), "", CStr(v))
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("LoadBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub SaveBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value = CStr(PhotoSavePath)
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SaveBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
        Dim strReturn As String = ""
        Try
            Dim hexv As String, na As Long

            hexv = ""
            Do While DecNum > 0
                na = DecNum Mod 16
                Select Case na
                    Case 10
                        hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 11
                        hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 12
                        hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 13
                        hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 14
                        hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case 15
                        hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                    Case Else
                        hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
                End Select
                If DecNum >= 16 Then
                    DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
                Else
                    hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                    Exit Do
                End If
            Loop

            If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
                strReturn = Mid(hexv, 2)
            Else
                strReturn = hexv
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            'RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
        End Try
        Dec2Hex = strReturn

    End Function

    Public Function Hex2Dec(ByVal HexNum As String) As Double

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim DecNum As Double
        Dim getHex As String

        getHex = "0123456789ABCDEF"

        For i = 1 To Len(HexNum)
            If InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) > 0 Then
                DecNum = (DecNum * 16) + InStr(getHex, Mid$(HexNum, i, 1)) - 1
            Else
                'MsgBox("16진수 값이 아닙니다.")
            End If
        Next i

        Hex2Dec = DecNum

    End Function


    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Function FolderCheck(ByVal folder As String) As Boolean
        Try
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        End Try
    End Function

    Function FileCheck(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String) As Boolean
        Return System.IO.File.Exists(folder & "\" & file)
    End Function

    Sub FolderMake(ByVal folder As String)
        Try
            System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileWrite(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String, ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Using f As New StreamWriter(folder & "\" & file, True)
                f.WriteLine(str)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub FileMake(ByVal folder As String, ByVal File As String)
        Try
            System.IO.File.Create(folder & "\" & File)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

        Public Sub Reset()
            _times.Clear()
            _amps.Clear()
            _noises.Clear()
        End Sub

        Public Sub Push(t As Double, amp As Double, noise As Double)
            ' 필요하면 여기서 개수 제한 걸고 싶을 때만 오래된 데이터 제거하면 됨
            ' 예) If _times.Count > 1000 Then ... 같은 식
            _times.Add(t)
            _amps.Add(amp)
            _noises.Add(noise)
        End Sub

        Public Sub GetMaxInRange(startTime As Double,
                             endTime As Double,
                             ByRef maxAmp As Double,
                             ByRef maxNoise As Double)

            maxAmp = 0.0
            maxNoise = 0.0

            For i As Integer = 0 To _times.Count - 1
                Dim t = _times(i)
                If t >= startTime AndAlso t <= endTime Then
                    If _amps(i) > maxAmp Then maxAmp = _amps(i)
                    If _noises(i) > maxNoise Then maxNoise = _noises(i)
                End If
            Next
        End Sub
    End Class

#Region "SQLite 로컬 DB"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite DB 초기화 - 프로그램 시작 시 호출
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InitLocalDB()
        Try
            ' db 폴더 생성
            Dim dbFolder As String = Path.GetDirectoryName(SqliteDbPath)
            If Not Directory.Exists(dbFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(dbFolder)
            End If

            ' DB 파일이 없으면 생성
            If Not File.Exists(SqliteDbPath) Then
                SQLiteConnection.CreateFile(SqliteDbPath)
            End If

            ' 연결 및 테이블 생성
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS TestResult (" &
                "Id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT," &
                "Side TEXT," &
                "LineSerial TEXT," &
                "EndSerial TEXT," &
                "TestDate TEXT," &
                "TestTime TEXT," &
                "TestFwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestFwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestFwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestFwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestFwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestBwdAmp TEXT," &
                "TestBwdNoise TEXT," &
                "TestBwdSpeed TEXT," &
                "TestBwdStartPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdEndPos TEXT," &
                "TestBwdTime TEXT," &
                "TestDecision TEXT," &
                "TestFwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestBwdLength TEXT," &
                "TestVentAmp TEXT," &
                "TestVentNoise TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckLH TEXT," &
                "TestLimitCheckRH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgLH TEXT," &
                "LimitCheckMsgRH TEXT," &
                "CreatedAt TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime'))" &
                ")"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            ' 기존 DB에 PartNO 컬럼이 없으면 추가
            Try
                Using cmd2 As New SQLiteCommand("ALTER TABLE TestResult ADD COLUMN PartNO TEXT", SqliteConn)
                    cmd2.ExecuteNonQuery()
                End Using
            Catch
                ' 이미 컬럼이 있으면 무시
            End Try

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InitLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' SQLite에 INSERT (LH/RH 공통)
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub InsertLocalDB(side As String, partNo As String, lineSerial As String, endSerial As String,
                             testDate As String, testTime As String,
                             fwdAmp As String, fwdNoise As String, fwdSpeed As String,
                             fwdStartPos As String, fwdEndPos As String, fwdTime As String,
                             bwdAmp As String, bwdNoise As String, bwdSpeed As String,
                             bwdStartPos As String, bwdEndPos As String, bwdTime As String,
                             decision As String, fwdLength As String, bwdLength As String,
                             ventAmp As String, ventNoise As String,
                             limitCheckLH As String, limitCheckRH As String,
                             limitMsgLH As String, limitMsgRH As String)
        Try
            SqliteConn = New SQLiteConnection($"Data Source={SqliteDbPath};Version=3;")
            SqliteConn.Open()

            Dim sql As String = "INSERT INTO TestResult " &
                "(Side, PartNO, LineSerial, EndSerial, TestDate, TestTime, " &
                "TestFwdAmp, TestFwdNoise, TestFwdSpeed, TestFwdStartPos, TestFwdEndPos, TestFwdTime, " &
                "TestBwdAmp, TestBwdNoise, TestBwdSpeed, TestBwdStartPos, TestBwdEndPos, TestBwdTime, " &
                "TestDecision, TestFwdLength, TestBwdLength, TestVentAmp, TestVentNoise, " &
                "TestLimitCheckLH, TestLimitCheckRH, LimitCheckMsgLH, LimitCheckMsgRH) " &
                "VALUES " &
                "(@Side, @PartNO, @LineSerial, @EndSerial, @TestDate, @TestTime, " &
                "@FwdAmp, @FwdNoise, @FwdSpeed, @FwdStartPos, @FwdEndPos, @FwdTime, " &
                "@BwdAmp, @BwdNoise, @BwdSpeed, @BwdStartPos, @BwdEndPos, @BwdTime, " &
                "@Decision, @FwdLength, @BwdLength, @VentAmp, @VentNoise, " &
                "@LimitCheckLH, @LimitCheckRH, @LimitMsgLH, @LimitMsgRH)"

            Using cmd As New SQLiteCommand(sql, SqliteConn)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Side", side)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@PartNO", partNo)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LineSerial", lineSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@EndSerial", endSerial)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestDate", testDate)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@TestTime", testTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdAmp", fwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdNoise", fwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdSpeed", fwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdStartPos", fwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdEndPos", fwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdTime", fwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdAmp", bwdAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdNoise", bwdNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdSpeed", bwdSpeed)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdStartPos", bwdStartPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdEndPos", bwdEndPos)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdTime", bwdTime)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@Decision", decision)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@FwdLength", fwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@BwdLength", bwdLength)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentAmp", ventAmp)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@VentNoise", ventNoise)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckLH", limitCheckLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitCheckRH", limitCheckRH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgLH", limitMsgLH)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@LimitMsgRH", limitMsgRH)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using

            SqliteConn.Close()

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("InsertLocalDB", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    ''' <summary>
    ''' 에러 로그 작성
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub WriteErrorLog(funcName As String, errMsg As String)
        Try
            Dim logFolder As String = Path.Combine(AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory, "Log", "Error")
            If Not Directory.Exists(logFolder) Then
                Directory.CreateDirectory(logFolder)
            End If
            Dim logFile As String = Path.Combine(logFolder, Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & ".log")
            Using sw As New StreamWriter(logFile, True)
                sw.WriteLine($"[{Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")}] {funcName}: {errMsg}")
            End Using
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

#Region "Table_Basic2 (사진 경로)"

    ''' <summary>
    ''' Table_Basic2 없으면 생성 + PhotoSavePath 컬럼 보장
    ''' </summary>
    Public Sub EnsureBasic2Table()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Try
                MdbConnect.Execute(
                    "CREATE TABLE Table_Basic2 (" &
                    "ID AUTOINCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, " &
                    "PhotoSavePath TEXT(255))")
            Catch
                ' 이미 존재하면 무시
            End Try
            ' 컬럼 없으면 추가
            Try : MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PhotoSavePath TEXT(255)") : Catch : End Try
            Try : MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PrinterIpRH TEXT(50)") : Catch : End Try
            Try : MdbConnect.Execute("ALTER TABLE Table_Basic2 ADD COLUMN PrinterIpLH TEXT(50)") : Catch : End Try
            ' 레코드 없으면 1건 INSERT
            Dim rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            rs.Open("SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            Dim cnt As Integer = CInt(rs.Fields("CNT").Value)
            rs.Close()
            If cnt = 0 Then
                MdbConnect.Execute("INSERT INTO Table_Basic2 (PhotoSavePath) VALUES ('')")
            End If
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("EnsureBasic2Table", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Dim v As Object
                v = Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value : PhotoSavePath = If(IsDBNull(v), "", CStr(v))
                Try : v = Rs.Fields("PrinterIpRH").Value : PrinterIpRH = If(IsDBNull(v) OrElse CStr(v) = "", "192.168.0.15", CStr(v)) : Catch : End Try
                Try : v = Rs.Fields("PrinterIpLH").Value : PrinterIpLH = If(IsDBNull(v) OrElse CStr(v) = "", "192.168.0.3", CStr(v)) : Catch : End Try
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("LoadBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub SaveBasic2()
        Try
            ConnectionOpenMdb()
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic2", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("PhotoSavePath").Value = CStr(PhotoSavePath)
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
            ConnectionCloseMdb()
        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteErrorLog("SaveBasic2", ex.Message)
        End Try
    End Sub

#End Region

End Module

content.text: **4. Send 함수에서 하드코딩 IP → 변수 참조로 변경**

Private Sub SendToZebraEthernetRH(ByVal zpl As String)
        Const printerIp As String = "192.168.0.15"
        Const printerPort As Integer = 9100

    Private Function StrPtr(ByVal x As String) As Integer
        Return VarPtr(x)
    End Function
    Private Function VarPtr(ByVal obj As Object) As Integer
        ' Obtain a pinned handle to the object
        Dim handle As GCHandle = GCHandle.Alloc(obj, GCHandleType.Pinned)
        Dim pointer As Integer = handle.AddrOfPinnedObject.ToInt32

        ' Free the allocated handle. At this point the GC can move the object in memory, this is 
        ' why this function does not exist in .NET. If you were to use this pointer as a destination 
        ' for memcopy for example, you could overwrite unintended memory, which would crash the 
        ' application or cause unexpected behavior. For this function to work you would need to
        ' maintain the handle until after you are finished using it.
        handle.Free()

        Return pointer
    End Function
    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Supply1.Close()
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Supply1.PortName = PortNumberAmp1
                Serial_Supply1.Parity = Ports.Parity.None
                Serial_Supply1.Handshake = Ports.Handshake.XOnXOff
                Serial_Supply1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Supply1.StopBits = Ports.StopBits.One
                Serial_Supply1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Supply1.Open()
            End If
            Serial_Supply1.WriteLine("*ADR 1")
            RequestStep1 = 0
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Supply1  Fail " & PortNumberAmp1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialScanner1.PortName = PortNumberScanner1
            If SerialScanner1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialScanner1.Close()
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            Else
                SerialScanner1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialScanner1.DataBits = 8
                SerialScanner1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner1 Fail " & PortNumberScanner1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter1.PortName = PortNumberPrinter1
            If SerialPrinter1.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter1.Close()
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter1.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter1.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter1.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer1 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter1)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialPrinter2.PortName = PortNumberPrinter2
            If SerialPrinter2.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialPrinter2.Close()
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            Else
                SerialPrinter2.BaudRate = 9600
                SerialPrinter2.DataBits = 8
                SerialPrinter2.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Printer2 Fail " & PortNumberPrinter2)
        End Try

        Try
            SerialCAN.PortName = PortNumberCAN
            If SerialCAN.IsOpen() = True Then
                SerialCAN.Close()
                SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
                SerialCAN.Open()
            Else
                SerialCAN.BaudRate = 115200
                SerialCAN.DataBits = 8
                SerialCAN.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open CAN Fail " & PortNumberCAN)
        End Try

        'Try
        '    SerialLinRH.PortName = PortNumberLinRH
        '    If SerialLinRH.IsOpen() = True Then
        '        SerialLinRH.Close()
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    Else
        '        SerialLinRH.BaudRate = 38400
        '        SerialLinRH.DataBits = 8
        '        SerialLinRH.Open()
        '    End If
        'Catch ex As Exception
        '    MsgBox("Serial Open Lin RH Fail " & PortNumberLinRH)
        'End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim Incoming1 As String = ""
        Dim Incoming2 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString1 As String = ""
        Dim RecvString2 As String = ""

        Do
            Try
                If Serial_Supply1.IsOpen = True Then
                    If Serial_Supply1.BytesToRead > 0 Then
                        Incoming1 = Serial_Supply1.ReadChar
                        If Incoming1 = 13 Then
                            If RequestStep1 = 1 Then
                                ValueVolt1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 2
                            ElseIf RequestStep1 = 3 Then
                                ValueAmp1 = CDbl(RecvString1)
                                RequestStep1 = 4
                            End If
                            RecvString1 = ""
                            Serial_Supply1.DiscardInBuffer()
                        Else
                            RecvString1 = RecvString1 & Chr(Incoming1)
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                RecvString1 = ""
                RequestStep1 = 0
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub
    Private Sub CanWrite(str As String)

        SerialCAN.Write(str)
        tmpLogCount = tmpLogCount + 1
        'T 535 8 1D 02 00 00 00 00 FF FF
        tmpLog(tmpLogCount) = "->" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & " " &
                                Mid(str, 2, 3) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 6, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 8, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 10, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 12, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 14, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 16, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 18, 2) & " " &
                                Mid(str, 20, 2)

    End Sub
    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Do

            If SerialCAN.IsOpen = True Then

                If CanSTep = 2000 Then 'RL CCS CLEAR LH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 712 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2001 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2020 Then 'RR CCS CLEAR RH
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 707 8 04 14 FF FF FF 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 2021 Then
                    '클리어 완료 신호 대기
                ElseIf CanSTep = 10 Then ' LH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 08 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 20 Then 'LH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 02 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 30 Then 'LH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 40 Then 'LH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 41 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 42
                ElseIf CanSTep = 42 Then
                    If OPTION_LHRH = "LH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    ElseIf OPTION_LHRH = "RH" Then
                        CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    End If
                    CanSTep = 43
                ElseIf CanSTep = 110 Then ' RH FWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 80 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 120 Then 'RH BWD
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 20 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 130 Then 'RH STOP
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanCount = CanCount + 1
                    If CanCount >= 2 Then CanSTep = 0
                ElseIf CanSTep = 140 Then 'RH EDU
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                ElseIf CanSTep = 0 Then
                ElseIf CanSTep = 200 Then 'LH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 04 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 201
                ElseIf CanSTep = 201 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 202
                ElseIf CanSTep = 202 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 203
                ElseIf CanSTep = 203 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 50 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 204 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 205
                ElseIf CanSTep = 205 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 204
                ElseIf CanSTep = 300 Then 'RH VENT
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A5 8 00 00 40 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 301
                ElseIf CanSTep = 301 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 302
                ElseIf CanSTep = 302 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 303
                ElseIf CanSTep = 303 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 4A2 8 00 00 00 00 00 05 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 304 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 418 8 00 00 00 00 10 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 305
                ElseIf CanSTep = 305 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 3E0 8 00 00 00 00 50 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 304
                ElseIf CanSTep = 500 Then  'LH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 501
                ElseIf CanSTep = 501 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A6 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 500
                ElseIf CanSTep = 600 Then 'RH 학습 체크
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 F0 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 601
                ElseIf CanSTep = 601 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 04 31 03 12 A7 00 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 600
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1000 Then 'LH RH 동시 학습
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A6 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1001
                ElseIf CanSTep = 1001 Then
                    CanWrite(DelSpace("t 731 8 05 31 01 12 A7 42 00 00" & Chr(13)))
                    CanSTep = 1000
                End If

            End If

            Thread.Sleep(Thread3Delay)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub Dec2Bin(ByVal Port_0 As Integer, ByVal Port_1 As Integer)

        Dim iten As Integer
        Dim sbin As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim i As Integer

        iten = CInt(Port_0)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2
        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        iten = CInt(Port_1)
        sbin = ""
        Do Until iten = 0
            sbin = CStr((iten Mod 2)) & sbin
            iten = iten \ 2

        Loop

        tmp = ""
        For i = 1 To 8 - Len(sbin)
            tmp = tmp & "0"
        Next

        D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 8, 1))
        D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 7, 1))
        D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 6, 1))
        D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 5, 1))
        D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 4, 1))
        D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 3, 1))
        D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 2, 1))
        D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid(tmp & sbin, 1, 1))

        For i = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 1 Then
                D_Value(i) = 0
            Else
                D_Value(i) = 1
            End If
        Next

    End Sub
    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)

        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub TmrIO_Tick(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles TmrIO.Tick

        Dim err1 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim err2 As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        Dim tmp1 As Byte
        Dim tmp2 As Byte

        err1 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(0, tmp1)
        err2 = InstantDiCtrl1.Read(1, tmp2)

        Dec2Bin(CInt(tmp1), CInt(tmp2))

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.White
            Else
                IO_IN_LABEL(i).BackColor = Color.Black
            End If
        Next i

        lbRequestStep1.Text = RequestStep1
        lbRequestCount1.Text = RequestCount1
        RequestCount1 = RequestCount1 + 0.1
        If RequestCount1 >= 2 Then
            RequestStep1 = 0
            RequestCount1 = 0
        End If
        If RequestStep1 = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            RequestStep1 = 1
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 1 Then
            'if data Recv VOLT
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "MEAS:CURR?")
            RequestStep1 = 3
        ElseIf RequestStep1 = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(Serial_Supply1, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            RequestStep1 = 0
        End If


        LbSupply1Volt.Text = ValueVolt1
        LbSupply1Amp.Text = ValueAmp1

    End Sub
    Sub Do_On(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 1

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.Black

    End Sub
    Sub Do_Off(ByVal Num As Integer)

        Dim P1 As Integer
        Dim P2 As Integer

        Out_(Num) = 0

        If Out_(0) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 1
        If Out_(1) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 2
        If Out_(2) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 4
        If Out_(3) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 8
        If Out_(4) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 16
        If Out_(5) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 32
        If Out_(6) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 64
        If Out_(7) = 1 Then P1 = P1 + 128

        If Out_(8) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 1
        If Out_(9) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 2
        If Out_(10) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 4
        If Out_(11) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 8
        If Out_(12) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 16
        If Out_(13) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 32
        If Out_(14) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 64
        If Out_(15) = 1 Then P2 = P2 + 128

        Dim err As ErrorCode = ErrorCode.Success
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(0, CByte(P1))
        err = InstantDoCtrl1.Write(1, CByte(P2))

        IO_OUT_LABEL(Num).BackColor = Color.White

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        ' PLC ActiveX 컨트롤 코드에서 생성
        ActPlc = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        Me.Controls.Add(ActPlc)
        CType(ActPlc, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()
        ActPlc.Visible = False

        LhScanCompleted = False
        RhScanCompleted = False

        Thread3Delay = 500
        FlagLog = False
        wStep = 0

        ' SQLite 로컬 DB 초기화
        Try
            InitLocalDB()
        Catch ex As Exception
            ' SQLite DLL 없으면 무시 (로컬 저장 기능만 비활성화)
        End Try

        LoadPortData()
        LoadBarcodeData()
        LoadBasicData()
        EnsureBasic2Table()
        LoadBasic2()
        InitControl()
        InitControlLH()
        InitTest()
        InitTestLH()
        SerialOpen()

        TmrWork.Interval = 100
        TmrWork.Start()

        Control2Arry()

        Try
            InstantDoCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
            InstantDiCtrl1.SelectedDevice = New DeviceInformation(1)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        TmrIO.Interval = 100
        TmrIO.Start()

        DaqStart()

        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Do_Off(i)
        Next

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskTest)
        Trd2.IsBackground = True
        Trd2.Start()


        ActPlc.ActTimeOut = 500
        AddressOfPLc = PlcIpAddress
        FlagPlcConnection = False

        InitSrcDMap()

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Connect.Start()
        CanSTep = 0
        For i As Integer = 1 To 9
            WritePlc("D", "415" & CStr(i), "0")
        Next
        wStep = 0

    End Sub
