﻿Imports TPCANHandle = System.UInt16
Imports TPCANBitrateFD = System.String
Imports TPCANTimestampFD = System.UInt64
Imports System
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Timers
Imports System.Diagnostics
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Globalization
Imports Peak.Can.Basic
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Xml
Imports System.Diagnostics.Eventing.Reader
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices.ComTypes
Imports System.Collections.Concurrent
Imports System.Threading.Tasks

Public NotInheritable Class CanBusService
    Implements IDisposable

    Private ReadOnly _gate As New Object()
    Private _isStarted As Boolean
    Private _isDisposed As Boolean

    ' ===== 외부 이벤트 =====
    Public Event FrameReceivedFD As Action(Of TPCANMsgFD, ULong)    ' RAW FD 프레임
    Public Event UdsCompleted As Action(Of UInteger, Byte())        ' ISO-TP 완성 페이로드
    Public Event Log As Action(Of String)                           ' 로그 이벤트
    Public Event [Error] As Action(Of TPCANStatus)                  ' 오류 이벤트

    ' ===== 내부 상태 =====
    Private ReadOnly _handle As UShort ' TPCANHandle
    Private ReadOnly _isFd As Boolean
    Private _pollCts As CancellationTokenSource

    ' 로깅 플래그
    Public Property LogAllRawRxFrames As Boolean = False
    Public Property LogAllRawTxFrames As Boolean = False
    Public Property LogVerboseInternalState As Boolean = False

    ' 송신 스케줄러
    Private ReadOnly _jobs As New List(Of TxJob)()
    Private _sw As Stopwatch                 ' 스케줄/ISO-TP 타임스탬프 공용
    Private _sched As System.Timers.Timer

    ' ISO-TP 수신 상태
    Private _isotp As New IsoTpState()

    ' 관심 ID 필터(없으면 모두 통과)
    Private _interestIds As HashSet(Of UInteger)

    ' 요청→응답 ID 매핑(FC용). 기본값: req + 0x8
    Private ReadOnly _respIdMap As New Dictionary(Of UInteger, UInteger)()

    Public Sub New(ByVal handle As UShort, ByVal isFd As Boolean)
        _handle = handle
        _isFd = isFd
    End Sub

    Public Sub New()
        Me.New(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, True)
    End Sub

    ' ===== 초기화/해제 =====
    Public Function Init(ByVal fdBitrate As String) As TPCANStatus
        Dim st As TPCANStatus
        If _isFd Then
            st = PCANBasic.InitializeFD(_handle, fdBitrate)
        Else
            st = PCANBasic.Initialize(_handle, TPCANBaudrate.PCAN_BAUD_500K, TPCANType.PCAN_TYPE_ISA, 0, 0)
        End If

        RaiseEvent Log("PCAN Init: " & st.ToString())
        Return st
    End Function

    Public Function Init() As TPCANStatus
        Return Init("f_clock_mhz=40, nom_brp=1, nom_tseg1=63, nom_tseg2=16, nom_sjw=16, data_brp=2, data_tseg1=14, data_tseg2=5, data_sjw=4")
    End Function

    Private _disposed As Boolean

    Private Sub SafeUninitialize()
        Try
            PCANBasic.Uninitialize(_handle)
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub Dispose() Implements IDisposable.Dispose
        Dispose(True)
        GC.SuppressFinalize(Me)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub Finalize()
        Dispose(False)
        MyBase.Finalize()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Dispose(ByVal disposing As Boolean)
        If _disposed Then Return

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("Disposing (disposing=" & disposing & ")")

        If disposing Then
            StopPolling()
            StopScheduler()
        End If

        SafeUninitialize()

        _disposed = True
        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("Disposed complete.")
    End Sub

    ' ===== 관심 ID / 응답 ID 매핑 =====
    Public Sub SetInterestIds(ByVal ids As IEnumerable(Of UInteger))
        _interestIds = If(ids Is Nothing, Nothing, New HashSet(Of UInteger)(ids))
    End Sub

    Public Sub SetResponseIdMap(ByVal map As Dictionary(Of UInteger, UInteger))
        _respIdMap.Clear()
        If map Is Nothing Then Return
        For Each kv In map
            _respIdMap(kv.Key) = kv.Value
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Function PassesInterest(ByVal id As UInteger) As Boolean
        Return _interestIds Is Nothing OrElse _interestIds.Contains(id)
    End Function

    Private Function GetRespId(ByVal reqId As UInteger) As UInteger
        Return If(_respIdMap.ContainsKey(reqId), _respIdMap(reqId), (reqId + 8UI))
    End Function

    ' ===== 수신 폴링 =====
    Public Sub StartPolling(ByVal idleSleepMs As Integer)
        StopPolling()
        _pollCts = New CancellationTokenSource()
        Dim token = _pollCts.Token

        ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
                                         Dim msg As TPCANMsgFD
                                         Dim ts As ULong
                                         While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
                                             Dim st = PCANBasic.ReadFD(_handle, msg, ts)
                                             If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then

                                                 If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
                                                     RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("RX", msg, ts))
                                                 End If

                                                 Dim len = DlctoLen(msg.DLC)
                                                 Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                                                 If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
                                                 ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
                                             ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                 If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
                                             Else
                                                 RaiseEvent [Error](st)
                                                 Thread.Sleep(10)
                                             End If
                                         End While
                                     End Sub)

        RaiseEvent Log("Polling started.")
    End Sub

    Public Sub StartPolling()
        StartPolling(2)
    End Sub

    Public Sub StopPolling()
        If _pollCts IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _pollCts.Cancel()
            Catch
            End Try
            _pollCts.Dispose()
            _pollCts = Nothing
            RaiseEvent Log("Polling stopped.")
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== FD 수신 Process =====
    Public Sub ProcessCanMsgFD(ByVal msg As TPCANMsgFD, ByVal timestamp As ULong)
        If Not PassesInterest(msg.ID) Then Return

        RaiseEvent FrameReceivedFD(msg, timestamp)
        HandleIsoTp_Core(msg)
    End Sub

    ' ===== 송신 =====
    Public Function WriteFD(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal brs As Boolean, ByVal isExtended As Boolean) As TPCANStatus
        Dim msg As New TPCANMsgFD With {
            .ID = id,
            .DLC = CByte(LengthToDlc(If(data IsNot Nothing, data.Length, 0))),
            .MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_FD Or
                       If(brs, TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_BRS, 0) Or
                       If(isExtended, TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED, 0),
            .DATA = New Byte(63) {}
        }
        If data IsNot Nothing Then Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, data.Length)

        Dim st = PCANBasic.WriteFD(_handle, msg)
        If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
            RaiseEvent [Error](st)
        Else
            If LogAllRawTxFrames Then
                RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("TX", msg, 0))
            End If
        End If
        Return st
    End Function

    Public Function WriteFD(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte()) As TPCANStatus
        Return WriteFD(id, data, True, False)
    End Function

    Public Function WriteCanMsg(ByVal idHex As String, ByVal hex As String()) As TPCANStatus
        Dim id As UInteger = ParseIdHex(idHex)
        Dim data As Byte() = HexArray(hex)
        Return WriteFD(id, data, True, False)
    End Function

    Public Function WriteCanMsg(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte()) As TPCANStatus
        Return WriteFD(id, data, True, False)
    End Function

    ' ===== Job 스케줄러 =====
    Public Sub AddJob(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal periodMs As Integer, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        SyncLock _jobs
            Dim i As Integer
            For i = _jobs.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
                If _jobs(i).Name = name Then _jobs.RemoveAt(i)
            Next
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, periodMs, data, True, False, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}, Period={2}ms", name, id, periodMs))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    ' 32바이트 FD 프레임용 Job (주기적) - 마지막 인자 형식 동일(ParamArray Byte)
    Public Sub AddJob32(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal periodMs As Integer, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length <> 32 Then
            Throw New ArgumentException("AddJob32 requires exactly 32 data bytes.", "data")
        End If

        SyncLock _jobs
            Dim i As Integer
            For i = _jobs.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
                If _jobs(i).Name = name Then _jobs.RemoveAt(i)
            Next
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, periodMs, data, True, False, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job (32B) added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}, Period={2}ms", name, id, periodMs))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    Public Sub AddJobOnce(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        SyncLock _jobs
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, 0, data, True, True, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job (once) added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}", name, id))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    ' 32바이트 FD 프레임용 Job (1회 송신) - 마지막 인자 형식 동일(ParamArray Byte)
    Public Sub AddJobOnce32(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length <> 32 Then
            Throw New ArgumentException("AddJobOnce32 requires exactly 32 data bytes.", "data")
        End If

        SyncLock _jobs
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, 0, data, True, True, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job (once, 32B) added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}", name, id))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    Private Function HexToBytes(ByVal hex As String) As Byte()
        If hex Is Nothing Then Return Nothing

        Dim cleaned As String = hex.Replace(" ", "") _
                                   .Replace(vbTab, "") _
                                   .Replace(vbCr, "") _
                                   .Replace(vbLf, "")

        If cleaned.Length = 0 Then
            Return New Byte() {}
        End If

        If (cleaned.Length Mod 2) <> 0 Then
            Throw New ArgumentException("hexData length must be even.", "hex")
        End If

        Dim len As Integer = cleaned.Length \ 2
        Dim data(len - 1) As Byte

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To len - 1
            data(i) = Byte.Parse(cleaned.Substring(i * 2, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber)
        Next

        Return data
    End Function

    Public Sub RemoveJob(ByVal name As String)
        SyncLock _jobs
            Dim i As Integer
            For i = _jobs.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
                If _jobs(i).Name = name Then
                    _jobs.RemoveAt(i)
                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job removed: {0}", name))
                End If
            Next
        End SyncLock
    End Sub

    Private Sub StartScheduler()
        If _sched IsNot Nothing Then Return
        _sw = New Stopwatch()
        _sw.Start()
        _sched = New System.Timers.Timer(10.0)
        _sched.AutoReset = True
        AddHandler _sched.Elapsed, AddressOf Sched_Elapsed
        _sched.Start()
        RaiseEvent Log("Scheduler started.")
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopScheduler()
        If _sched IsNot Nothing Then
            _sched.Stop()
            RemoveHandler _sched.Elapsed, AddressOf Sched_Elapsed
            _sched.Dispose()
            _sched = Nothing
            RaiseEvent Log("Scheduler stopped.")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Sched_Elapsed(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As ElapsedEventArgs)
        Dim ms As Long = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

        ' ISO-TP 타임아웃 처리
        IsoTpPump(ms)

        Dim snapshot As List(Of TxJob)
        SyncLock _jobs
            snapshot = New List(Of TxJob)(_jobs)
        End SyncLock

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To snapshot.Count - 1
            Dim job As TxJob = snapshot(i)

            If job.PeriodMs = 0 OrElse ms - job.LastTick >= job.PeriodMs Then

                ' ===== Alive Counter 적용 =====
                If job.AliveIndex >= 0 AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.AliveIndex < job.Data.Length Then
                    Dim b As Byte = job.Data(job.AliveIndex)

                    If job.AliveHighNibble Then
                        b = CByte(((job.AliveValue And &HF) << 4) Or (b And &HF))
                    Else
                        b = CByte((b And &HF0) Or (job.AliveValue And &HF))
                    End If

                    job.Data(job.AliveIndex) = b
                    job.AliveValue = CByte((job.AliveValue + 1) And &HF)
                End If
                ' ===== Alive 끝 =====

                ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E P02 CRC 갱신 =====
                If job.E2eEnabled AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.Data.Length >= 2 Then
                    Dim cntIndex As Integer = If(job.AliveIndex >= 0, job.AliveIndex, 1)

                    If cntIndex >= 0 AndAlso cntIndex < job.Data.Length Then
                        Dim cnt As Integer = job.Data(cntIndex) And &HF
                        Dim dataId As Byte = job.E2eDataIdList(cnt And &HF)

                        Dim crc As Byte = Crc8H2F_Calc(job.Data, 1, job.Data.Length - 1, dataId)
                        job.Data(0) = crc
                    End If
                End If
                ' ===== E2E CRC 끝 =====

                WriteFD(job.Id, job.Data, job.Brs, job.IsExt)
                job.LastTick = ms

                If job.OneShot Then
                    RemoveJob(job.Name)
                Else
                    SyncLock _jobs
                        Dim j As Integer
                        For j = 0 To _jobs.Count - 1
                            If _jobs(j).Name = job.Name Then
                                Dim t As TxJob = _jobs(j)
                                t.LastTick = job.LastTick
                                t.AliveValue = job.AliveValue
                                _jobs(j) = t
                                Exit For
                            End If
                        Next
                    End SyncLock
                End If
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS/ISO-TP (8-byte 배열 기반) =====
    Private Sub OnCanRx_Uds(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal dlc8 As Byte())
        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return

        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
        Select Case pciType
            Case &H0 ' SF
                Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
                If len <= 0 OrElse len > 7 Then Return
                Dim uds As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
                OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)

            Case &H1 ' FF
                Dim totalLen As Integer = ((dlc8(0) And &HF) << 8) Or dlc8(1)
                Dim part = dlc8.Skip(2).ToArray()

                _isotp.Active = True
                _isotp.RespId = canId
                _isotp.ReqId = canId - &H8
                _isotp.Expected = totalLen
                _isotp.Got = part.Length
                _isotp.NextSn = 1
                _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)())
                _isotp.Buf.Clear()
                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(part.Take(Math.Min(part.Length, totalLen)))
                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

                SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)

            Case &H2 ' CF
                If Not _isotp.Active OrElse canId <> _isotp.RespId Then Return

                Dim sn As Byte = CByte(dlc8(0) And &HF)
                If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] SN mismatch exp=" & _isotp.NextSn & ", got=" & sn & " → abort")
                    _isotp.Active = False
                    Exit Select
                End If
                _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn Mod &HF) + 1)

                Dim chunk = dlc8.Skip(1).ToArray()
                Dim remain As Integer = _isotp.Expected - _isotp.Got
                Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(remain, chunk.Length)
                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(chunk.Take(take))
                _isotp.Got += take
                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

                If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
                    Dim uds = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
                    _isotp.Active = False
                    OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)
                End If

            Case &H3 ' FC
            Case Else
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub SendFlowControlCts(ByVal reqId As UInteger)
        WriteCanMsg(ToIdHex(reqId), {"30", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00"})
        RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] FC(CTS) sent to " & ToIdHex(reqId))
    End Sub

    Private Sub IsoTpPump(ByVal nowMs As Long)
        If _isotp.Active AndAlso (nowMs - _isotp.LastActivityMs) > _isotp.TimeoutMs Then
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] Timeout → abort")
            _isotp.Active = False
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnUdsComplete(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
        RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(respId, uds)

        If ShouldFilterUds(uds) Then
            Return
        End If

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then
            If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then
                Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
                Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
                Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
                Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
                RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
            ElseIf uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H7F Then
                RaiseEvent Log("[NRC] SID=0x" & uds(1).ToString("X2") & ", NRC=0x" & uds(2).ToString("X2"))
            Else
                RaiseEvent Log("[UDS] " & String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Shared Function ToIdHex(ByVal id As UInteger) As String
        Return "0x" & id.ToString("X3")
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ShouldFilterUds(ByVal uds As Byte()) As Boolean
        If uds Is Nothing OrElse uds.Length = 0 Then Return False
        If uds(0) = &H7E Then Return True
        Return False
    End Function

    ' ===== 간단 UDS SF 추출 =====
    Private Shared Function TryExtractUdsPayload(ByVal dlc8 As Byte(), ByRef uds As Byte()) As Boolean
        uds = Nothing
        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return False

        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
        If pciType = &H0 Then
            Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
            If len <= 0 OrElse len > dlc8.Length - 1 Then Return False
            uds = New Byte(len - 1) {}
            Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
            Return True
        End If
        Return False
    End Function

    Private Sub LogRDBIResponseFromCan(ByVal canData As Byte())
        Dim uds As Byte() = Nothing
        If Not TryExtractUdsPayload(canData, uds) Then Return
        If uds.Length < 3 OrElse uds(0) <> &H62 Then Return

        Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
        Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
        Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
        Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
    End Sub

    ' ===== 3C3 LimitSet FSM =====
    Private Shared ReadOnly StaMap As String() = {"0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7"}

    Private Shared Function IsBusy(ByVal code As UInteger) As Boolean
        Return Not (code = 0 OrElse code = 4)
    End Function

    Private Class LimitSetSession
        Public Axis As String
        Public Active As Boolean
        Public LastCode As UInteger
        Public StartedAt As DateTime
        Public LastChangeAt As DateTime
        Public Toggles As Integer
        Public FramesSinceStable As Integer
    End Class

    Private _tiltSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Tilt"}
    Private _hgtSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Height"}

    Private Sub Handle_3C3_LimitSetFSM(ByVal d As Byte())
        Dim tiltSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 132, 3)
        Dim hgtSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 138, 3)

        UpdateLimitSet(_tiltSess, tiltSta)
        UpdateLimitSet(_hgtSess, hgtSta)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateLimitSet(ByVal s As LimitSetSession, ByVal code As UInteger)
        If Not s.Active Then
            If IsBusy(code) Then
                s.Active = True
                s.StartedAt = DateTime.Now
                s.LastChangeAt = s.StartedAt
                s.Toggles = 0
                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set START (code=" & code & ", map=" & MapSta(code) & ")")
            End If
        Else
            If code <> s.LastCode Then
                s.LastChangeAt = DateTime.Now
                If IsBusy(s.LastCode) <> IsBusy(code) Then s.Toggles += 1
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] State CHG " & s.LastCode & "→" & code & " (map " & MapSta(s.LastCode) & "→" & MapSta(code) & ")")
            End If

            If Not IsBusy(code) Then
                s.FramesSinceStable += 1
                If s.FramesSinceStable >= 2 Then
                    Dim dur = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set DONE in " & dur.TotalSeconds.ToString("0.0") &
                                                                  "s (toggles=" & s.Toggles & ", last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code) & ")")
                    s.Active = False
                End If
            Else
                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
            End If

            Dim elapsed = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
            If elapsed.TotalSeconds > 20 AndAlso s.Active Then
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set TIMEOUT (>20s) — last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code))
                s.Active = False
            End If
        End If
        s.LastCode = code
    End Sub

    Private Shared Function ReadMotorola(ByVal d As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal len As Integer) As UInteger
        Dim v As UInteger = 0
        If d Is Nothing Then Return 0
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To len - 1
            Dim cur As Integer = startBit - i
            Dim bi As Integer = cur \ 8
            Dim biIn As Integer = 7 - (cur Mod 8)
            If bi >= 0 AndAlso bi < d.Length Then
                v = (v << 1) Or CUInt((d(bi) >> biIn) And 1)
            End If
        Next
        Return v
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ReadSignalMotorola(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal length As Integer) As UInteger
        Dim value As UInteger = 0
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To length - 1
            Dim curBit As Integer = startBit - i
            Dim byteIndex As Integer = curBit \ 8
            Dim bitIndexInByte As Integer = 7 - (curBit Mod 8)
            If byteIndex < 0 OrElse byteIndex >= data.Length Then Continue For
            Dim bit As Integer = (data(byteIndex) >> bitIndexInByte) And &H1
            value = (value << 1) Or CUInt(bit)
        Next
        Return value
    End Function

    Private Shared Function MapSta(ByVal v As UInteger) As String
        Return If(v < CUInt(StaMap.Length), StaMap(v), "UNK(" & v & ")")
    End Function

    Private Sub AppendIfChanged(ByVal tag As String, ByVal curr As UInteger, ByRef last As UInteger?)
        If Not last.HasValue OrElse last.Value <> curr Then
            RaiseEvent Log(tag & " = " & curr)
            last = curr
        End If
    End Sub

    ' 상태 변수들(초기화만 유지)
    Private _hrestExtMv, _rlMonMv, _rrMonMv, _rlFtMv, _rrFtMv As UInteger?
    Private _rclInit, _slideInit, _tiltInit, _relaxTiltInit, _heightInit, _cushExtInit, _legrestInit, _hrestInit, _hrestExtInit, _rlMonInit, _rrMonInit, _rlFtInit, _rrFtInit As UInteger?
    Private _rclVrtlSet, _slideVrtlSet, _tiltVrtlSet, _rlxTiltVrtlSet, _heightVrtlSet, _cushExtVrtlSet, _legrestVrtlSet, _hrestVrtlSet, _hrestExtVSert, _rlMonVrtlSet, _rrMonVrtlSet As UInteger?

    ' ===== FD 기반 ISO-TP (Raw FD 프레임) =====
    Private Sub HandleIsoTp_Core(ByVal frame As TPCANMsgFD)
        If frame.DATA Is Nothing OrElse frame.DATA.Length = 0 Then Return
        Dim pci As Byte = frame.DATA(0)

        If (pci And &HF0) = &H0 Then ' SF
            Dim len As Integer = (pci And &HF)
            If len < 0 Then len = 0
            If len > 7 Then len = 7
            Dim payload As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
            Array.Copy(frame.DATA, 1, payload, 0, len)
            RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, payload)
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS SF RX LEN=" & len)
            _isotp = New IsoTpState()
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H10 Then ' FF
            Dim total As Integer = ((pci And &HF) << 8) Or frame.DATA(1)
            _isotp.Active = True
            _isotp.RespId = frame.ID
            _isotp.ReqId = frame.ID - &H8
            _isotp.Expected = total
            _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)(total))
            _isotp.Buf.Clear()

            Dim copyLen As Integer = Math.Min(6, frame.DATA.Length - 2)
            If copyLen > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(2).Take(copyLen))
            _isotp.Got = copyLen
            _isotp.NextSn = 1
            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FF RX total=" & total & ", first=" & copyLen)
            SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H20 Then ' CF
            If Not _isotp.Active OrElse frame.ID <> _isotp.RespId Then Return

            Dim sn As Byte = CByte(pci And &HF)
            If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF SN mismatch " & sn & "!=" & _isotp.NextSn)
                _isotp.Active = False
                Return
            End If
            _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn + 1) And &HF)

            Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(7, frame.DATA.Length - 1)
            If take > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(1).Take(take))
            _isotp.Got += take
            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

            If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
                Dim pl = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
                RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, pl)
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF RX done len=" & pl.Length)
                _isotp = New IsoTpState()
            End If
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H30 Then
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FC RX")
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== 헬퍼 =====
    Private Shared Function LengthToDlc(ByVal len As Integer) As Integer
        If len <= 0 Then Return 0
        If len <= 8 Then Return len
        If len <= 12 Then Return 9
        If len <= 16 Then Return 10
        If len <= 20 Then Return 11
        If len <= 24 Then Return 12
        If len <= 32 Then Return 13
        If len <= 48 Then Return 14
        Return 15
    End Function

    Private Shared Function DlctoLen(ByVal dlc As Integer) As Integer
        If dlc <= 8 Then Return dlc
        Select Case dlc
            Case 9 : Return 12
            Case 10 : Return 16
            Case 11 : Return 20
            Case 12 : Return 24
            Case 13 : Return 32
            Case 14 : Return 48
            Case Else : Return 64
        End Select
    End Function

    Private Shared Function BuildLogLineFD(ByVal dir As String, ByVal msg As TPCANMsgFD, ByVal ts As ULong) As String
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        sb.Append("["c).Append(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss")).Append("] ")
        sb.Append(dir).Append(" ID=0x").Append(msg.ID.ToString("X"))
        sb.Append(" DLC=").Append(msg.DLC)
        If (msg.MSGTYPE And TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED) <> 0 Then sb.Append(" EXT")
        If (msg.MSGTYPE And TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_BRS) <> 0 Then sb.Append(" BRS")
        sb.Append(" DATA=").Append(BytesToHex(msg.DATA, DlctoLen(msg.DLC)))
        If ts <> 0 Then sb.Append(" TS=").Append(ts)
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function

    Public Shared Function BytesToHex(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal len As Integer) As String
        If data Is Nothing OrElse len <= 0 Then Return ""
        Dim n As Integer = Math.Min(len, data.Length)
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder(n * 3)
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To n - 1
            If i > 0 Then sb.Append(" ")
            sb.Append(data(i).ToString("X2"))
        Next
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ParseIdHex(ByVal idHex As String) As UInteger
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(idHex) Then Return 0
        idHex = idHex.Trim()
        If idHex.StartsWith("0x", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) Then
            idHex = idHex.Substring(2)
        End If
        Dim v As UInteger = 0
        UInteger.TryParse(idHex, NumberStyles.HexNumber, Nothing, v)
        Return v
    End Function

    Private Shared Function HexArray(ByVal hex As String()) As Byte()
        If hex Is Nothing Then Return New Byte(-1) {}
        Dim list As New List(Of Byte)(hex.Length)
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To hex.Length - 1
            Dim b As Byte = 0
            Byte.TryParse(hex(i), NumberStyles.HexNumber, Nothing, b)
            list.Add(b)
        Next
        Return list.ToArray()
    End Function

    ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E Profile 2 CRC8H2F =====
    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Update(ByVal crc As Byte, ByVal dataByte As Byte) As Byte
        Dim cur As Integer = crc Xor dataByte
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To 7
            If (cur And &H80) <> 0 Then
                cur = ((cur << 1) And &HFF) Xor &H2F
            Else
                cur = (cur << 1) And &HFF
            End If
        Next
        Return CByte(cur And &HFF)
    End Function

    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Calc(ByVal data As Byte(),
                                         ByVal offset As Integer,
                                         ByVal count As Integer,
                                         ByVal dataId As Byte) As Byte
        Dim crc As Byte = &HFF

        If data Is Nothing OrElse count <= 0 Then
            Return 0
        End If

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To count - 1
            crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, data(offset + i))
        Next

        crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, dataId)
        crc = CByte(crc Xor &HFF)
        Return crc
    End Function

    ' ===== 내부 타입 =====
    Private Structure TxJob
        Public Name As String
        Public Id As UInteger
        Public PeriodMs As Integer
        Public Data As Byte()
        Public LastTick As Long
        Public Brs As Boolean
        Public OneShot As Boolean
        Public IsExt As Boolean

        ' Alive
        Public AliveIndex As Integer
        Public AliveHighNibble As Boolean
        Public AliveValue As Byte

        ' AUTOSAR E2E
        Public E2eDataIdList As Byte()
        Public E2eEnabled As Boolean

        Public Sub New(ByVal name As String,
                       ByVal id As UInteger,
                       ByVal periodMs As Integer,
                       ByVal data As Byte(),
                       ByVal brs As Boolean,
                       ByVal oneShot As Boolean,
                       ByVal isExt As Boolean,
                       Optional ByVal aliveIndex As Integer = -1,
                       Optional ByVal aliveHighNibble As Boolean = False,
                       Optional ByVal e2eDataIdList As Byte() = Nothing)

            Me.Name = name
            Me.Id = id
            Me.PeriodMs = periodMs
            Me.Data = data
            Me.Brs = brs
            Me.OneShot = oneShot
            Me.IsExt = isExt

            Me.LastTick = 0

            Me.AliveIndex = aliveIndex
            Me.AliveHighNibble = aliveHighNibble
            Me.AliveValue = 0

            Me.E2eDataIdList = e2eDataIdList
            Me.E2eEnabled = (e2eDataIdList IsNot Nothing AndAlso e2eDataIdList.Length >= 16)
        End Sub
    End Structure

    Private Structure IsoTpState
        Public Active As Boolean
        Public ReqId As UInteger
        Public RespId As UInteger
        Public Expected As Integer
        Public Got As Integer
        Public NextSn As Byte
        Public Buf As List(Of Byte)
        Public LastActivityMs As Long
        Public TimeoutMs As Integer
    End Structure

    Public Event FrameDecoded As Action(Of UInteger, Byte())

    Private Sub ProcessCanMsg(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        Select Case canId
            Case &H3C3
                'Handle_3C3_LimitSetFSM(data)
            Case &H3C4
                ' 기타 파싱
            Case &H739
                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
            Case Else
        End Select
        RaiseEvent FrameDecoded(canId, data)
    End Sub

End Class

알겠습니다, 중단합니다. 

HEV는 CAN FD로 통신하니까 `_isFd=True`로 생성되어 FD 폴링만 있어도 맞는 거죠. ICE가 STD도 지원해야 해서 분기가 있는 거고요.

방금 수정한 거 되돌리겠습니다.

If _isFd Then
            ' FD 모드 폴링
            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsgFD
                                             Dim ts As ULong
                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.ReadFD(_handle, msg, ts)
                                                 If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("RX", msg, ts))
                                                     End If
                                                     Dim len = DlctoLen(msg.DLC)
                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
                                                 Else
                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
                                                 End If
                                             End While
                                         End Sub)
        Else
            ' 표준 CAN 2.0 폴링
            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsg
                                             Dim ts As TPCANTimestamp
                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.Read(_handle, msg, ts)
                                                 If st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineStd("RX", msg))
                                                     End If

                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
                                                 Else
                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
                                                 End If
                                             End While
                                         End Sub)
        End If

﻿Imports TPCANHandle = System.UInt16
Imports TPCANBitrateFD = System.String
Imports TPCANTimestampFD = System.UInt64
Imports System
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Timers
Imports System.Diagnostics
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Linq
Imports System.Globalization
Imports Peak.Can.Basic
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Xml
Imports System.Diagnostics.Eventing.Reader
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices.ComTypes
Imports System.Collections.Concurrent
Imports System.Threading.Tasks

Public NotInheritable Class CanBusService
    Implements IDisposable

    Private ReadOnly _gate As New Object()
    Private _isStarted As Boolean
    Private _isDisposed As Boolean

    ' ===== 외부 이벤트 =====
    Public Event FrameReceivedFD As Action(Of TPCANMsgFD, ULong)    ' RAW FD 프레임
    Public Event UdsCompleted As Action(Of UInteger, Byte())        ' ISO-TP 완성 페이로드
    Public Event Log As Action(Of String)                           ' 로그 이벤트
    Public Event [Error] As Action(Of TPCANStatus)                  ' 오류 이벤트

    ' ===== 내부 상태 =====
    Private ReadOnly _handle As UShort ' TPCANHandle
    Private ReadOnly _isFd As Boolean
    Private _pollCts As CancellationTokenSource

    ' 로깅 플래그
    Public Property LogAllRawRxFrames As Boolean = False
    Public Property LogAllRawTxFrames As Boolean = False
    Public Property LogVerboseInternalState As Boolean = False

    ' 송신 스케줄러
    Private ReadOnly _jobs As New List(Of TxJob)()
    Private _sw As Stopwatch                 ' 스케줄/ISO-TP 타임스탬프 공용
    Private _sched As System.Timers.Timer

    ' ISO-TP 수신 상태
    Private _isotp As New IsoTpState()

    ' 관심 ID 필터(없으면 모두 통과)
    Private _interestIds As HashSet(Of UInteger)

    ' 요청→응답 ID 매핑(FC용). 기본값: req + 0x8
    Private ReadOnly _respIdMap As New Dictionary(Of UInteger, UInteger)()

    Public Sub New(ByVal handle As UShort, ByVal isFd As Boolean)
        _handle = handle
        _isFd = isFd
    End Sub

    Public Sub New()
        Me.New(PCANBasic.PCAN_USBBUS1, True)
    End Sub

    ' ===== 초기화/해제 =====
    Public Function Init(ByVal fdBitrate As String) As TPCANStatus
        Dim st As TPCANStatus
        If _isFd Then
            st = PCANBasic.InitializeFD(_handle, fdBitrate)
        Else
            st = PCANBasic.Initialize(_handle, TPCANBaudrate.PCAN_BAUD_500K, TPCANType.PCAN_TYPE_ISA, 0, 0)
        End If

        RaiseEvent Log("PCAN Init: " & st.ToString())
        Return st
    End Function

    Public Function Init() As TPCANStatus
        Return Init("f_clock_mhz=40, nom_brp=1, nom_tseg1=63, nom_tseg2=16, nom_sjw=16, data_brp=2, data_tseg1=14, data_tseg2=5, data_sjw=4")
    End Function

    Private _disposed As Boolean

    Private Sub SafeUninitialize()
        Try
            PCANBasic.Uninitialize(_handle)
        Catch
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public Sub Dispose() Implements IDisposable.Dispose
        Dispose(True)
        GC.SuppressFinalize(Me)
    End Sub

    Protected Overrides Sub Finalize()
        Dispose(False)
        MyBase.Finalize()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Dispose(ByVal disposing As Boolean)
        If _disposed Then Return

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("Disposing (disposing=" & disposing & ")")

        If disposing Then
            StopPolling()
            StopScheduler()
        End If

        SafeUninitialize()

        _disposed = True
        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("Disposed complete.")
    End Sub

    ' ===== 관심 ID / 응답 ID 매핑 =====
    Public Sub SetInterestIds(ByVal ids As IEnumerable(Of UInteger))
        _interestIds = If(ids Is Nothing, Nothing, New HashSet(Of UInteger)(ids))
    End Sub

    Public Sub SetResponseIdMap(ByVal map As Dictionary(Of UInteger, UInteger))
        _respIdMap.Clear()
        If map Is Nothing Then Return
        For Each kv In map
            _respIdMap(kv.Key) = kv.Value
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Function PassesInterest(ByVal id As UInteger) As Boolean
        Return _interestIds Is Nothing OrElse _interestIds.Contains(id)
    End Function

    Private Function GetRespId(ByVal reqId As UInteger) As UInteger
        Return If(_respIdMap.ContainsKey(reqId), _respIdMap(reqId), (reqId + 8UI))
    End Function

    ' ===== 수신 폴링 =====
    Public Sub StartPolling(ByVal idleSleepMs As Integer)
        StopPolling()
        _pollCts = New CancellationTokenSource()
        Dim token = _pollCts.Token

        If _isFd Then
            ' FD 모드 폴링
            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsgFD
                                             Dim ts As ULong
                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.ReadFD(_handle, msg, ts)
                                                 If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("RX", msg, ts))
                                                     End If
                                                     Dim len = DlctoLen(msg.DLC)
                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
                                                 Else
                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
                                                 End If
                                             End While
                                         End Sub)
        Else
            ' 표준 CAN 2.0 폴링
            ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(Sub()
                                             Dim msg As TPCANMsg
                                             Dim ts As TPCANTimestamp
                                             While Not token.IsCancellationRequested
                                                 Dim st = PCANBasic.Read(_handle, msg, ts)
                                                 If st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
                                                     If LogAllRawRxFrames Then
                                                         RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineStd("RX", msg))
                                                     End If
                                                     Dim len As Integer = msg.LEN
                                                     Dim data As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                                                     If len > 0 Then Array.Copy(msg.DATA, data, len)
                                                     ProcessCanMsg(msg.ID, data)
                                                 ElseIf st = TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_QRCVEMPTY Then
                                                     If idleSleepMs > 0 Then Thread.Sleep(idleSleepMs)
                                                 Else
                                                     RaiseEvent [Error](st)
                                                     Thread.Sleep(10)
                                                 End If
                                             End While
                                         End Sub)
        End If

        RaiseEvent Log("Polling started.")
    End Sub

    Public Sub StartPolling()
        StartPolling(2)
    End Sub

    Public Sub StopPolling()
        If _pollCts IsNot Nothing Then
            Try
                _pollCts.Cancel()
            Catch
            End Try
            _pollCts.Dispose()
            _pollCts = Nothing
            RaiseEvent Log("Polling stopped.")
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== FD 수신 Process =====
    Public Sub ProcessCanMsgFD(ByVal msg As TPCANMsgFD, ByVal timestamp As ULong)
        If Not PassesInterest(msg.ID) Then Return

        RaiseEvent FrameReceivedFD(msg, timestamp)
        HandleIsoTp_Core(msg)
    End Sub

    ' ===== 송신 =====
    Public Function WriteFD(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal brs As Boolean, ByVal isExtended As Boolean) As TPCANStatus
        Dim msg As New TPCANMsgFD With {
            .ID = id,
            .DLC = CByte(LengthToDlc(If(data IsNot Nothing, data.Length, 0))),
            .MSGTYPE = TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_FD Or
                       If(brs, TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_BRS, 0) Or
                       If(isExtended, TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED, 0),
            .DATA = New Byte(63) {}
        }
        If data IsNot Nothing Then Array.Copy(data, msg.DATA, data.Length)

        Dim st = PCANBasic.WriteFD(_handle, msg)
        If st <> TPCANStatus.PCAN_ERROR_OK Then
            RaiseEvent [Error](st)
        Else
            If LogAllRawTxFrames Then
                RaiseEvent Log(BuildLogLineFD("TX", msg, 0))
            End If
        End If
        Return st
    End Function

    Public Function WriteFD(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte()) As TPCANStatus
        Return WriteFD(id, data, True, False)
    End Function

    Public Function WriteCanMsg(ByVal idHex As String, ByVal hex As String()) As TPCANStatus
        Dim id As UInteger = ParseIdHex(idHex)
        Dim data As Byte() = HexArray(hex)
        Return WriteFD(id, data, True, False)
    End Function

    Public Function WriteCanMsg(ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte()) As TPCANStatus
        Return WriteFD(id, data, True, False)
    End Function

    ' ===== Job 스케줄러 =====
    Public Sub AddJob(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal periodMs As Integer, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        SyncLock _jobs
            Dim i As Integer
            For i = _jobs.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
                If _jobs(i).Name = name Then _jobs.RemoveAt(i)
            Next
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, periodMs, data, True, False, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}, Period={2}ms", name, id, periodMs))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    ' 32바이트 FD 프레임용 Job (주기적) - 마지막 인자 형식 동일(ParamArray Byte)
    Public Sub AddJob32(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal periodMs As Integer, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length <> 32 Then
            Throw New ArgumentException("AddJob32 requires exactly 32 data bytes.", "data")
        End If

        SyncLock _jobs
            Dim i As Integer
            For i = _jobs.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
                If _jobs(i).Name = name Then _jobs.RemoveAt(i)
            Next
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, periodMs, data, True, False, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job (32B) added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}, Period={2}ms", name, id, periodMs))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    Public Sub AddJobOnce(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        SyncLock _jobs
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, 0, data, True, True, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job (once) added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}", name, id))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    ' 32바이트 FD 프레임용 Job (1회 송신) - 마지막 인자 형식 동일(ParamArray Byte)
    Public Sub AddJobOnce32(ByVal name As String, ByVal id As UInteger, ByVal ParamArray data As Byte())
        If data Is Nothing OrElse data.Length <> 32 Then
            Throw New ArgumentException("AddJobOnce32 requires exactly 32 data bytes.", "data")
        End If

        SyncLock _jobs
            _jobs.Add(New TxJob(name, id, 0, data, True, True, False))
        End SyncLock

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job (once, 32B) added: {0}, ID=0x{1:X3}", name, id))
        StartScheduler()
    End Sub

    Private Function HexToBytes(ByVal hex As String) As Byte()
        If hex Is Nothing Then Return Nothing

        Dim cleaned As String = hex.Replace(" ", "") _
                                   .Replace(vbTab, "") _
                                   .Replace(vbCr, "") _
                                   .Replace(vbLf, "")

        If cleaned.Length = 0 Then
            Return New Byte() {}
        End If

        If (cleaned.Length Mod 2) <> 0 Then
            Throw New ArgumentException("hexData length must be even.", "hex")
        End If

        Dim len As Integer = cleaned.Length \ 2
        Dim data(len - 1) As Byte

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To len - 1
            data(i) = Byte.Parse(cleaned.Substring(i * 2, 2), NumberStyles.HexNumber)
        Next

        Return data
    End Function

    Public Sub RemoveJob(ByVal name As String)
        SyncLock _jobs
            Dim i As Integer
            For i = _jobs.Count - 1 To 0 Step -1
                If _jobs(i).Name = name Then
                    _jobs.RemoveAt(i)
                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log(String.Format("Job removed: {0}", name))
                End If
            Next
        End SyncLock
    End Sub

    Private Sub StartScheduler()
        If _sched IsNot Nothing Then Return
        _sw = New Stopwatch()
        _sw.Start()
        _sched = New System.Timers.Timer(10.0)
        _sched.AutoReset = True
        AddHandler _sched.Elapsed, AddressOf Sched_Elapsed
        _sched.Start()
        RaiseEvent Log("Scheduler started.")
    End Sub

    Private Sub StopScheduler()
        If _sched IsNot Nothing Then
            _sched.Stop()
            RemoveHandler _sched.Elapsed, AddressOf Sched_Elapsed
            _sched.Dispose()
            _sched = Nothing
            RaiseEvent Log("Scheduler stopped.")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub Sched_Elapsed(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As ElapsedEventArgs)
        Dim ms As Long = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

        ' ISO-TP 타임아웃 처리
        IsoTpPump(ms)

        Dim snapshot As List(Of TxJob)
        SyncLock _jobs
            snapshot = New List(Of TxJob)(_jobs)
        End SyncLock

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To snapshot.Count - 1
            Dim job As TxJob = snapshot(i)

            If job.PeriodMs = 0 OrElse ms - job.LastTick >= job.PeriodMs Then

                ' ===== Alive Counter 적용 =====
                If job.AliveIndex >= 0 AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.AliveIndex < job.Data.Length Then
                    Dim b As Byte = job.Data(job.AliveIndex)

                    If job.AliveHighNibble Then
                        b = CByte(((job.AliveValue And &HF) << 4) Or (b And &HF))
                    Else
                        b = CByte((b And &HF0) Or (job.AliveValue And &HF))
                    End If

                    job.Data(job.AliveIndex) = b
                    job.AliveValue = CByte((job.AliveValue + 1) And &HF)
                End If
                ' ===== Alive 끝 =====

                ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E P02 CRC 갱신 =====
                If job.E2eEnabled AndAlso job.Data IsNot Nothing AndAlso job.Data.Length >= 2 Then
                    Dim cntIndex As Integer = If(job.AliveIndex >= 0, job.AliveIndex, 1)

                    If cntIndex >= 0 AndAlso cntIndex < job.Data.Length Then
                        Dim cnt As Integer = job.Data(cntIndex) And &HF
                        Dim dataId As Byte = job.E2eDataIdList(cnt And &HF)

                        Dim crc As Byte = Crc8H2F_Calc(job.Data, 1, job.Data.Length - 1, dataId)
                        job.Data(0) = crc
                    End If
                End If
                ' ===== E2E CRC 끝 =====

                WriteFD(job.Id, job.Data, job.Brs, job.IsExt)
                job.LastTick = ms

                If job.OneShot Then
                    RemoveJob(job.Name)
                Else
                    SyncLock _jobs
                        Dim j As Integer
                        For j = 0 To _jobs.Count - 1
                            If _jobs(j).Name = job.Name Then
                                Dim t As TxJob = _jobs(j)
                                t.LastTick = job.LastTick
                                t.AliveValue = job.AliveValue
                                _jobs(j) = t
                                Exit For
                            End If
                        Next
                    End SyncLock
                End If
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    ' ===== UDS/ISO-TP (8-byte 배열 기반) =====
    Private Sub OnCanRx_Uds(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal dlc8 As Byte())
        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return

        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
        Select Case pciType
            Case &H0 ' SF
                Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
                If len <= 0 OrElse len > 7 Then Return
                Dim uds As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
                Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
                OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)

            Case &H1 ' FF
                Dim totalLen As Integer = ((dlc8(0) And &HF) << 8) Or dlc8(1)
                Dim part = dlc8.Skip(2).ToArray()

                _isotp.Active = True
                _isotp.RespId = canId
                _isotp.ReqId = canId - &H8
                _isotp.Expected = totalLen
                _isotp.Got = part.Length
                _isotp.NextSn = 1
                _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)())
                _isotp.Buf.Clear()
                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(part.Take(Math.Min(part.Length, totalLen)))
                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

                SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)

            Case &H2 ' CF
                If Not _isotp.Active OrElse canId <> _isotp.RespId Then Return

                Dim sn As Byte = CByte(dlc8(0) And &HF)
                If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] SN mismatch exp=" & _isotp.NextSn & ", got=" & sn & " → abort")
                    _isotp.Active = False
                    Exit Select
                End If
                _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn Mod &HF) + 1)

                Dim chunk = dlc8.Skip(1).ToArray()
                Dim remain As Integer = _isotp.Expected - _isotp.Got
                Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(remain, chunk.Length)
                _isotp.Buf.AddRange(chunk.Take(take))
                _isotp.Got += take
                _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

                If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
                    Dim uds = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
                    _isotp.Active = False
                    OnUdsComplete(canId, uds)
                End If

            Case &H3 ' FC
            Case Else
        End Select
    End Sub

    Private Sub SendFlowControlCts(ByVal reqId As UInteger)
        WriteCanMsg(ToIdHex(reqId), {"30", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00", "00"})
        RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] FC(CTS) sent to " & ToIdHex(reqId))
    End Sub

    Private Sub IsoTpPump(ByVal nowMs As Long)
        If _isotp.Active AndAlso (nowMs - _isotp.LastActivityMs) > _isotp.TimeoutMs Then
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[ISO-TP] Timeout → abort")
            _isotp.Active = False
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub OnUdsComplete(ByVal respId As UInteger, ByVal uds As Byte())
        RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(respId, uds)

        If ShouldFilterUds(uds) Then
            Return
        End If

        If LogVerboseInternalState Then
            If uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H62 Then
                Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
                Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
                Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
                Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
                RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
            ElseIf uds.Length >= 3 AndAlso uds(0) = &H7F Then
                RaiseEvent Log("[NRC] SID=0x" & uds(1).ToString("X2") & ", NRC=0x" & uds(2).ToString("X2"))
            Else
                RaiseEvent Log("[UDS] " & String.Join(" ", uds.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Shared Function ToIdHex(ByVal id As UInteger) As String
        Return "0x" & id.ToString("X3")
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ShouldFilterUds(ByVal uds As Byte()) As Boolean
        If uds Is Nothing OrElse uds.Length = 0 Then Return False
        If uds(0) = &H7E Then Return True
        Return False
    End Function

    ' ===== 간단 UDS SF 추출 =====
    Private Shared Function TryExtractUdsPayload(ByVal dlc8 As Byte(), ByRef uds As Byte()) As Boolean
        uds = Nothing
        If dlc8 Is Nothing OrElse dlc8.Length < 2 Then Return False

        Dim pciType As Integer = (dlc8(0) >> 4) And &HF
        If pciType = &H0 Then
            Dim len As Integer = dlc8(0) And &HF
            If len <= 0 OrElse len > dlc8.Length - 1 Then Return False
            uds = New Byte(len - 1) {}
            Buffer.BlockCopy(dlc8, 1, uds, 0, len)
            Return True
        End If
        Return False
    End Function

    Private Sub LogRDBIResponseFromCan(ByVal canData As Byte())
        Dim uds As Byte() = Nothing
        If Not TryExtractUdsPayload(canData, uds) Then Return
        If uds.Length < 3 OrElse uds(0) <> &H62 Then Return

        Dim did As String = "F1" & uds(2).ToString("X2")
        Dim payload = uds.Skip(3).ToArray()
        Dim ascii As Boolean = payload.All(Function(b) b >= &H20 AndAlso b <= &H7E)
        Dim val As String = If(ascii, Encoding.ASCII.GetString(payload), String.Join(" ", payload.Select(Function(b) b.ToString("X2"))))
        If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[RDBI] DID " & did & " = " & val)
    End Sub

    ' ===== 3C3 LimitSet FSM =====
    Private Shared ReadOnly StaMap As String() = {"0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7"}

    Private Shared Function IsBusy(ByVal code As UInteger) As Boolean
        Return Not (code = 0 OrElse code = 4)
    End Function

    Private Class LimitSetSession
        Public Axis As String
        Public Active As Boolean
        Public LastCode As UInteger
        Public StartedAt As DateTime
        Public LastChangeAt As DateTime
        Public Toggles As Integer
        Public FramesSinceStable As Integer
    End Class

    Private _tiltSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Tilt"}
    Private _hgtSess As New LimitSetSession With {.Axis = "Height"}

    Private Sub Handle_3C3_LimitSetFSM(ByVal d As Byte())
        Dim tiltSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 132, 3)
        Dim hgtSta As UInteger = ReadMotorola(d, 138, 3)

        UpdateLimitSet(_tiltSess, tiltSta)
        UpdateLimitSet(_hgtSess, hgtSta)
    End Sub

    Private Sub UpdateLimitSet(ByVal s As LimitSetSession, ByVal code As UInteger)
        If Not s.Active Then
            If IsBusy(code) Then
                s.Active = True
                s.StartedAt = DateTime.Now
                s.LastChangeAt = s.StartedAt
                s.Toggles = 0
                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set START (code=" & code & ", map=" & MapSta(code) & ")")
            End If
        Else
            If code <> s.LastCode Then
                s.LastChangeAt = DateTime.Now
                If IsBusy(s.LastCode) <> IsBusy(code) Then s.Toggles += 1
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] State CHG " & s.LastCode & "→" & code & " (map " & MapSta(s.LastCode) & "→" & MapSta(code) & ")")
            End If

            If Not IsBusy(code) Then
                s.FramesSinceStable += 1
                If s.FramesSinceStable >= 2 Then
                    Dim dur = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
                    If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set DONE in " & dur.TotalSeconds.ToString("0.0") &
                                                                  "s (toggles=" & s.Toggles & ", last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code) & ")")
                    s.Active = False
                End If
            Else
                s.FramesSinceStable = 0
            End If

            Dim elapsed = DateTime.Now - s.StartedAt
            If elapsed.TotalSeconds > 20 AndAlso s.Active Then
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("[" & s.Axis & "] Limit Set TIMEOUT (>20s) — last=" & code & "/" & MapSta(code))
                s.Active = False
            End If
        End If
        s.LastCode = code
    End Sub

    Private Shared Function ReadMotorola(ByVal d As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal len As Integer) As UInteger
        Dim v As UInteger = 0
        If d Is Nothing Then Return 0
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To len - 1
            Dim cur As Integer = startBit - i
            Dim bi As Integer = cur \ 8
            Dim biIn As Integer = 7 - (cur Mod 8)
            If bi >= 0 AndAlso bi < d.Length Then
                v = (v << 1) Or CUInt((d(bi) >> biIn) And 1)
            End If
        Next
        Return v
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ReadSignalMotorola(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal startBit As Integer, ByVal length As Integer) As UInteger
        Dim value As UInteger = 0
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To length - 1
            Dim curBit As Integer = startBit - i
            Dim byteIndex As Integer = curBit \ 8
            Dim bitIndexInByte As Integer = 7 - (curBit Mod 8)
            If byteIndex < 0 OrElse byteIndex >= data.Length Then Continue For
            Dim bit As Integer = (data(byteIndex) >> bitIndexInByte) And &H1
            value = (value << 1) Or CUInt(bit)
        Next
        Return value
    End Function

    Private Shared Function MapSta(ByVal v As UInteger) As String
        Return If(v < CUInt(StaMap.Length), StaMap(v), "UNK(" & v & ")")
    End Function

    Private Sub AppendIfChanged(ByVal tag As String, ByVal curr As UInteger, ByRef last As UInteger?)
        If Not last.HasValue OrElse last.Value <> curr Then
            RaiseEvent Log(tag & " = " & curr)
            last = curr
        End If
    End Sub

    ' 상태 변수들(초기화만 유지)
    Private _hrestExtMv, _rlMonMv, _rrMonMv, _rlFtMv, _rrFtMv As UInteger?
    Private _rclInit, _slideInit, _tiltInit, _relaxTiltInit, _heightInit, _cushExtInit, _legrestInit, _hrestInit, _hrestExtInit, _rlMonInit, _rrMonInit, _rlFtInit, _rrFtInit As UInteger?
    Private _rclVrtlSet, _slideVrtlSet, _tiltVrtlSet, _rlxTiltVrtlSet, _heightVrtlSet, _cushExtVrtlSet, _legrestVrtlSet, _hrestVrtlSet, _hrestExtVSert, _rlMonVrtlSet, _rrMonVrtlSet As UInteger?

    ' ===== FD 기반 ISO-TP (Raw FD 프레임) =====
    Private Sub HandleIsoTp_Core(ByVal frame As TPCANMsgFD)
        If frame.DATA Is Nothing OrElse frame.DATA.Length = 0 Then Return
        Dim pci As Byte = frame.DATA(0)

        If (pci And &HF0) = &H0 Then ' SF
            Dim len As Integer = (pci And &HF)
            If len < 0 Then len = 0
            If len > 7 Then len = 7
            Dim payload As Byte() = New Byte(len - 1) {}
            Array.Copy(frame.DATA, 1, payload, 0, len)
            RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, payload)
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS SF RX LEN=" & len)
            _isotp = New IsoTpState()
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H10 Then ' FF
            Dim total As Integer = ((pci And &HF) << 8) Or frame.DATA(1)
            _isotp.Active = True
            _isotp.RespId = frame.ID
            _isotp.ReqId = frame.ID - &H8
            _isotp.Expected = total
            _isotp.Buf = If(_isotp.Buf, New List(Of Byte)(total))
            _isotp.Buf.Clear()

            Dim copyLen As Integer = Math.Min(6, frame.DATA.Length - 2)
            If copyLen > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(2).Take(copyLen))
            _isotp.Got = copyLen
            _isotp.NextSn = 1
            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FF RX total=" & total & ", first=" & copyLen)
            SendFlowControlCts(_isotp.ReqId)
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H20 Then ' CF
            If Not _isotp.Active OrElse frame.ID <> _isotp.RespId Then Return

            Dim sn As Byte = CByte(pci And &HF)
            If sn <> _isotp.NextSn Then
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF SN mismatch " & sn & "!=" & _isotp.NextSn)
                _isotp.Active = False
                Return
            End If
            _isotp.NextSn = CByte((_isotp.NextSn + 1) And &HF)

            Dim take As Integer = Math.Min(7, frame.DATA.Length - 1)
            If take > 0 Then _isotp.Buf.AddRange(frame.DATA.Skip(1).Take(take))
            _isotp.Got += take
            _isotp.LastActivityMs = If(_sw IsNot Nothing, _sw.ElapsedMilliseconds, Environment.TickCount)

            If _isotp.Got >= _isotp.Expected Then
                Dim pl = _isotp.Buf.Take(_isotp.Expected).ToArray()
                RaiseEvent UdsCompleted(frame.ID, pl)
                If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS CF RX done len=" & pl.Length)
                _isotp = New IsoTpState()
            End If
        ElseIf (pci And &HF0) = &H30 Then
            If LogVerboseInternalState Then RaiseEvent Log("UDS FC RX")
        End If
    End Sub

    ' ===== 헬퍼 =====
    Private Shared Function LengthToDlc(ByVal len As Integer) As Integer
        If len <= 0 Then Return 0
        If len <= 8 Then Return len
        If len <= 12 Then Return 9
        If len <= 16 Then Return 10
        If len <= 20 Then Return 11
        If len <= 24 Then Return 12
        If len <= 32 Then Return 13
        If len <= 48 Then Return 14
        Return 15
    End Function

    Private Shared Function DlctoLen(ByVal dlc As Integer) As Integer
        If dlc <= 8 Then Return dlc
        Select Case dlc
            Case 9 : Return 12
            Case 10 : Return 16
            Case 11 : Return 20
            Case 12 : Return 24
            Case 13 : Return 32
            Case 14 : Return 48
            Case Else : Return 64
        End Select
    End Function

    Private Shared Function BuildLogLineFD(ByVal dir As String, ByVal msg As TPCANMsgFD, ByVal ts As ULong) As String
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder()
        sb.Append("["c).Append(DateTime.Now.ToString("HH:mm:ss")).Append("] ")
        sb.Append(dir).Append(" ID=0x").Append(msg.ID.ToString("X"))
        sb.Append(" DLC=").Append(msg.DLC)
        If (msg.MSGTYPE And TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_EXTENDED) <> 0 Then sb.Append(" EXT")
        If (msg.MSGTYPE And TPCANMessageType.PCAN_MESSAGE_BRS) <> 0 Then sb.Append(" BRS")
        sb.Append(" DATA=").Append(BytesToHex(msg.DATA, DlctoLen(msg.DLC)))
        If ts <> 0 Then sb.Append(" TS=").Append(ts)
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function

    Public Shared Function BytesToHex(ByVal data As Byte(), ByVal len As Integer) As String
        If data Is Nothing OrElse len <= 0 Then Return ""
        Dim n As Integer = Math.Min(len, data.Length)
        Dim sb As New StringBuilder(n * 3)
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To n - 1
            If i > 0 Then sb.Append(" ")
            sb.Append(data(i).ToString("X2"))
        Next
        Return sb.ToString()
    End Function

    Private Shared Function ParseIdHex(ByVal idHex As String) As UInteger
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(idHex) Then Return 0
        idHex = idHex.Trim()
        If idHex.StartsWith("0x", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) Then
            idHex = idHex.Substring(2)
        End If
        Dim v As UInteger = 0
        UInteger.TryParse(idHex, NumberStyles.HexNumber, Nothing, v)
        Return v
    End Function

    Private Shared Function HexArray(ByVal hex As String()) As Byte()
        If hex Is Nothing Then Return New Byte(-1) {}
        Dim list As New List(Of Byte)(hex.Length)
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To hex.Length - 1
            Dim b As Byte = 0
            Byte.TryParse(hex(i), NumberStyles.HexNumber, Nothing, b)
            list.Add(b)
        Next
        Return list.ToArray()
    End Function

    ' ===== AUTOSAR E2E Profile 2 CRC8H2F =====
    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Update(ByVal crc As Byte, ByVal dataByte As Byte) As Byte
        Dim cur As Integer = crc Xor dataByte
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To 7
            If (cur And &H80) <> 0 Then
                cur = ((cur << 1) And &HFF) Xor &H2F
            Else
                cur = (cur << 1) And &HFF
            End If
        Next
        Return CByte(cur And &HFF)
    End Function

    Private Shared Function Crc8H2F_Calc(ByVal data As Byte(),
                                         ByVal offset As Integer,
                                         ByVal count As Integer,
                                         ByVal dataId As Byte) As Byte
        Dim crc As Byte = &HFF

        If data Is Nothing OrElse count <= 0 Then
            Return 0
        End If

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 0 To count - 1
            crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, data(offset + i))
        Next

        crc = Crc8H2F_Update(crc, dataId)
        crc = CByte(crc Xor &HFF)
        Return crc
    End Function

    ' ===== 내부 타입 =====
    Private Structure TxJob
        Public Name As String
        Public Id As UInteger
        Public PeriodMs As Integer
        Public Data As Byte()
        Public LastTick As Long
        Public Brs As Boolean
        Public OneShot As Boolean
        Public IsExt As Boolean

        ' Alive
        Public AliveIndex As Integer
        Public AliveHighNibble As Boolean
        Public AliveValue As Byte

        ' AUTOSAR E2E
        Public E2eDataIdList As Byte()
        Public E2eEnabled As Boolean

        Public Sub New(ByVal name As String,
                       ByVal id As UInteger,
                       ByVal periodMs As Integer,
                       ByVal data As Byte(),
                       ByVal brs As Boolean,
                       ByVal oneShot As Boolean,
                       ByVal isExt As Boolean,
                       Optional ByVal aliveIndex As Integer = -1,
                       Optional ByVal aliveHighNibble As Boolean = False,
                       Optional ByVal e2eDataIdList As Byte() = Nothing)

            Me.Name = name
            Me.Id = id
            Me.PeriodMs = periodMs
            Me.Data = data
            Me.Brs = brs
            Me.OneShot = oneShot
            Me.IsExt = isExt

            Me.LastTick = 0

            Me.AliveIndex = aliveIndex
            Me.AliveHighNibble = aliveHighNibble
            Me.AliveValue = 0

            Me.E2eDataIdList = e2eDataIdList
            Me.E2eEnabled = (e2eDataIdList IsNot Nothing AndAlso e2eDataIdList.Length >= 16)
        End Sub
    End Structure

    Private Structure IsoTpState
        Public Active As Boolean
        Public ReqId As UInteger
        Public RespId As UInteger
        Public Expected As Integer
        Public Got As Integer
        Public NextSn As Byte
        Public Buf As List(Of Byte)
        Public LastActivityMs As Long
        Public TimeoutMs As Integer
    End Structure

    Public Event FrameDecoded As Action(Of UInteger, Byte())

    Private Sub ProcessCanMsg(ByVal canId As UInteger, ByVal data As Byte())
        Select Case canId
            Case &H3C3
                'Handle_3C3_LimitSetFSM(data)
            Case &H3C4
                ' 기타 파싱
            Case &H739
                OnCanRx_Uds(canId, data)
            Case Else
        End Select
        RaiseEvent FrameDecoded(canId, data)
    End Sub

End Class
